Friend,

I promise I won't shame you or question your party loyalty.

I promise I won't badger you with these emails if you ask them to stop.

I promise this message is truly heartfelt & I promise it is worth reading.

My name is Mayra Flores. I'm the America First candidate in TX-34.

A seat that was a Democrat stronghold for over a century until we flipped it red in a stunning special election upset against Biden & Pelosi last summer.

Our historic victory made me the first Mexican-born Congresswoman in U.S. history.

Then Biden & the Democrats spent millions to wipe the floor with me & they narrowly flipped it back to blue in November.

As a proud conservative, I refuse to bend the knee to anyone but God. I don't believe in giving up.

But this race is so close that all Joe Biden needs to do is make a phone call to one of his billionaire friends & that would be the end of it all.

**Unfortunately, I don't have those kinds of connections & given the speed at which the Democrats raise capital, this race will be won or lost in the next few hours.**

This is our first & last chance at mounting this historic comeback to retake the most important seat in America.

**So please, if there is any amount you can spare today, it would truly mean the world to me if you chipped in.**

And I promise I'll never forget it.

Thank you,
Mayra

subject: Border Security Is Pivotal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/opening-day-12782998?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=a0fb87933f&e=1722d05e10)
---
| | Dear Friend, Over the last few weeks, we've seen images on the news: military-aged men from Asia, Africa, and the Middle East flooding across our Southern Border; migrants attacking police officers in New York; and deadly Fentanyl flooding into the country—it is a national security crisis.

The Biden Administration is endangering this country.

I don't make that statement lightly; I know of these matters firsthand. I have personally dealt with the apprehension and removal of foreign nationals within our borders on the Terrorist Watch List—an individual who was identified to pose a significant threat to our nation.

My service in the military and in federal law enforcement was a personal and family sacrifice but was gladly made in the call of duty to serve, protect, and defend this nation, the people and her laws.

That's why I'm running as a Republican for Congress. We need to take bold steps against this attack on our nation.

I ask you to chip in today and help my campaign. You will receive your March Primary Ballot next week. Please cast your vote and return your ballot!

But you can start supporting my campaign _today_ by making a [$5 weekly commitment on a $5 Friday](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=d5847120e8&e=1722d05e10).

Sincerely,

name: NRSC
subject: Desperate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Chuck Schumer’s Senate Majority PAC announced $63 million in ad spending in just TWO battleground states. Don’t let Schumer and his goons buy up all the airtime in Montana and Nevada; help NRSC keep pace and stay on the air. | We can’t underscore this enough, Peter.

Chuck Schumer is willing to do **_ANYTHING_** to hang on to power in Washington.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22081ee30219444b98a5d0706de91494&_e=Ao8m3QYg_Vm6hJyJVQrsyQQGs5OriMuOFv90vWFcaTVfJIb5VOHgFsnVfDa2gVj73m11ss0GXo86yhJ2XN7_-wjH03a0ULhg_buuEDAAHzGHuecrhEfezEBs94VOelH8_3JN1Y6op4VgA01BoJOo_zvtyn4aTlCmBkoddjUX5wUhom4Ax8znXQyQAbrmTt4r5Al-teuahsKiW7WkxkA6nzOSFW2t_DPGVCV9YZsWKEloSM5eheSjYpzoDvfTdUHFSmp6xSBRllW06tPW2mWkLnLmv81OqZF6i2lvoWyY_h_9FsIFlZQmXdBSIH9Kd5llUz8VFQOtPx0nj6HAwRFIiY3rZG0urzeNbe1jq4BycQsz-xyGuwDUYu3hJmSNWI9FjmJ7_Ja5ciUzt2wjkRvfl8e575RpzZOvUAu-PqI19Zg%3D)
**His Super PAC, Senate Majority PAC, just announced another $63 million in spending in Nevada and Montana, the two most competitive Senate races on the map.**

Democrats know we have amazing candidates - Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy and West Point Graduate Sam Brown – running against two of their most vulnerable Democrat Senators.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22081ee30219444b98a5d0706de91494&_e=Ao8m3QYg_Vm6hJyJVQrsyQQGs5OriMuOFv90vWFcaTVfJIb5VOHgFsnVfDa2gVj73m11ss0GXo86yhJ2XN7_-wjH03a0ULhg_buuEDAAHzGHuecrhEfezEBs94VOelH8_3JN1Y6op4VgA01BoJOo_zvtyn4aTlCmBkoddjUX5wUhom4Ax8znXQyQAbrmTt4r5Al-teuahsKiW7WkxkA6nzOSFW2t_DPGVCV9YZsWKEloSM5eheSjYpzoDvfTdUHFSmp6xSBRllW06tPW2mWkLquh_iekT4b_u3mT88g84gi8VSV_rVpVgFsZB_mCdnkljjb6NbzaVNs-yygtK9lMsvVbB2WqS7mCoKb41Ueu_mHFXJSip2lO5vYoEwkqbmJAj-lIvjKRuhITpNsE0rf3RkgiYPsdKRMx9Zf2ZZWs_Z4%3D)
Chuck relies on his year-in, year-out tactic of outspending Republican candidates to take the lead in critical races. We can’t fall for his same dirty tricks again. We have got to get our candidates on the air, spreading the truth to voters and fighting back against Schumer’s lies.

**The Democrats are getting desperate.** They see the writing on the wall with President Trump leading the primary and the Biden agenda running the country into the ground. They know Republican voters will turn out in huge numbers, and they fear their voters may stay home.

It’s our job to bring their fear into reality. The best way to do that is to run our ads that spread the truth about Democrats’ disastrous agenda and the lies they are telling to cover up their failures. Taking on a party of professional liars is a tall task, but we can do it with your support.

[**We’re counting on you to help us stand up against their attacks targeting two American heroes. Even $5 or $10 will help fund ads to help set the record straight in Montana and Nevada – and keep Chuck Schumer from drowning out their own ads.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22081ee30219444b98a5d0706de91494&_e=Ao8m3QYg_Vm6hJyJVQrsyQQGs5OriMuOFv90vWFcaTVfJIb5VOHgFsnVfDa2gVj73m11ss0GXo86yhJ2XN7_-wjH03a0ULhg_buuEDAAHzGHuecrhEfezEBs94VOelH8_3JN1Y6op4VgA01BoJOo_zvtyn4aTlCmBkoddjUX5wUhom4Ax8znXQyQAbrmTt4r5Al-teuahsKiW7WkxkA6nzOSFW2t_DPGVCV9YZsWKEloSM5eheSjYpzoDvfTdUHFSmp6xSBRllW06tPW2mWkLiDReeddvQawYheYj-y0n9-fJbuTiNnt_TnfsjE8ttQOUBIRqB3UPfCRwsFQXix-H2Bc18N9xsyv2JXr-KfdChBL33JwEetxW5mtH0-3ooiEwdUTNjp5EGLMxJYMBCkUoZ700glCubjPvlkcoL969Ps%3D)

[**Support NRSC Ads**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22081ee30219444b98a5d0706de91494&_e=Ao8m3QYg_Vm6hJyJVQrsyQQGs5OriMuOFv90vWFcaTVfJIb5VOHgFsnVfDa2gVj73m11ss0GXo86yhJ2XN7_-wjH03a0ULhg_buuEDAAHzGHuecrhEfezEBs94VOelH8_3JN1Y6op4VgA01BoJOo_zvtyn4aTlCmBkoddjUX5wUhom4Ax8znXQyQAbrmTt4r5Al-teuahsKiW7WkxkA6nzOSFW2t_DPGVCV9YZsWKEloSM5eheSjYpzoDvfTdUHFSmp6xSBRllW06tPW2mWkLsELvBBSv3-cjUu7Dkl32wjE6JSYJPXGYT5Dweis_WKwCgDmNwZy-i1FFIbPEAxbOYdRfhVyWX8aKW7H9xgiigM8qw1548PiLj3PlRZ1lxBgrps22alyW2T-t0C5XG83tE_0jqpeoYZlZg6c9X5gDoo%3D)
These advertising dollars are essential for modern campaigns. Millions upon millions of dollars get spent through the election to buy millions of chances to talk to voters directly through screens. We can’t let the Democrats monopolize screen time, or our voters will get discouraged and choose to stay home.

That’s how we could lose in this year full of opportunity. We can’t let that happen. Not with President Trump on the ballot and Joe Biden seemingly doing everything he can to destroy our country and weaken our position internationally. We must stand up for our country and put a stop to all the destruction from Democrats’ agenda.

[**Please be as generous as you can when selecting your contribution amount today, knowing your gift will directly fund the campaigns of Tim Sheehy in Montana and Sam Brown in Nevada as they take on politically connected Schumer allies in the most competitive Senate races in America.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22081ee30219444b98a5d0706de91494&_e=Ao8m3QYg_Vm6hJyJVQrsyQQGs5OriMuOFv90vWFcaTVfJIb5VOHgFsnVfDa2gVj73m11ss0GXo86yhJ2XN7_-wjH03a0ULhg_buuEDAAHzGHuecrhEfezEBs94VOelH8_3JN1Y6op4VgA01BoJOo_zvtyn4aTlCmBkoddjUX5wUhom4Ax8znXQyQAbrmTt4r5Al-teuahsKiW7WkxkA6nzOSFW2t_DPGVCV9YZsWKEloSM5eheSjYpzoDvfTdUHFSmp6xSBRllW06tPW2mWkLjUX9Duai1UMDaRLbIGsTMhTkiMx7GVFM83VBrV7QtS6NUExKAU3Uc1_NhQr1ldcqOL8y255i3O1pashDE0oTt2F8BR_Pcu0rjFsp9vjcPiVkdTAiCXnZOkvx9kU858EMjuAFQhfVPv3yj6v6rGj1dU%3D)

Thank you,

Senate Republican HQ

[**Support NRSC Ads**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=22081ee30219444b98a5d0706de91494&_e=Ao8m3QYg_Vm6hJyJVQrsyQQGs5OriMuOFv90vWFcaTVfJIb5VOHgFsnVfDa2gVj73m11ss0GXo86yhJ2XN7_-wjH03a0ULhg_buuEDAAHzGHuecrhEfezEBs94VOelH8_3JN1Y6op4VgA01BoJOo_zvtyn4aTlCmBkoddjUX5wUhom4Ax8znXQyQAbrmTt4r5Al-teuahsKiW7WkxkA6nzOSFW2t_DPGVCV9YZsWKEloSM5eheSjYpzoDvfTdUHFSmp6xSBRllW06tPW2mWkLuVr3eDPVHu8_iRCLqQad_N2x0-2DQ4VEI-C-9_vVOag33NAXSK2b1RTajy6q5VF4Qs8_14aDbKVpLjHQU5sEqUuWYAL6e4_ryJ1RZ95tlwIiFrzjLzRwxI3UozaOP6Yrmv3Pazqq71FmOMO0_QubJA%3D)

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: Planned Parenthood caught red-handed!
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

I can’t believe the shocking videos I just watched from _Project Veritas!_

As you’re probably aware, _Project Veritas_ does undercover journalism to document and expose lies and secrets that corrupt people would rather keep hidden.

And in their most recent exposé, they caught Planned Parenthood red-handed admitting they traffic teen girls across state lines to get abortions without their parents’ knowledge!

**I am utterly outraged, Pro-Life Friend!**

Planned Parenthood is secretly facilitating abortions on minors across state lines _(just like a cartel would)_. . .

And the **_ONLY_** reason they are bold enough to do this is because weak-kneed politicians won’t stand up to them.

That’s why I’m calling on members of the United States Congress to support a _National Life at Conception Act_ **_IMMEDIATELY_** , so this horrific practice can be put to an end!

If you agree that Planned Parenthood’s actions are sick and twisted, **[then I urge you to please sign your _Life at Conception Act_ Petition right away to let Congress know that NOW is the time to stand against abortion trafficking](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdijue-duchtdja-y/)!**

After all, the time when politicians listen best is when they're seeking votes in election years like 2024 – _not when they’re safely in office and insulated from voters._

But if you and I remain silent, nothing will change. And I can’t tell you what a shame that would be.

In _Project Veritas’_ video montage, Emily, a Kansas Planned Parenthood Managing Director, boasted on camera that they take teens to other states for secret abortions without their parents’ consent: _“We do help people get to these places.”_

In a separate clip, another undercover journalist asks: _“I don’t have to provide any documentation that I’m related [to the minor], right?”_

And an official from the Maple Women’s Health Center in Dallas, Texas responds: **_“No.”_**

Pro-Life Friend, Planned Parenthood is not only secretly facilitating abortion across state lines, but they are aiding potential child abusers and rapists in forcing their victims to get abortions to cover up their heinous acts!

And to make matters worse, _Project Veritas’_ journalist was given a pamphlet with contact information for court officials, as well as instructions, on how minors should pursue an abortion without parental consent.

This process is called a “judicial bypass” and is described by Emily, that Kansas Planned Parenthood Managing Director I mentioned earlier, as _“something the courts are instructed to prioritize.”_

_I’m sick, Pro-Life Friend. . ._

And I know the Abortion Lobby is counting on us to be silent, so this doesn’t catch wind.

They’re counting on us to sit back and do nothing so they can continue aiding abusers and butchering young girls behind their parents’ backs.

That’s why we must do exactly the opposite. . . _We need to push back as hard as we can!_

**[So, will you please sign your _Life at Conception Act_ Petition to Congress demanding that they commit to protecting Life from the moment of conception](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdijue-duchtdja-j/)?**

**[And after you sign your petition, please consider making your most generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, or even $25 to _Students for Life Action_ right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdijue-duchtdja-i/).**

Pro-Life Friend, a _National Life at Conception Act_ would ensure that every person is granted the God-given right to Life that they deserve from the moment of conception nationwide.

And more specifically, a _National Life at Conception Act_ would also stop the Abortion Cartel from secretly trafficking teens for abortions because there would be no place in America where they could traffic them to!

That’s why **[your signature on this petition](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdijue-duchtdja-d/)** is so crucial.

You see, with the 2024 elections right around the corner, we have a chance to stop the Abortion Lobby in its tracks and end their vile acts of abuse against minor girls.

So, the more signatures I get, the louder our voices will be – _until each member of Congress can’t ignore our demands without losing their precious election this fall._

But like I said before, the Abortion Lobby is counting on us to be silent.

It's time to make your voice heard, Pro-Life Friend.

**[So please sign your _Life at Conception Act_ Petition to send a clear message to members of the U.S. Congress that anything less than national protection at conception is unacceptable](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdijue-duchtdja-h/)!**

**[And once you’ve signed, please consider making a generous contribution of $250, $100, $50, or even $25 to _Students for Life Action_ so I can get this petition to even more pro-lifers like you](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdijue-duchtdja-k/)!**

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

## **[>> Sign your _Life at Conception Act_ Petition <<](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sdijue-duchtdja-u/)**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

name: American Action News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history,

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdfacsufhbelm1sq0i6k5v7hva7k8vspphe12beo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjim1ob7chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4gstu6b2nr3u3rv8m4s4s48f3ejbiob84eco96o_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjim1ob7chh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfv6paob4dan8f1jkv7r23n58mtb7cdvghk4l6k0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjim1ob7chh2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars ” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College ICYMI News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

### _Friday, February 2, 2024_
With all the NFL coaching vacancies filled, Bill Belichick and Mike Vrabel are the odd men out. The Taylor Swift conspiracy theories are out there and some of them go all the way to the top. Plus, what was your favorite tv show growing up, we take a deep dive into the best from our childhoods. ### _Wednesday, January 31, 2024_

name: Amanda Chase
subject: Please Support Amanda Chase
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Donate today
| | |
---
| Support Amanda Chase Donate Today THANK YOU
---
|
Friends, Thank you to those who have pitched in to help cover my costs to communicate with you each week while the General Assembly is in session. THANK YOU.
Many of you have advised me that you appreciate my instructive and informative emails, regarding important bills coming before the Virginia General Assembly.
I'm delighted to continue to send you these emails and ask for your continued support so that I may continue to communicate with you.
If you haven't done so already, will you please help me offset the cost by pitching in a few dollars?
It costs about $400 per month to send out emails to keep you informed about bills coming before the General Assembly.
Would you please make a donation today to help offset the cost, so that I can continue to bring you the latest on what's going on in the General Assembly?
Thank you in advance for your continued support.
---
|
---
| GET REGULAR UPDATES
---
| After serving you for 8 years in the Virginia Senate, I know how things really work in Richmond and want to keep you informed.
Please consider donating $25, $50, $100 so that I can continue to communicate with you and help you to engage and interact with your representatives to ensure accountability and transparency.
---

subject: Ilhan Omar admitted that she is a foreign agent
body:
Help Censure Ilhan Omar

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjpjvdf8hv1e4kicuafh68kh6jahem5jv62n52s8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8pr2cph2bs)
---
Friend, **I just introduced a censure resolution against Ilhan Omar.** She was caught on video acting as a foreign agent putting the interests of the country she fled – Somalia – ahead of America. **Her actions are treasonous and she must be held accountable.** I took an oath to defend America against all enemies and I will not stop until we rip out, root and stem, those destroying America from within. [**If you agree with me, add your name to the “Censure Ilhan Omar” petition right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9otcptt5m7meq0bkf4d62q3l9pj2qdoi1hlqej8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8pr2cph2bs) Ilhan Omar embodies the biggest threat America faces: Migrant hordes invading our country with no real desire to assimilate or embrace what it means to be an American. She has no allegiance to America. She hates America, hates our culture, and hates the values that made us the envy of the world. “Immigrants” like Ilhan Omar weaponize Americas’s generosity against us and spit in our faces. People who abuse our system like Ilhan put America Last because they remain more loyal to the violent, corrupt, war-torn countries they fled than to our nation that took them in. _These are not immigrants who love America and come here for a better life. They’re invaders attempting to overthrow our country!_ America deserves better leaders than Ilhan Omar and with your support I can hold her accountable. [**Will you add your name demanding the House of Representatives hold Ilhan Omar accountable?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfbm382fb5ns1f2uta0c1ff8dkgagle9j28fpd3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8pr2cph2bs)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Moment to talk?
body:
I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zverjj93dplvvt4cjalj58v7k1pqi8ru5iqtbedg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or2chh2bs)
---

Friend,

Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfueocg26a0749h6tc0d5jt854jkpo1ojkd5qp2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or2chh2bs "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!")**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjegv43268bolrplrtlsf2rs0ascl7cevhhrrjn0_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or2chh2bs)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.
---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _
---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zveav2ievo7osig6be81jiilrarhdqn72nnsd400_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or2chh2bs)
---
It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5pok60jms4o6i59nuf8c3i7j1qshdfpnfg3rhpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or2chh2bs)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if every single person _reading this today_ could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo0k66rm51dkhaproj51phita25hv6ktkcpm6oio_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or2chh2bs "It would mean a lot to me if every single person reading this today could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG!")**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1olj4i5o7hk901ef5gb4rso1qune9vr5ms89peg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or2chh2bs "Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the strength of OUR movement?")**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkg8r5r1tpj7ggbnk6g0mo5e2up50e3p63dre9vo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or2chh2bs)
---

Friend, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5mqri8e1t81ouoh7143lq26ig1i4v9k4oatiafg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or2chh2bs "I need your help – starting right now. ")**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm47hmjap309phgoi4vl7834m6c819m7u9hsudt8_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or2chh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zom59p79rsocmoj8chgbf432cgd9iql4a7p4hr20_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or2chh2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhi52t77oj45tooifc7sk1pumtqb5np705ctgc18_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or2chh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")

---

---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z41ada9cov44kt9etuujfigdjqmcd50ce8f6ting_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or2chh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. | | | | | | Friend, Since the moment I got off the stage, I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future. Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. "Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!" Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ | | It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu7kb4vmj45p7ljt22e552ktm0f0dmrb06iqdcvo_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or0s9h2bs)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z68k0e306t5o5jrtmnuku0koikvfcap8ts8krsco_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or0s9h2bs)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqg6kqmnjvfjva23aunnqdavshjua22bhl37fomg_rp22sh2s8i6eo33cjhm8or0s9h2bs)**
---

---

But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.orgP.O. name: Conservative Intel
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW3EdddiNc

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW3EdddiNc

Dear
Friend,

In the
annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors-material resources, manpower,
pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in
determining the victors and the vanquished.

However,
as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that
surpasses conventional wisdom-a truth of extraordinary
significance.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the
remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated
by the savior generals-visionary leaders displaying unparalleled
expertise.

Today,
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite
your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian
and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has authored a
groundbreaking eBook-Victory and the Savior Generals-a
captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional
leaders.

You can
secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Inside
its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the
defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity,
contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into
seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict,
rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment
with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is
your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most
influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate
even in the present day.

Claim
your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now
through this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Wishing
you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover
Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyEkTGL4zAQhX-N3DnIkm3FhYuDkC5XLAtXDmNpHIuVZCONE-7fH77swnHNdjN8772BN79ucEMffLr_xEgjZ4ZcIEcoWD8wzd6BkqqtpaqlhqZyY2uU031FY2NkP3S9aVS1jNOg56nT536anW2bqRk6Y6wxbafPw4RY-fHIkUpqObSdVifq9PnsOtUMCq1CK1qJgTKXEy-Uadun4C0mJownu8YqjAvzVoT-IdRVqCtm9jZQOZWImbEU4kMn1PWB6b5jdvWj1LN3FDz_PuZilydOh1tfd45Q1j1bEvqS0aeIH5SF6g8Qyfk9Cn353C3GDf09HdKIADMGC3ZNTInh1dJX9kv_QkJf_oWQMWwLbOuGlhES8XPNH58Wpnwc_A-CVLJRLcLbrX5_e6-_Kqzy6LanD8GX3ohW3iP68Lcl_vaFfwIAAP__Mf2nGw)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyEkT2P2zAMhn-NvDmQKX9l8FAg8JYOhwM6CoxEx8JJskHRzd8v3N4tXW4knpd8gYe_7vaOIYb8_ImJJmGxXCwnW7D-jXkJ3oKGttZQa2Obyk_tAN70FU3NoPtr1w8NVOu0tOMAY09m9AaGpVn0Y2g6N5ie2iv1pgrTeUeDNvradgYu1Jlx9B00V0AH6FSrMRJLuchKTPvxiMFhFsJ0cVuq4rSK7EWZHwpmBXNJyIKlkJxYwcwkgSlRFgXzErKvsV5CxuwCxnqPmDOxMvMhyZbtYEfK3BhDTvhBrKA_QSIfjqTM7XN2mHYMz3xGE1q7YHTWByYnX4kty9lpbv98Fbe-8GEZ477afdvRCdpM8tr443NFiM-K_6DVoBto0b7d6_e39_rLV8WT318hxlD6QbX6mTDEv0rk23_9CQAA__93L57r) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: Hey Peter, can I get minute of your time today for something important?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I'm deeply worried about us
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2e4076b-22c7-4a97-b528-ca059d53fe29/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Hey, Peter, thanks for opening this email. I know a lot is going on, so I appreciate it. It’s a little long, but it’s from the heart, and it’s important. You don’t have to be obsessed with politics or watching the news 24/7 to know our country is in a bad place. Horrific violence in the Middle East. A Republican Party that has gone so far off the rails they could barely elect a Speaker. The leading Republican candidate for president is Donald Trump! And then we have unspeakable atrocities like the mass shooting in Maine because our “leaders” refuse to act. And many people talk about how Trump is a major threat to democracy and he is — but I believe there is an even greater and more long-term threat \- hopelessness. When I was knocking doors for Leaders We Deserve-endorsed candidate Nadarius Clark for the Virginia elections, the most concerning answer I got when I asked if people were voting was, “No, I don’t believe in voting” or “No all politics is corrupt and my vote doesn’t matter.” This scares me because things can never get better if we continue electing people who say “government doesn't work” who then get elected and make it not work. I’m deeply worried about us. And it’s not because I’m anti-America. It’s because I love this country and I desperately want to see us do better. We’re not going to fix this mess overnight. But we do have a plan. A group of us just launched Leaders We Deserve. We started it because we know that young progressive leaders can change the future of this country for the better by giving us what we need most to get through this moment of democratic backsliding, HOPE. We can elect more young leaders like Nadarius Clark, but we can ONLY do it if enough of us get behind them. For us to give the school shooting generation the hope it needs to secure the future of our democracy and build a more perfect union, we must get to work electing the next generation of morally just leaders who put kids first and the NRA out of business. The truth is that young progressive candidates who are running for office face huge barriers. The average age of our elected officials is astronomical. That’s because our election system favors those who are older, wealthy, and white. In 2020, Millennial and Gen-Z individuals only held 21% of State Legislative seats despite representing 45% of the electorate. We launched Leaders We Deserve specifically to coalesce support from millions of Americans who believe in the promise of this younger generation. Here’s our plan:
* Find young progressives who are willing to run for Congress and state legislatures.
* Equip their campaigns with messaging, scheduling, and budget tools they need to win.
* And most importantly, raise funds from our massive national network (hey, that’s you!) to allow them to go toe-to-toe with their opponents and WIN.

Peter, if we succeed, ten years from now we’ll have shifted the politics of this nation dramatically. Young, progressive leaders will make up their fair share of the legislative and congressional seats, allowing us to right the ship and build the future we deserve. But what we do right now will determine whether or not that vision comes to pass. We can’t just muddle along raising a couple hundred thousand dollars here and there. We’ll actually have to raise tens of millions of dollars from grassroots donors like you to get the breadth and scale we need to win in all corners of the country. Here’s what I need from you for our plan to work. – If you are blessed with the financial ability to make a really big donation (like $500 or more), please do so right now to help us make this vision a reality. [Click here if you are fortunate enough to give $500 or more.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc11a1442-ce75-4a77-9fb5-99b5bbd06be7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – If you can give a small donation each month, that makes a big impact too. [Click here if you think you can commit to a $25 monthly donation (or something like that).](https://default.salsalabs.org/T530100d3-de1b-4344-8aae-73c486edf732/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – If you can’t give big and you can’t give monthly, that’s totally OK (most people can’t). [Click here to just give a one time donation of whatever you can afford.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90f85e98-c100-4fcc-a541-af9ab89cf65e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) – Last but not least, if you can’t chip in at all, I completely understand. All I ask is that you forward this email to three friends who might be aligned with our cause. I hope this fundraiser is as successful as I know it can be. I hope that we look back at this moment in ten years and say THIS is when everything started to change. If you have any questions at all about Leaders We Deserve, please check out our website or get in touch with us on social media. From the bottom of my heart, thank you for reading today. \- David Hogg
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T47617337-9e37-41ea-9300-972473cb1503/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tbknf8Ct59RjWV1YZSCQfw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnoKa6P0TBaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvcmVsaWdpb3VzLWxpYmVydHktc3VydmV5Lz91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cmVsaWdpb3VzbGliZXJ0eXN1cnZleSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtVUNOLTIwMjQwMjAzJnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMDRFUDAwMVcDc3BjQgplum0ZvmWNqC4_UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tbknf8Ct59RjWV1YZSCQfw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnoKa6P0TBaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvcmVsaWdpb3VzLWxpYmVydHktc3VydmV5Lz91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cmVsaWdpb3VzbGliZXJ0eXN1cnZleSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtVUNOLTIwMjQwMjAzJnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMDRFUDAwMVcDc3BjQgplum0ZvmWNqC4_UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tbknf8Ct59RjWV1YZSCQfw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnoKa6P0TBaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvcmVsaWdpb3VzLWxpYmVydHktc3VydmV5Lz91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cmVsaWdpb3VzbGliZXJ0eXN1cnZleSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtVUNOLTIwMjQwMjAzJnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMDRFUDAwMVcDc3BjQgplum0ZvmWNqC4_UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/tbknf8Ct59RjWV1YZSCQfw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnoKa6P0TBaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvcmVsaWdpb3VzLWxpYmVydHktc3VydmV5Lz91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cmVsaWdpb3VzbGliZXJ0eXN1cnZleSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9UEEtVUNOLTIwMjQwMjAzJnNvdXJjZV9jb2RlPUFDSTIzMDRFUDAwMVcDc3BjQgplum0ZvmWNqC4_UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm at my wits' end

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---

clean_body: I'm at my wits' end | | | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend. Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again. Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6. I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can. | ~~ "STAND WITH RYAN" So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. ~~ "If you chip in just $5 right now," I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation. # Saturday, February 3, 2024
---|---
**Welcome to the weekend!** On this day in 1959, musician Buddy Holly died in a plane crash. Bad weather forced [a small plane down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOpDAQBb_GZI1MYzAEDi4hm0svRMZuxn3yYGR7B_H3q9l40_dUUqn-PdaH5cjH8699kal7Wq2r_KYVoQdUq2q82YmQ-oZMp-U4azko3QRje9e5WUtPbp6933GQ09DrSXdqJ9ePDRuUqCTKvpODlkPrnUZUk7WDxJHUJJQkzzXl9n_iowba453elFuXXk00odaziP6PwEXgcl1X67Zy0FU-v8DFU82Jq8DlMwpcauAC3t7ABwQuNeUbti_vbwgpxhsyVxeY4G0jHQVqINj4CVs6T8rgmT5gNw8znNEeBC7bEgQuTTb-vDhGLqMWSj5fluOPZP2t2HcAAAD__--Sblw) with Holly, Ritchie Valens, and "The Big Bopper" J.P. Richardson Jr. all on board. The day became known as "The Day the Music Died" after Don McLean immortalized the incident in his song _American Pie_. We love hearing from our readers! Give us a shout if you have any feedback for _The Flyover_ --just hit reply. Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FuszAQAOCnsbeg43zGMHj4pYjpp2tHZPAB1xocETdV376qOjb7t3yvwzgESXKsL2FnX5Y8hrnIg0e8mAvSSDr6hRnZaPa1g6ZzYMnpzS-hM1NHSMHhZCLZbor1BM6GtmvaFrR4BCRAMDVYB7aKs0OkNgQL2DC1ioCjlHxWb1mOsvGSvvKDz2rOu05-K-V2V-afwl5h_5co7IewyvxfjvcfY3pW5hpvn5KS3BunCNY9SPq1zUfZlbkS6NM_N7o8-38HAAD__-OLWgo). Does it take you hours to fall asleep? [NativePath](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhDAQRL9m6UDLrrFJ4SISortUJ6VEC7YPR9xhgXNR_j5ylDLNjEYzxdO8X6aLxC0-bm9y9zaHfZIlx6efqOaa1KQqZ4P35LnytjWoXwx2ylSrDbMyWqM4IS04axcML16ox4DsNFXREpJCQm6xM9g1bjFEqhfpkLRXPSj0Lub9aD72-MirD9v3_vRHs-z3arNrzukEfgUagcYwNw8pZEnyWhZA4-GKNGlNwOMZHfDQck9AOn3OwAMp7AwD6aUt6Y-mvo4hHmeuW0IsJQEPxRl4uI7VYV36itsWT21A4e0ucftFyv_98xMAAP__SV1fCQ) wants to help.

## U.S. Warplanes Strike Targets in Middle East
[U.S. forces](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPozAQhX-N6YyGwcakcHGNu1x7JZrgIZmTwRF2gvLvV6y03TZPr_ik9_T9u05XkiTb_S-t7OuSJ5qrvHlC3Ws0k2miX5iR-4Z952C4OLDGNQ8fB7tYAodjvxg7k41oabGdGW8MwyU24hHQAELfgXVg2zg7RDMSWcCBzagMcJSa9_Z_lq0-eEmf_Oa9nfPaJP-o9VlU_0dhUBiO42hfhWqO9DkBhaHUvH8Uho2PojA8c5Iq81nPYYUB8CdeRd_yeitadtr0KidJRa8SY2LNVKrC4NB0aLoLgFMYmt3H5yEpSRmcMnBfSdL3tfqbp68AAAD__-wUZhM) struck at least 85 Iranian targets in Iraq and Syria on Friday. President Biden ordered the strikes in retaliation to the drone attack in Jordan that killed 3 American soldiers, although the administration has emphasized that it doesn't want open conflict with Iran. [Both manned and unmanned aircraft](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1yszAQAJ8GOjHnQ_wVKr7Gnb82JXOWDnOJQIxOMcnbZ5w67W6zs2-3-UYSZX_8p41dWdJMvsiTZzStQTvbOriFGbmt2V0G6KcBOjvUq7vT1NPi-5YmhBEu43304K2ffGiXaZxqcQhoAaG9QDdA1wQ_INqRqAPs2Y6VBQ5SUm7ek-xl5SV-pyfnxqetjm4t5dCq_VfhtcLreZ7Nkr52PvXlXyTlGCq8fqq580N2NZuEENkwaTEkWUuWD1aTWY-0K5vAVFY1Zc3MRlMMwlnr7MJxSoyi_VBZeGwk8Teh_PXjJwAA__9q9WQt) attacked command and control centers and munitions dumps used by Iran's _Islamic Revolutionary Guards_ and affiliated militia groups. This is the first substantial response by the Biden administration after [more than 160 attacks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOqzAQRb_GdEbDYDApXLyGLq_dEk3sIczG4Mj2Bu3fr7L1dle60tHR-bguV5Iox_0_7ezqmhbyVV68oO41msU0wa3MyH3DrrMwXiwMxjab6y4AFsZhGgeiHrjzlteO1tvIt8mjbcQhoAGEvoPBwtAGbxHNRDQAjmwmZYCD1JTbzyRH3XiN3-nFufVpb6Lban0W1f9TOCucz_Ns_a0cfJb3r3B-T4XzV9GlZnlw0ZkrRaHKOuR0sKZayT_0Q2LkoOuWmTXtnMXToUuKQTi_EU124XlKjFJGqwzcd5L4a1H_SvITAAD__ywgZFA) on U.S. positions in the region.
## Carl Weathers Dead at 76
Actor Carl Weathers [died in his sleep](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyqzAQRb8GOjHLSiBTqHgNnV-bklmktdlESB6hmPHfZ5w63b1zmjPn47pcSaKk-3_a2dVbXshXefKCSis0i2mDuzEj65Zdb2GcLAzGtpuzZrV6Ao3a9HwZfYBpZRgA1zBOejKtOAQ0gKB7GCwMXfAW0VyIBsCRzaUxwEFqLt1nllQ3vsVXfnLpfN7b6LZaH0ej_zU4Nzif59ml1Sc-jzdvcH7PBue8Sv2mIvw-nkpUJ1PduByKHjnGrHxhDqpk__VSO6VAMRehpI5KRQXhQ9lRFZ-o1xZ03xYXHqfEKMdoGwP3nST-OtW_Av0EAAD__-kNZ2o) on Thursday. His family released a statement saying that he "died peacefully at home," but no cause of death was given. Weathers was [most famous](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtuwzAMAL_G3hxQ1HvQ0CVbunY0aJGOVShxIAsJ-vdFOnc83HDAfV3mC5Va7tdPuknq6z5T7uUpM056QjObkdMqgqJHScqDix6s8eOWtCwRF2avQog5xyxsjRhH2jFoCmNJCGgAQSuwHuyJs0c0gcgCOjFhMCBc-t5O33u5903W-rM_pZ3yfhtr2np_HIP-GPA84Jked3kdb_WG1kuuMuA5U6vTS6hv0o6JhXjSzDoswVCGxbEKLHGNGS1hWJSKYWyJH69SazmcHwxcb1TqX7P_N-A3AAD__7nQWpM) for his role as Apollo Creed in the Rocky series, and he appeared in a slew of other successful films and TV shows--including _Predator_ , _Happy Gilmore_ , _Arrested Development_ , and _The Mandalorian_. After playing football at San Diego State and a brief stint in the NFL, he completed his B.A. in drama at San Francisco University and landed his first credited role in _Good Times_. Weathers is survived by his two sons.
## NFL Team Asks for Stolen Money Back
The Jacksonville Jaguars are asking FanDuel, an online sports betting platform, to return some or all of the [$20 million stolen and gambled away](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1ugzAURp_GbBeZi8FkYGik0imVOnVEDr4Gp_5BxgTx9lU6d_z06UhH5_s23pR1NsyfylOfTRzVlO2TRoQaUIyi0L0hQqoL6ivJ24vkjZDF0t-NqJpmorsUWhm8cGomM7UTYic7zS-F7ZGj4MjrijeSN6WeJKLolGo4tiQ6Jjhpm2MqH9GGvJBxZ3xSKqfoC9cvOa8bq98YDgyH4zhKv4XXx3CgAPvGcPAx0MlwCHS85kPNu0obqO0HjAp6Jwc5QqK8pwBbjo4CIAdvnbMxwKFmSqThfoKJyVMC8quLJxHDQSW4Xqvl42t9L1Kv1-MFba1kgs9eWfenmf9r9hsAAP__z-JvBw) by former employee Amit Patel. Patel served as a finance manager for the Jaguars and embezzled a total of $22 million [over four years](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyhCAQQL9GOxxYV_AKijTXXdqUDifryQVcB_Ay_n3mUqd-r3jzvm7TzYUYtsenS2TrwpOba3jRBKIXgBO23i5EQH1LVhmpL0YOaNrVeo-gUc3qjvMdDaoRjVRuvpD3_qLvbbAgASXIXsnByKHzswHA0blBgiYcG5TkQ-XcPTlsdaUlnvyi3M2c2mjXWvfS9B8NXBu4lp1zLd3pVua30MD16R6Hy0VkejPy8RSufJMXi9v8QVFUFpnqkTdRKkfaBMgklsxJLJwTZUFpj3wSCVBSg1Z67NaaYput339CjKFo06B8JBfiX1X9b9FvAAAA___bv2lv) through the company's virtual credit card system. [He pleaded guilty](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu4yAQAL8Gd1h4WRunoLiGLtdeaW3MkpDDYBkSK39_ytWvHE0zmj_X5UoxxXz_TRvbFspCa4tvXkBqCbhg521gBtYd28Go6WLUiKZ72HUlhWYmogHnKQTgGY2mS7iNZG5ed9GCAlSg9KBGo8berwYAZ6JRwcQ4C1TsYytH_ywxtweH9ClvPvq1bF2yj9b2KvQvAU6AO8-z57rnrxTgckgCXG3l-AhwiwAXvQCnL4g4oBbgnrT-rSW_Y0osn3R_0VFloOxfnCRtscmdGidZW0mc5RZTiiXX7rB-P79QJyNQ3TeK6X9R-2nPvwAAAP__W9xm2Q) to one count of wire fraud and one count of engaging in an illegal monetary transaction last December, and he could receive up to 30 years in prison when sentenced in March.

clean_body: struck at least 85 Iranian targets in Iraq and Syria on Friday. President Biden ordered the strikes in retaliation to the drone attack in Jordan that killed 3 American soldiers, although the administration has emphasized that it doesn't want open conflict with Iran. | | | | | | Saturday, February 3, 2024 ---|--- Welcome to the weekend! On this day in 1959, musician Buddy Holly died in a plane crash. Bad weather forced with Holly, Ritchie Valens, and "The Big Bopper" J.P. Richardson Jr. all on board. The day became known as "The Day the Music Died" after Don McLean immortalized the incident in his song American Pie. We love hearing from our readers! Give us a shout if you have any feedback for The Flyover --just hit reply. Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Does it take you hours to fall asleep? wants to help. | U.S. Warplanes Strike Targets in Middle East struck at least 85 Iranian targets in Iraq and Syria on Friday. President Biden ordered the strikes in retaliation to the drone attack in Jordan that killed 3 American soldiers, although the administration has emphasized that it doesn't want open conflict with Iran. attacked command and control centers and munitions dumps used by Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guards and affiliated militia groups. This is the first substantial response by the Biden administration after on U.S. positions in the region. Carl Weathers Dead at 76 Actor Carl Weathers on Thursday. His family released a statement saying that he "died peacefully at home," but no cause of death was given. Weathers was for his role as Apollo Creed in the Rocky series, and he appeared in a slew of other successful films and TV shows--including Predator , Happy Gilmore , Arrested Development , and The Mandalorian. After playing football at San Diego State and a brief stint in the NFL, he completed his B.A. in drama at San Francisco University and landed his first credited role in Good Times. Weathers is survived by his two sons. NFL Team Asks for Stolen Money Back The Jacksonville Jaguars are asking FanDuel, an online sports betting platform, to return some or all of the by former employee Amit Patel. Patel served as a finance manager for the Jaguars and embezzled a total of $22 million through the company's virtual credit card system. to one count of wire fraud and one count of engaging in an illegal monetary transaction last December, and he could receive up to 30 years in prison when sentenced in March. Enjoy reading The Flyover? mailto:?cc=editor@jointheflyover.com&subject=My%20new%20favorite%20newsletter!&body=Hey!%0D%0A%0D%0AI%E2%80%99ve%20been%20reading%20a%20new%20newsletter%20every%20morning%20called%20The%20Flyover.%20I%20love%20it!%20I%20think%20you%27ll%20love%20it%20too.%0D%0A%0D%0AIt%E2%80%99s%20my%20new%20favorite%20source%20for%20news%20first%20thing%20in%20the%20morning.%20They%20cover%20important%20and%20interesting%20stories%E2%80%94usually%20politics%2C%20sports%2C%20finance%2C%20science%20%26%20tech%2C%20etc.%0D%0A%0D%0AI%20think%20you%20should%20give%20it%20a%20try.%0D%0A%0D%0AJust%20copy%20this%20link%20and%20paste%20it%20into%20your%20browser%3A%20https%3A%2F%2Fjointheflyover.com%2F%3Futm%3D83%0D%0A%0D%0ALet%20me%20know%20if%20you%20like%20it.%20I%20think%20you%20will!%0D%0A to share with your friends and family. | ➤**Former President Trump met with officials and members of the Teamsters Union this week in an attempt to reaffirm his support among America's blue-collar workers. Trump described the meeting as "very productive." () ➤****President Biden and First Lady Jill Biden were present for the arrival of dead American service members at Dover Air Force Base Friday. Prior to the ceremony, the Bidens spent time with the families of the three soldiers killed in a drone attack in Jordan. () ➤ A measure to enshrine abortion into Maine's constitution has been advanced to the state's senate, where it is expected to face opposition. The Democrat-backed proposal cleared the committee with a party-line vote of 6-5. () ➤ In a first for Nevada Republicans, the state's GOP will hold both a primary election and a caucus. A 2021 state law mandated a primary must be held, but only the caucus will assign delegates. () | Flying together with: It turns out, not getting deep sleep could take years off your life, but medications aren't the answer. A groundbreaking 2023 report found that of those getting a good night's sleep, without the use of sleeping medications, life expectancy was 4.7 years greater for men, and 2.4 years greater for women! Big pharma HATES these kinds of studies, which is likely why you haven't heard about it... And unfortunately, the length of your life isn't the only thing on the line... Not getting adequate sleep has been linked with: Memory loss Mood changes Weakened immune system High blood pressure Weight gain Low sex drive Increased risk of chronic disease Loss of balance and coordination Luckily, there 's a better way to get uninterrupted sleep: | ➤ A battle for position after a missed shot turned violent when New Mexico State forward Robert Carpenter punched Liberty player Shiloh Robinson in the face. Carpenter was ejected from the game, and New Mexico State won in overtime. () ➤ A torn meniscus will keep Philadelphia 76ers all-star Joel Embiid off the court for an extended period of time. Before the injury, Embiid was averaging a league-high 35.3 points, 11.3 rebounds, and 5.7 assists per game. () ➤ The Los Angeles Rams have elevated linebackers coach Chris Shula to the defensive coordinator position left vacant when Raheem Morris became the Atlanta Falcons head coach. Shula is the grandson of the NFL's winningest coach, Don Shula. () ➤ Bill Walton, NBA hall-of-famer and seven-footer, revealed he once auditioned for the role of "Chewbacca" in the "Star Wars" franchise. Walton said producers rejected his acting but modeled the character after him. () | Flying together with our sponsor Sleep-supportive nutrients are the best of both worlds - they're effective, easy to incorporate into your daily routine, and most importantly - safe. No morning grogginess or weird dreams like you get with over-the-counter sleep aids. No concerns of long term damage or reliance from pills and "drowsy" meds. If you 're ready for deep, uninterrupted, restorative sleep without the hassle... | Ladies and Gentlemen: the most-clicked stories of the week. Enjoy! ➤Budweiser is working to restore its brand's image after the Dylan Mulvaney marketing fiasco--starting with a Clydesdale Super Bowl commercial called Old School Delivery. () ➤What's funnier than a cat slipping around on ice? Not much, according to Flyover readers this week. () ➤Thrillist Travel ranked the most beautiful states in America, and it had the gall to put the great Flyover state of Iowa dead last. () | ➤ Carter Dallas, a 2-year-old from Glasgow, Scotland, became the youngest person to reach Mount Everest's base camp, beating the previous record held by a 4-year-old from the Czech Republic. Carter completed the 17,598-foot climb harnessed to his father Ross. () ➤ Wheel of Fortune viewers are divided about whether or not contestant Megan Carvale correctly guessed a $40,000 final round puzzle. Carvale went on Good Morning America to settle the debate. () ➤ Social media influencer Matthew Ables successfully used 46-year-old Disneyland tickets with no expiration date to enter Disney World. The tickets cost $8 in 1978. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=846b53b9250f49d0b7a05ec7471b42c9&_e=ztY7_uEjTisFyqlCijF7R-eVcaq56zXVtS19eUSgCMyi1_gCYfC9nSUZHiLaIgT3LUzKtME0t0I7LGO5y07JqYf4DGE7PnNaSzmDLe3m7IKN80mRuPDzl1gDdNUtCfvpBmAh0psvb4JIBdE1SEY08uWMIuSXu5fqIO2vA_kOIoLF6KoN2LEcxrVOwOoZ1ibFtC1ruMtSIPpsxMRcqDWOuiCN__iUrtn8DDfzNHFh80SY83kP9fT8X0-TFXQyHPImgLC8zcPnsbZ9MEudP-vOyFzLtjB-i0Wjq1yfl0Zn_Hjoo98HukZDSkPv6tAqb_I3fy1sElHfm1tWOKHAlHFWmICVBbrlNS_mMlO97Cjy0wCFS4x7RyrqF4pTzXc2XJBtvB8g3MpFPxDMqdWiGQccMPq7K9EisRO0xS92zKsf6A_zECh4M3BOuLNl_paRzMzzaCCBUROA9gLK7wGNZP2ZWYkPnJs2UjKo0TGWY-BZiiBcQYlpM3ieuy1oK3N6YsbMRgu3MRVG0AhU8D6Ec9FV9A%3D%3D)
Mike Pompeo reviewed your response to the **[Voter Verification Questionnaire,](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=846b53b9250f49d0b7a05ec7471b42c9&_e=ztY7_uEjTisFyqlCijF7R-eVcaq56zXVtS19eUSgCMyi1_gCYfC9nSUZHiLaIgT3LUzKtME0t0I7LGO5y07JqYf4DGE7PnNaSzmDLe3m7IKN80mRuPDzl1gDdNUtCfvpBmAh0psvb4JIBdE1SEY08uWMIuSXu5fqIO2vA_kOIoLF6KoN2LEcxrVOwOoZ1ibFtC1ruMtSIPpsxMRcqDWOuiCN__iUrtn8DDfzNHFh80SY83kP9fT8X0-TFXQyHPImgLC8zcPnsbZ9MEudP-vOyFzLtjB-i0Wjq1yfl0Zn_Hjoo98HukZDSkPv6tAqb_I3fy1sElHfm1tWOKHAlHFWmICVBbrlNS_mMlO97Cjy0wCFS4x7RyrqF4pTzXc2XJBtWDc79erbbrFx6g42CrwJn7Z-mVTZO9W5ShhCjtiWlyM7Rxr77_9Jkx_5W1QGpI1VGlX9jiSZsoSpmQsdkk7m2HyWw40wC3ikNnivjM_FhnkGdQMIcfDlmI0nzV--Odz0P2MDLEWoD4_L7Fo79eA1lg%3D%3D)** and he was impressed.

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: World War II as you've never seen it before
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history,

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a6aa214ecb144a68b660ce9fb168102&_e=KEMAccVM0a-gKKk2AxJjfyLPe8oJ5TbTgYJEhuLmmqtY733vVGhowFHzlmAfK9s6d0uYakpOOB0_mIp5q_ycxJAtzFtocEIq31e9LvCt2MrsLYAhAwTFbtP9IIdpyYnmKrlU_HtG94bvQQUjl4yLt2ywb6Xwx7k4OrkIAwRO3iZAQReLun39I_o3bJ10_QgB83PoR0Ve-uoFY8cir-vJvnr3QRq_pW6etDRyUNRZbJpVix_lH01v3XZJpjwNCX_vBZTVBmHCF3Gg4TDQM9QNhzQO8JiLzZnDSxRoi2VZ6FaMmEWroQMXnAqfQR49LC40oFiQVRWE-0cO6LUP2WjeXxd7A_KRYwLCj-40UtX33bb9IMz-znYqGcxs7jRZ3YJSRepJgkUKtIcj16_q_Ik_l6IWscx7hJdA54o8Hl3q7Ws%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a6aa214ecb144a68b660ce9fb168102&_e=KEMAccVM0a-gKKk2AxJjfyLPe8oJ5TbTgYJEhuLmmqtY733vVGhowFHzlmAfK9s6d0uYakpOOB0_mIp5q_ycxJAtzFtocEIq31e9LvCt2MrsLYAhAwTFbtP9IIdpyYnmKrlU_HtG94bvQQUjl4yLt2ywb6Xwx7k4OrkIAwRO3iZAQReLun39I_o3bJ10_QgB83PoR0Ve-uoFY8cir-vJvnr3QRq_pW6etDRyUNRZbJpVix_lH01v3XZJpjwNCX_vBZTVBmHCF3Gg4TDQM9QNh-EDL17-Euhg4qnhgQ9hp3a7T6RX120O_U3dRBKTLsmWI_hqiRQDLmH5eh0U_C_BbkxT1YgybU9G4uv4OFjtS1Z6exrKkvKT5aXQ5ASJhpTBaye717D1sZrm2oQmoc1No-9MrwpwCX6_NLKaeAX9UgE%3D) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a6aa214ecb144a68b660ce9fb168102&_e=KEMAccVM0a-gKKk2AxJjfyLPe8oJ5TbTgYJEhuLmmqtY733vVGhowFHzlmAfK9s6d0uYakpOOB0_mIp5q_ycxJAtzFtocEIq31e9LvCt2MrsLYAhAwTFbtP9IIdpyYnmKrlU_HtG94bvQQUjl4yLt2ywb6Xwx7k4OrkIAwRO3iZAQReLun39I_o3bJ10_QgB83PoR0Ve-uoFY8cir-vJvnr3QRq_pW6etDRyUNRZbJpVix_lH01v3XZJpjwNCX_vBZTVBmHCF3Gg4TDQM9QNh2iobFwzoxm9xnH3rRkkKkf1w_CZOVKpO3uMn0FOy4Ml19K_85j2C8cQfCUs9CJ4st9NIjymVx331BqgGrXUWq79lBA9PwER5PWSEm1Z7YiJjjSAXRhuS5vlmM3fdBhUyDfLQDxIIrnvylRDPBbURvU%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history,

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=326096dd9a674883ba962bb8ba350849&_e=udm0ZKrlkCO7fhy9-RVWS_UuSw3aQoMlyU5FbF4r9nAlSjfu2eygOLYPy4CapKqGtSdgT4u4t-qWsQWBjEMONs5tKIVMibpiaRXFz0phA46tk00YJa8hNoLX6HYqvV2okj4t2fUaMJTllJiYBuF05woF05FHozrRP5sWhKB3zRLc5gilxJas98Eum9ibzfVwNz2ukKApmjvPWmWsUDX_o4_p7YZWDEnCsY_h0OhQ8ABe1oJBMfmxEPWiucQLswXRdtAIipNzsKRSMmhQIzpsK9wYe8xlI-OLiCWClLajDD1wdWamuikGh8QgA5Mx5YTx-CrK5YDcLC9Ukm2gxBVPbcTMFdI6L9_idI-xuBtuKmNWkHT8qAdOPb4tu0MiLbcJINhjmrYRB3EYOPw38IjUvYWyMGtGu5RhZbm3EIVPAaI%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.”
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=326096dd9a674883ba962bb8ba350849&_e=udm0ZKrlkCO7fhy9-RVWS_UuSw3aQoMlyU5FbF4r9nAlSjfu2eygOLYPy4CapKqGtSdgT4u4t-qWsQWBjEMONs5tKIVMibpiaRXFz0phA46tk00YJa8hNoLX6HYqvV2okj4t2fUaMJTllJiYBuF05woF05FHozrRP5sWhKB3zRLc5gilxJas98Eum9ibzfVwNz2ukKApmjvPWmWsUDX_o4_p7YZWDEnCsY_h0OhQ8ABe1oJBMfmxEPWiucQLswXRdtAIipNzsKRSMmhQIzpsK8eFavZtXVl9wutUjd1w397XIJNRtgOOw_jbpw-6vT-scj51WNImRFnILeGjH5cfz5hqoQ7rpeWESCZTuTVKb2ZvVGhgH-IgS7N9ANIG7IvmuUr22oh1iQ1xRk8_YLmLVMg5xMT0_KD3xcNEEMAE2eY%3D) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=326096dd9a674883ba962bb8ba350849&_e=udm0ZKrlkCO7fhy9-RVWS_UuSw3aQoMlyU5FbF4r9nAlSjfu2eygOLYPy4CapKqGtSdgT4u4t-qWsQWBjEMONs5tKIVMibpiaRXFz0phA46tk00YJa8hNoLX6HYqvV2okj4t2fUaMJTllJiYBuF05woF05FHozrRP5sWhKB3zRLc5gilxJas98Eum9ibzfVwNz2ukKApmjvPWmWsUDX_o4_p7YZWDEnCsY_h0OhQ8ABe1oJBMfmxEPWiucQLswXRdtAIipNzsKRSMmhQIzpsK_hvnHrEdge_2bMGJVuP1l_QXy5C78SftTzbyZJ4IjbU3LVX7LBkDX98D2hsODCwJ5QZN4mMoEsiYVDNV_D3O-cVTA_cbB0unIu4lAvuMC-MCuqNEc8XKCeGqdziFsW_L3CujMg1Tyd0x2O7gwLOEac%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
