name: Emily Hall
subject: Here’s how you can help a missionary today
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWM07WdiNI

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWM07WdiNI

Dear
Fellow Believer,

There are
so many challenges that missionaries face today:

Language.
Culture. Customs. Finances. Housing. Visas. Homesickness.

But at
the top of every missionary's list when asked how to help is the
need for prayer.

"Please
pray for us!" is the plea of missionaries all over the world.

That's
because they recognize it is only through God's power that they
can overcome the obstacles they face and break through darkness
with the light of the gospel.

Praying
for missionaries is one of the best things we can do-not just for
their sakes, but for ours. When we pray for missionaries, our
thoughts are focused on the spiritual needs of people groups all
over the world, and our hearts are aligned with God's desire to
give them abundant life.

I'm
hoping that by doing so, it will ignite a desire to make it an
ongoing habit.

If you
can spare a few moments each day for one week to lift up the
needs of men and women who are bringing the gospel to unreached
areas, we would be so grateful!

For the
next seven days, we'll send you an email telling you about
specific missionaries to pray for and the ministry they are
doing. Will you help in this way?

If so, go
here to start receiving prayer requests in your inbox for the
next seven days:
https://welcome.imb.org/pray_for_missionary_lp.html

On behalf
of the missionaries that you will be praying for this week, thank
you! Your prayers are more valuable than you might realize!

God bless
you,

Emily
Hall
Prayer
Content Specialist
IMB
Prayer Office

International Mission Board | 3806 Monument Ave. Richmond, VA
23230 | (804) 353-0515

body:
Our mission is clear >>>

| [](http://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkbFu2zAQhp-G2mhQR1qyBg2BLQFOkCZQ3GYkWPLkXCJKBEnVr1-4sIduWT_cf_ju_vdn_Wxoovn8w3hsv2zUMWmb9OeaMlnkECJpEKC4AC6kLgvXusZWpiqwLWtRNZVsVFl8tGMpmsaNVmzL3SiqnalHbAChdlDXagcFtdc9AoQsS7VV9WbbyJ1CZUsQYJzdMiXMhDFvvhCDXeZzxJQihvX3RNbMG7v4Ymo_cg6JyQcGPYM-oV0jbi40R3TXCQb9J3l-9x-XyNfEE84mI4M-X5YQaYmUCRMPhkcm-2SZPNzkQD8-_nw7Hfed7jr9-qBP7y_8dTi-DMfTsXvTQ_dLP-0HBtWavc7X5NN-4PfTbjwta7TI5CHinxvy6Gj1TB7QG5pu0BofDJ1nJg__mRWxdeFC00SpqpkS52vm3wPyd0r6GwAA__8BBpc4)

---

Fellow Conservative,

Our race has changed quite a bit, but my priorities for 2024 haven’t changed at all. I’m laser-focused on:

1. **Stopping Chuck Schumer from interfering in West Virginia.**
2. **Helping Republicans across the Country win in crucial battleground states.**

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Friend, It’s no secret that our economy is in shambles.

At fault, more than anything, is our addiction to printing money. We need sound fiscal policies to get back on the right track and we need them now. The New York Sun, one of my favorite newspapers, is leading the charge in the press.
---
| | [Join the Sun For 1¢ →](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9JdqRARYy53ar6qeDt2nUQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnoLzCP0SjaHR0cHM6Ly9weGwuaXN0L2duc29meWNjcWg_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1BRSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1LdWRsb3ctUFBEJnZlbmRvcl9uYW1lPUFFJnZlbmRvcl9jYW1wYWlnbj1LdWRsb3ctUFBEJnZlbmRvcl9jcmVhdGl2ZT1LdWRsb3ctUFBEJnNyYz1ST040NjEzMVcDc3BjQgpluqAnvmVxYzATUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | In a recent and exclusive column in the Sun, I wrote:
With the right tax incentives, more people working to produce more goods, and holding the gold-commodity value of the dollar stable, we’ll get lower inflation with faster economic growth. The Sun is the one paper in America that has fought steadfastly for these sound common-sense principles. It has done so since it was founded all the way back in 1833. It’s a paper that always places principle over politics and people over party. And what principles? American principles. Constitutionalism, sound money, small government, traditional values, sensible foreign policy, and a distaste for corruption and political overreach in all forms. Simply put, the Sun is a national treasure. I’ve been inspired by its rapid reemergence since it burst back on the scene a little while ago. Which is why I’m asking you to consider joining me and the Sun at this time.

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Dear Friend, It’s no secret that our economy is in shambles.

At fault, more than anything, is our addiction to printing money. We need sound fiscal policies to get back on the right track and we need them now. The New York Sun, one of my favorite newspapers, is leading the charge in the press.
---
| | [Join the Sun For 1¢ →](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aUI-7r_9jLSbBrsNydFj1A~~/AARclAA~/RgRnoL3QP0SjaHR0cHM6Ly9weGwuaXN0L2duc29meWNjcWg_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1BRSZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1LdWRsb3ctUFBEJnZlbmRvcl9uYW1lPUFFJnZlbmRvcl9jYW1wYWlnbj1LdWRsb3ctUFBEJnZlbmRvcl9jcmVhdGl2ZT1LdWRsb3ctUFBEJnNyYz1ST040NjEzMVcDc3BjQgpluqAnvmWrL9SFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
| | In a recent and exclusive column in the Sun, I wrote:
With the right tax incentives, more people working to produce more goods, and holding the gold-commodity value of the dollar stable, we’ll get lower inflation with faster economic growth. The Sun is the one paper in America that has fought steadfastly for these sound common-sense principles. It has done so since it was founded all the way back in 1833. It’s a paper that always places principle over politics and people over party. And what principles? American principles. Constitutionalism, sound money, small government, traditional values, sensible foreign policy, and a distaste for corruption and political overreach in all forms. Simply put, the Sun is a national treasure. I’ve been inspired by its rapid reemergence since it burst back on the scene a little while ago. Which is why I’m asking you to consider joining me and the Sun at this time.

body:
And Supreme Court Declines To Block West Point’s Race-Based Admissions Program

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683589%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jQVFGN2cGsgJJ7Nv6rC8Tw&sysid=1 WHO Quietly Admits There’s No Solid Scientific Backing For Giving Children ‘Gender Affirming Care’

The World Health Organization (WHO) announced that it would not be issuing recommendations on “gender affirming care” for children or adolescents, citing the lack of scientific literature addressing it. The WHO is in the process of developing guidelines for the “health of trans and gender diverse people,” but has declined to extend those guidelines to people under the age of 20,

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9EZW1vY3JhdHMtRG9udC1DYXJlXzIwMjQwMjAyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9RGVtb2NyYXRzLURvbnQtQ2FyZSZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD00OSJ9/LUI5MYZV5Q6_YxD_Riq9CA)

Fellow Conservative, For three years now the Biden Border Crisis has spiraled out of control. This week, as Senate negotiators gathered behind closed doors to work out a so-called “deal” to address it, I came out swinging at a Capitol press conference.

**This bill is a _STINKING PILE OF CRAP_ that only confirms the Democrats love open borders.**

It will not fix this mess – and it is designed to fail. It will never pass in the House.

I’m fighting for real solutions to address this humanitarian and national security disaster and I’m counting on your help to share my message.

**_[_Rush an emergency contribution today to stand with me >>>_](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9EZW1vY3JhdHMtRG9udC1DYXJlXzIwMjQwMjAyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9RGVtb2NyYXRzLURvbnQtQ2FyZSZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD00OSJ9/B0MHKMAE0uOYOu4A3gu6dQ)_** __**_**

---
This situation at the border is horrific and inhumane.

852 migrants died crossing illegally into our country last year. Thousands upon thousands of children have been brutalized by human traffickers and thousands upon thousands of women have been sexually assaulted. More than 100,000 Americans have died of drug overdoses as Chinese fentanyl floods into our country over the border.

**As I said this week, the Democrats DO NOT GIVE A DAMN.**

_If they did care, they would do something about it!_

We must stop this invasion and protect our homeland. I’m beyond fed up with the Biden administration’s deflections, excuses, and lies. **[Take a stand today in this fight.](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9EZW1vY3JhdHMtRG9udC1DYXJlXzIwMjQwMjAyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9RGVtb2NyYXRzLURvbnQtQ2FyZSZ1dG1fYWdlbmN5PVBHJmFtb3VudD00OSJ9/Eo85K9-FgZVaVZJbgaQTgA)**

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz **_**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1dc048e3cf848429a6e5c0664c20379&_e=73OtW6fZsESyVl-EtOECljqrRjRAVntmKz0jmLcuMhRy94uEfzXtnpsSFUbj7xV8ihdmsKMDYvWHp7VeTJmeVkBrhd3qyoFMEG_gzlZvIWbU96jTHHkJcBc4owCcpUL0SomdqfMOlM3zC7MW4VIxsqaKHYQ4jekksurg9DhrW2zegxMdyUwfqAONVW4BDXX5Cgx_fBp5CmM53glxwQ0ZrVmPSLrSWFx4E-Y8OMohnqjSfnKJwGMM7mUsjuSirbXhD2jnujKDjJka9vKVSVsUBlWvmUq6-h6UPwmaCe7DvbYBtDNluio2KNC7AojUn6GFB1K_WUUQHPr-CK-eZVchqjfZR_DL4UILkmXnB-Fqm2Nn75HWBjNktfkZBoYAh6e_wKgmfZd7cJg9SoQPJ7qUPaxN7x3hTAkoIw85wCA3lb4%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1dc048e3cf848429a6e5c0664c20379&_e=73OtW6fZsESyVl-EtOECljqrRjRAVntmKz0jmLcuMhRy94uEfzXtnpsSFUbj7xV8ihdmsKMDYvWHp7VeTJmeVkBrhd3qyoFMEG_gzlZvIWbU96jTHHkJcBc4owCcpUL0SomdqfMOlM3zC7MW4VIxsqaKHYQ4jekksurg9DhrW2zegxMdyUwfqAONVW4BDXX5Cgx_fBp5CmM53glxwQ0ZrVmPSLrSWFx4E-Y8OMohnqjSfnKJwGMM7mUsjuSirbXhD2jnujKDjJka9vKVSVsUBmbZ4nsoeCu4ZBXKxIXRgGtiWjBCswjYWa2lLnanXiKbjMrzev61Gd2l0mhKsqWA3pJIm0ipwZetY77X0UI08h_7AX_CWi-dBz92qV1Eue6VUj7lIBYoxjONBumQuXPgODXO4GzhwL9XVfAA5ueKtQM%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1dc048e3cf848429a6e5c0664c20379&_e=73OtW6fZsESyVl-EtOECljqrRjRAVntmKz0jmLcuMhRy94uEfzXtnpsSFUbj7xV8ihdmsKMDYvWHp7VeTJmeVkBrhd3qyoFMEG_gzlZvIWbU96jTHHkJcBc4owCcpUL0SomdqfMOlM3zC7MW4VIxsqaKHYQ4jekksurg9DhrW2zegxMdyUwfqAONVW4BDXX5Cgx_fBp5CmM53glxwQ0ZrVmPSLrSWFx4E-Y8OMohnqjSfnKJwGMM7mUsjuSirbXhD2jnujKDjJka9vKVSVsUBqT3_Ak9anqq3LvgcbroEJOYyevj6-sv4DkkLOS9x472l9MbjSoOWb-_PtPdckd_i7vHeAekV4EV9puCCQUvrbFb5uhJa0jgqOuvx8SFyEeLk-x5koAViGq8u6pdueKxd_ho_G_mpUSW45AhCMl7nvw%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a1dc048e3cf848429a6e5c0664c20379&_e=73OtW6fZsESyVl-EtOECljqrRjRAVntmKz0jmLcuMhRy94uEfzXtnpsSFUbj7xV8ihdmsKMDYvWHp7VeTJmeVkBrhd3qyoFMEG_gzlZvIWbU96jTHHkJcBc4owCcpUL0SomdqfMOlM3zC7MW4VIxsqaKHYQ4jekksurg9DhrW2zegxMdyUwfqAONVW4BDXX5Cgx_fBp5CmM53glxwQ0ZrVmPSLrSWFx4E-Y8OMohnqjSfnKJwGMM7mUsjuSirbXhD2jnujKDjJka9vKVSVsUBtkz5F4Y6sjqm37kB9I6czlWwybAHjFsSuX4XmzNLSGf__cYcCrSucZ5gkWoBvctCUPC6b3bOZltDr6H-X-LZgIo8csX5i04vjsa6XNA5qC5NF2FfA0RcTVZ0lRo4ZaqGoKIYGFoX9MG6065ZGnzH1Q%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

clean_body: After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Fellow Conservative,

Our race has changed quite a bit, but my priorities for 2024 haven’t changed at all. I’m laser-focused on:

1. **Stopping Chuck Schumer from interfering in West Virginia.**
2. **Helping Republicans across the Country win in crucial battleground states.**

[**These priorities may seem simple and obvious, but they will take A LOT of work and even more funding to make happen.**](http://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkU2L2zAYhH-NfFPQV2T74MPS2JCFdBdv2j0KVXqdfYNlG0lu6L8vBufQW68PzPAM83kxF4sjTrfvNkATg4nJuGTua8rogIolohFMKMoEZdLwwje6FmXFC2h4yXSty6PixVfjZckrX_HaDZqD0t5xW_uKl9ZV0qtjgc3WwwSTXKijVAetKiVZLWwl-VDzgSgWYVl_jejsFOx9jpj_HCbIxdh85bwkIl-I6IjoErg1wuGBUwR_cHMgortjoE_rYY50TTTBZDMQ0eXHvETc-hASXSyNRHbJEXnalYR5ff3xcT1_a03bmvcXc_18o-_9-a0_X8_th-nbn6a_EKHXHEzegv2FPufsOM1rdEDkKcLvHQXwuAYiTxAsjjt0NiwWbxORp3-8itj45YHjiEmXRLHbltnGFfk_fvkbAAD__3PzkZE)

To reinforce what we already know: _Chuck Schumer and the ultra-rich Washington Liberals have raised tens of millions of dollars to flood battleground states and put Republicans on the defense everywhere._

**But our mission is clear:** Go on the offensive and flip critical battleground states and ensure Schumer’s Washington buddies don’t get anywhere NEAR West Virginia.

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: What chance big change? Update from Mississippi’s conservative voice.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11571651?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**The new legislative session is well underway and as of today almost 3,000 bills have been drafted.** Many more bills are expected to appear ahead of the mid-February deadline.
---
|
---
| Of these thousands of potential new laws, only a few hundred will then emerge from the various committees about a week later. Those that make it that far will then be debated and voted on in each chamber. Bills have to get through that process in both the Senate and House – and avoid the Governor’s veto - in order to become law.

**So, what are the chances that we might actually see some of the big changes that Mississippi needs this session? **

**There will be no shortage of what those in the Capitol call ‘show bills’.** These are laws passed that are essentially declaratory in nature. They sound great, but they are largely inconsequential. ** Think of them as the equivalent of a legislative press release.**

**What Mississippi needs is not showboating, but the sort of significant reforms that will change our state for the better. **Here are three big changes to look out for:

1. **Education Freedom? **

Every year sees a blizzard of education bills. Many of them are important in their own right, but what are the chances that we see some of the game-changing reforms of the kind that are happening in states all around us?
---
|
---
_Education freedom is for everyone..._
| **Last year, Arkansas passed the LEARNS Act, which raised teacher pay to a minimum of $50,000 and established a system of Education Freedom Accounts.** This means that participating families get given an account into with the state government pays 90 percent of the previous year’s average net school aid per student. They are free to use that for tuition, fees, school supplies, tutoring services and more. **Mississippi needs to fund students, not systems. **

I am very excited at the prospect of seeing some substantial changes here in Mississippi.

2\. **Income tax elimination?**

**I was super excited to hear Governor Tate Reeves again identify eliminating the state income tax by 2029 as a top priority.** As he put it, “Eliminating the income tax does not require cutting expenditures or raising taxes in other areas. Rather, it requires that our government lives within its means.”

---
|
---
_100 percent, yes!_
| Massive amounts of inward investment are now flowing into our state. There is a real chance for Mississippi to prosper. **It would be a game-changer for our state if lawmakers seized the moment now to pass legislation to eliminate the income tax before the end of the decade. **Will they?

3. **Action to improve healthcare?**

**A lot of lobbying is going on at the Capitol to expand Medicaid. **There’s never a shortage of those eager to explain why something needs to be paid for with someone else’s money.
---
|
---
| For some on the Left, Medicaid expansion has become a totemic issue. They are no longer debating how more Medicaid money might improve things in practice. They just _feel_ it’s the right thing to do.

**I fear that anyone who sees Medicaid expansion as the only way to improve the health of our state may be disappointed. So, too, will the taxpayer. **

Over a quarter of the state already receives Medicaid benefits, and they often have suboptimal health outcomes. **Moving people off private insurance programs onto Medicaid (which would inevitably happen) is unlikely to improve matters.**

**There is, however, one thing that our lawmakers could do right away that would improve access to healthcare; repeal the intentionally anticompetitive Certificate of Need laws that have hamstrung the healthcare system in our state for a generation.**

Will our lawmakers do the one thing that would be certain to improve access to healthcare? I am hopeful that they will.

**This new legislative session marks the start of Mississippi’s four-year political cycle.** Republicans hold every state-wide office and have large majorities in both the Senate and House. **There could never be a better time to achieve significant change.**

**Political capital, politicians often mistakenly believe, can be banked. In reality it loses value faster than a dollar bill under Joe Biden.** When it comes to political capital, it is more a question of ‘use it or lose it’. Let’s hope our legislature spends their capital to achieve the change we need.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=de3abf74d5&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=5aa16925c0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=5aa16925c0).

name: Team Kennedy
subject: For the People, By the People
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Join Team Kennedy and help make Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. our next President.

|
---
| | | **Join Team Kennedy and help make Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. our next President.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wtp_2_02_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. spent a lifetime battling corruption and, most importantly, fighting for working men and women who don’t have the backing of special interest organizations or globalists.
It's the globalists and special interest orgs who are crushing the Middle Class and Working Poor in America.
And RFK Jr. knows this. And America knows he will be a President who prioritizes each and every American—not for the big-money donors and lobbyists.
RFK Jr. understands too many people today are living lives of desperation and loneliness, and they feel marginalized and taken advantage of. The policies enacted in Washington by our elected officials have zero to do with the Working Poor or the Middle Class.
That's why RFK Jr. left the Democrat Party, the party of his father and his uncles, as they have abandoned the working people.
That’s one reason why he is running.
_RFK, Jr. tells it like it is. His honesty is refreshing. A rarity these days._
And that’s why he is the candidate with the highest favorability rating among all the candidates including the front-runners for the DNC and GOP, leading them by 11 and 10 points, respectively.
He is also the leading candidate among Independents and Americans under 45. As more and more Americans hear his voice, his ideals, and his platform, his popularity continues to grow. He represents the ideals the American people long for—from protecting our Working Poor, expanding the Middle Class, and making the United States the most competitive country in the world.
He will not send our brave men and women to fight never-ending wars sacrificing precious blood and treasure. He will confront the Military Industrial Complex, and the corruption of Deep State actors at the FBI, DOJ, CIA, and NSA.
RFK Jr. will address corporate greed and our corrupt health agencies--NIH, CDC, FDA, and HHS.
He will end the cozy, _special_ relationships between our government and American oligarchs like Blackrock. He will hold Washington accountable to the taxpayers.
He will protect our border and not let the cartels control our immigration.
He has a history of standing up for those who need a voice and winning for them. His grit and determination to fight corruption and the assault on our Bill of Rights needs your support.
To do this, [we need your help](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wtp_2_02_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2) to get RFK Jr. on the ballot in all 50 states. With your support, he will be on each and every ballot and will win in November.
He is up against two political parties that have more in common with one another than most care to admit. The Rs and Ds continue to serve up the same-old, same-old, year in and year out. It's no wonder someone rightly said, "_There's not a dime's worth of difference between the two major political parties._ "
The Ds and Rs will each spend $2 billion dollars to win in November. This is outrageous--and frankly, voters deserve better.
This is a team effort. [Join Team Kennedy with your gift of $10, $25, $50, or $100, whatever you can afford, and we will achieve the goal of having RFK, Jr. on all 50 ballots and become our next President](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wtp_2_02_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=3).

clean_body: Join Team Kennedy and help make Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. our next President. | | | | Join Team Kennedy and help make Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. our next President. | Dear Peter, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. spent a lifetime battling corruption and, most importantly, fighting for working men and women who don’t have the backing of special interest organizations or globalists. It's the globalists and special interest orgs who are crushing the Middle Class and Working Poor in America. And RFK Jr. knows this. And America knows he will be a President who prioritizes each and every American—not for the big-money donors and lobbyists. RFK Jr. understands too many people today are living lives of desperation and loneliness, and they feel marginalized and taken advantage of. The policies enacted in Washington by our elected officials have zero to do with the Working Poor or the Middle Class. That's why RFK Jr. left the Democrat Party, the party of his father and his uncles, as they have abandoned the working people. That’s one reason why he is running. RFK, Jr. tells it like it is. His honesty is refreshing. A rarity these days. And that’s why he is the candidate with the highest favorability rating among all the candidates including the front-runners for the DNC and GOP, leading them by 11 and 10 points, respectively. He is also the leading candidate among Independents and Americans under 45. As more and more Americans hear his voice, his ideals, and his platform, his popularity continues to grow. He represents the ideals the American people long for—from protecting our Working Poor, expanding the Middle Class, and making the United States the most competitive country in the world. He will not send our brave men and women to fight never-ending wars sacrificing precious blood and treasure. He will confront the Military Industrial Complex, and the corruption of Deep State actors at the FBI, DOJ, CIA, and NSA. RFK Jr. will address corporate greed and our corrupt health agencies--NIH, CDC, FDA, and HHS. He will end the cozy, special relationships between our government and American oligarchs like Blackrock. He will hold Washington accountable to the taxpayers. He will protect our border and not let the cartels control our immigration. He has a history of standing up for those who need a voice and winning for them. His grit and determination to fight corruption and the assault on our Bill of Rights needs your support. To do this, to get RFK Jr. on the ballot in all 50 states. With your support, he will be on each and every ballot and will win in November. He is up against two political parties that have more in common with one another than most care to admit. The Rs and Ds continue to serve up the same-old, same-old, year in and year out. It's no wonder someone rightly said, "There's not a dime's worth of difference between the two major political parties. " The Ds and Rs will each spend $2 billion dollars to win in November. This is outrageous--and frankly, voters deserve better. This is a team effort. . Declare your Independence. Join Team Kennedy and help make Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. our next President. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e713cb67b3f4eeaa26c2907e0a5978e&_e=aN31Cd9Q13raiLrFdkNJ3MxO9Q6_-Y9ffVRbNMjmzX2w-G6umVVc3CdVc_Q6oPq0y1nOSrbBXUK_gbJAIGNeXR_67BBiSV5T5UFnkPLbFfoci5lxQsDpJCMR_aldhuKqBCxhcb1v8GDT71QJjY95J5Wx_44Giq8rBbbHUXCqUdQnpKTqhuJdwEju9lIFsJWwAXQ1vrrZbqtHbve6nJQB906yCdY7H--1seLK9HcchXTxiwnRXbvrupzHmDhWCuiZTqOMjkfmdF2XDUA4T8u-9TGBAKvxw8gHTw5_C20DKfhTn0IuGIAR95rxV6LluqgZeYCE--kt2Mb1NCbvH9VlByNlREv2SPsaVYDDgXMCE3XCQriJwN4SFr2oK5eLfT7unLBopgGnHKVViwYLM3qXm1CxlQnBIWCgLHXRRGktlQQ%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e713cb67b3f4eeaa26c2907e0a5978e&_e=aN31Cd9Q13raiLrFdkNJ3MxO9Q6_-Y9ffVRbNMjmzX2w-G6umVVc3CdVc_Q6oPq0y1nOSrbBXUK_gbJAIGNeXR_67BBiSV5T5UFnkPLbFfoci5lxQsDpJCMR_aldhuKqBCxhcb1v8GDT71QJjY95J5Wx_44Giq8rBbbHUXCqUdQnpKTqhuJdwEju9lIFsJWwAXQ1vrrZbqtHbve6nJQB906yCdY7H--1seLK9HcchXTxiwnRXbvrupzHmDhWCuiZTqOMjkfmdF2XDUA4T8u-9RtnKFXKrsXosT3OXAwM3dAWGquuySifOKALp_Q636AtX8LoUGWfB9oK8VoKPwClfb6gijmxuX0gznGUJIq9eyqUCuFNzkCbN2dq7OycwdKZkxIeQ-JmPg8q7h4OTk2A1Zl5DeXsnCuv_nSYlr3sNoU%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e713cb67b3f4eeaa26c2907e0a5978e&_e=aN31Cd9Q13raiLrFdkNJ3MxO9Q6_-Y9ffVRbNMjmzX2w-G6umVVc3CdVc_Q6oPq0y1nOSrbBXUK_gbJAIGNeXR_67BBiSV5T5UFnkPLbFfoci5lxQsDpJCMR_aldhuKqBCxhcb1v8GDT71QJjY95J5Wx_44Giq8rBbbHUXCqUdQnpKTqhuJdwEju9lIFsJWwAXQ1vrrZbqtHbve6nJQB906yCdY7H--1seLK9HcchXTxiwnRXbvrupzHmDhWCuiZTqOMjkfmdF2XDUA4T8u-9Z9IfAGB2SR-XKmf9dg-OWtjzP5Ktxfps1gJ3Yt6RSnbAnhFsZi-yn1VXqHQ-ozMaHS_kH7D33N2T_iZLzl7VjT-zF4Oq7HCpyQmoTPNhyCtJ-NsAg6DZWf6ZdpnAkDdCCxS4QDM0nTEXyPQWdPpuSM%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2e713cb67b3f4eeaa26c2907e0a5978e&_e=aN31Cd9Q13raiLrFdkNJ3MxO9Q6_-Y9ffVRbNMjmzX2w-G6umVVc3CdVc_Q6oPq0y1nOSrbBXUK_gbJAIGNeXR_67BBiSV5T5UFnkPLbFfoci5lxQsDpJCMR_aldhuKqBCxhcb1v8GDT71QJjY95J5Wx_44Giq8rBbbHUXCqUdQnpKTqhuJdwEju9lIFsJWwAXQ1vrrZbqtHbve6nJQB906yCdY7H--1seLK9HcchXTxiwnRXbvrupzHmDhWCuiZTqOMjkfmdF2XDUA4T8u-9RPrbEawgyK7YSHYgXjrNKnOravRbfenXYg6Oc0Sy-Mth84YKKsieqVIYBiwZfFLxzRLWdcL2BsNrh7YLZEOf3BPRsXY35RfPVVUD-4Gn0GcjuMVVVa7a2asOUwQjE49-JeiJqR-cQJ97uVZwL9BdTw%3D)**

| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d0d42aaf8274fe4a37a328a46fd0a5a&_e=0AvA9xrYqdppJTCIcQrHv2HlsLmMffXoDVQwFdQ3vn00QF89i8xZpnPr23Rg59Mecya7kfB9p1lOkwQXY5J9vg26Hdw3uyITU6Sl40GjVHGO7YnZv3H9_VoOBlAjX7DRu5UuGlBKRr65knGCRwA643NLIguQQDrjqo17-yP8yaAyanPWSYgL0QCw567Q5GVSxw-DKTq9_akUG3SqxVRUjuJ9u_ys6FN-d4akYMP2Z9pvbKZKUxP4Pckd3s9Q_ASuvztefGDwlcPYIehwPACkGKaby6GxeS1bZjtqTqTFtNI1M2Ny7F7LbZYKlp7Z4BeCbiPP4ogCWv7weGymRhGnx7GFQYVn0PtxFxv5AvBtBZg6Lqe96whAfkll9ChoqIIeq5aqcPEa30qZFjksKQvQOdxfJNhVJxIgQhTdQlQNI6U%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d0d42aaf8274fe4a37a328a46fd0a5a&_e=0AvA9xrYqdppJTCIcQrHv2HlsLmMffXoDVQwFdQ3vn00QF89i8xZpnPr23Rg59Mecya7kfB9p1lOkwQXY5J9vg26Hdw3uyITU6Sl40GjVHGO7YnZv3H9_VoOBlAjX7DRu5UuGlBKRr65knGCRwA643NLIguQQDrjqo17-yP8yaAyanPWSYgL0QCw567Q5GVSxw-DKTq9_akUG3SqxVRUjuJ9u_ys6FN-d4akYMP2Z9pvbKZKUxP4Pckd3s9Q_ASuvztefGDwlcPYIehwPACkGFYFFlDvYVpRlYuLLLi0DgaqWe1Cx1I06Pv3tcaRHmjw5QDBljZ4_TKTyN9VgDPI5E9YkpB3-TS0TSDQ14oSOPmuuQ_OPfF0jyl4lu6_GTE_AIlHFFpBjdnQvNsE5YFJNIy18CYWscP3A-ehVFpjhKo%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8d0d42aaf8274fe4a37a328a46fd0a5a&_e=0AvA9xrYqdppJTCIcQrHv2HlsLmMffXoDVQwFdQ3vn00QF89i8xZpnPr23Rg59Mecya7kfB9p1lOkwQXY5J9vg26Hdw3uyITU6Sl40GjVHGO7YnZv3H9_VoOBlAjX7DRu5UuGlBKRr65knGCRwA643NLIguQQDrjqo17-yP8yaAyanPWSYgL0QCw567Q5GVSxw-DKTq9_akUG3SqxVRUjuJ9u_ys6FN-d4akYMP2Z9pvbKZKUxP4Pckd3s9Q_ASuvztefGDwlcPYIehwPACkGLwntpRQQhD_xBBsAHy9FDynGIAKVi1S5pEKDKnV8kAUMIgh4rRxqxnOJptpjv9EENd6cI5pmx4TYi0edIBpO5ctb3QBzzvi3N196xHhcRTNg5wtmGuFZHaJ5OPoNbc1IhMZqEPX8j43D302yfkWbCU%3D)**

Republicans and former Trump administration officials ripped the Biden
administration on Friday for delaying retaliatory airstrikes against
Iran-backed targets in Iraq and Syria in response to a drone attack on

subject: I knew America was special

body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=376ba1e28ead4094b683c1acbdec178e&_e=hFc-UWQWJ_kYGHIij_-0hNNinpdfj00gcD7irrIoKk2RkOLvUp8Bl1ICbGHiY-cr4ThWFCy1MxCHxui39dwWhOzrxj078cPCdOuAJwpq9lojAr-BFy9R-Un9IteCHVhnUUqEvkIJzF4uQAFhc8cWnjqWSXm8ycns_s9aV9DL3LqWJ8K06Ha7aMpXzXeY2G5poDvSSk-Ppgvnq50yVMVCVpD0LG1mo7oXzvL0EuOF1jBpjtzJdd00OogZnMARvm7Yj6IZZ2hy72nYTej2oAGhqkrDrp8n3kPtolMOPiLQFAUCX-5_Ssrd5xvzBtJYKHd2Z3aTP7IzKfNWlLjLzzOPa_-Pfn6xTlH10a01LEmAsvBMjUw8GT2zb_j3gG4QJXu1k747se4b-FANO0-FFwzFOg%3D%3D)

| | Peter, From the first time I set foot in America as a small child, I knew I had came upon something special.

People weren’t scared here like they were in Vietnam. There was no fearing the government would come knocking at your door and take you away.

America gave my family a second chance, and if it wasn’t for this country’s freedoms, we may not be alive today.

**That’s why I decided to give back to the country I loved and serve in the U.S. Navy for 25 years.**

My service was the greatest honor of my life, and I’m proud to have protected the American Dream I lived for the next generation.

_But now, Joe Biden is putting that dream in shambles._

I wasn’t going to let him make all of my fellow service member’s sacrifices in vain, and that’s why **I decided to step up again to serve - this time as a candidate for U.S. Senate.**

**Together, we CAN defend our liberties - but I can’t do it alone.[Will you add your name today to endorse our mission to take back the Senate?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=376ba1e28ead4094b683c1acbdec178e&_e=hFc-UWQWJ_kYGHIij_-0hNNinpdfj00gcD7irrIoKk2RkOLvUp8Bl1ICbGHiY-cr4ThWFCy1MxCHxui39dwWhOzrxj078cPCdOuAJwpq9lojAr-BFy9R-Un9IteCHVhnUUqEvkIJzF4uQAFhc8cWnjqWSXm8ycns_s9aV9DL3LqWJ8K06Ha7aMpXzXeY2G5poDvSSk-Ppgvnq50yVMVCVpD0LG1mo7oXzvL0EuOF1jC--TfWbig8YXhTfnHn7qxfVbNP5_QaGl2P5IG_zW73Tzc8l6ekD2MWumJE2AgqhJUIYOyPo5VlIpZXmQKceIoTTWQUDcArGL5fJ8K2NF_PNd9Zu9oE3R84MlOo8zXu0b6AMAjOE5acE8IpvMetPCO0JE1BMKNm9vNTix9MG2Q45g%3D%3D)**

Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=aca9d6f2fd0f40fda374df2c00ede383&_e=TqbcTEbqTAxW6doYvO11vifR6WOegPo2UeH_lFChMVmxU8XBZNRFSX5i6kYFJUEIFZ8uJDIyqeKjW3RO3w5M3gPObLdSE4xZ003TOB1PdMegAZu_IE8KonpSHTe_NWdkoV1pLz1H7gkvNRMHJ3ItrpoJp03rGgmw6BLd2AVknSMw4WYInFAEkq301BpCiM3HqcZcO-dXGo8eJpMv3S5E42YCb-wbupLoisgdz0w5BgoUJlZoQYdx2zfrLYUETHqWrOaqpeyq8yyGikavDQX9ioVf9NUlxkPM8n7k5s4-Pl8ZAYZaNbtUvtqMUp0cfjB6_hJBUmf-zzflpOCudpF8j2SHvWfTmcscSlHQIIkKm-nuAr5l1VnKrvjHCplpN6HG)

It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**

clean_body: In the Biden Family | | Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years. For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE! While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. CONSPIRACY NOUN conspiracy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family. | It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight. | I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY. As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. | With Courage, James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee | | | | | | | | Paid for by Comer for Congress**

Our race has changed quite a bit, but my priorities for 2024 haven’t changed at all. I’m laser-focused on:

1. **Stopping Chuck Schumer from interfering in West Virginia.**
2. **Helping Republicans across the Country win in crucial battleground states.**

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Remember that 2016 feeling?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1094%2E135344%2EhZyMQ9)

Friend -
We want you to think back and remember how you felt on Nov 8, 2016 when Trump won the election: do you remember the moment it became clear he was going to be the next President of the United States?
Try to get back into that headspace. Remember the disbelief, the disorienting feeling the next day, the anxiety about what was to come?
And then think about all times over the next four years where those fears were realized. When he told us he was going to do something and then actually did it. And how so often he was enabled by a Republican Senate, who rolled over and did whatever he wanted.
We cannot go back. We can't let that happen.
And the truth is - you and every other citizen has an absolutely essential role in making sure we never do. Because if we win this Michigan Senate race, then there’s a strong chance Joe Biden wins in Michigan and vice versa. A victory for us also means Democrats have a chance to retain razor-thin control of the U.S. Senate.
Almost all the donations we receive come in response to emails like this. It's why we have to consistently ask. And while we know you can't donate to each and every one of them, we hope you will give to this one.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: FairFight.com
subject: An important message from our new interim CEO:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
This is how we’ll move forward as an organization. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78315242/453040778/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240203_f_announcement_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2FhNDgzYy05ZGMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GXGXzchHggFj-TFwedWggvp-6wItUhTiD-8wr2tuxcM=&emci=5cf22337-1dc2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=97aa483c-9dc2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=1037277)

| | I’d like to take a moment to reintroduce myself. I’m Lauren Groh-Wargo, and in 2018, I worked with this incredible community to launch Fair Fight with the mission of defending and repairing our democracy by fighting voter suppression. Since then, that work has included waging critical legal battles, building a statewide and national infrastructure to fight voter suppression and support voting rights, and bringing together a network of strong supporters — all working together to achieve our mission. Key to our efforts have been two landmark lawsuits that highlighted the sustained attacks on voting rights and engagement in Georgia, each with national implications. These lawsuits became multi-year efforts, drawn out by multiple national crises and complicated by a changing legal landscape — including devastating Supreme Court decisions and new state laws restricting voting access that together have stripped judges of the authority to adequately protect voting rights. While our mission and moral obligation charged us to continue pursuing legal relief and protection on behalf of voters, the costs of these efforts have outstripped our projections. These costs have unfortunately come at a time of contraction in funding resources that has affected many groups in our space, making our current trajectory unsustainable. While these realities are disappointing, we are not discouraged. With your support, Fair Fight has greatly advanced the pro-democracy agenda, pushed back and mitigated the impacts of voter suppression, and realized important wins and gains for all Americans. **This week, we announced changes to our organization that allow us to hone our mission and adapt to serve Georgia and American voters for the 2024 cycle and beyond. Our objectives are clear:**
* **Refocus:** We will target Fair Fight’s activities on the core functions of voter protection, communications, and operations.
* **Restructure:** An organizational restructure is underway. We are reducing our current team and realigning staff and resources to align with our mission. While difficult, this is critical to ensure the long-term viability of Fair Fight and to ensure a meaningful impact in the months and years ahead. We are working closely with our team to support them in every way possible during this transition, and know they will continue to make important contributions to this cause and many others.
* **Reorganize:** At the Fair Fight Board’s request, I have stepped up as Interim CEO to steward the reorganization and work with the team on developing and advancing the strategy. Cianti Stewart-Reid has resigned as Executive Director and will be pursuing other opportunities. We are grateful for all of her contributions and commitment to Fair Fight and its mission over the last three years.

**Our goal is to revise the operating model so that Fair Fight is strongly positioned for the battles ahead. Our core mission remains: to fight back against those who seek to disenfranchise voters and take away our freedom to vote and live the lives we choose as Americans. Their attacks continue to spread and escalate, so our commitment must be unwavering.** **I would also like to take this opportunity to thank you and everyone who has supported Fair Fight over the last six years with your time, energy, resources, and financial contributions.** Together, we have made tremendous progress, and the work continues. I will be in touch as we chart our course to hear your thoughts and share our plans. [**In addition, I need to ask: If you’re in a position to make a donation right now, can you help launch this new phase of our work on the strongest possible footing with a contribution of $10 or any amount? Your dollars would make a real difference at this moment as we regroup and gear up for the rest of 2024 and beyond.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78315243/453040779/-1128031810?amount=10&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20240203_f_announcement_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2FhNDgzYy05ZGMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GXGXzchHggFj-TFwedWggvp-6wItUhTiD-8wr2tuxcM=) With a strong commitment to continuing the Fight and a deep gratitude to this community, Lauren Groh-Wargo
Interim CEO, Fair Fight

Peter, we hate to be the bearers of bad news, but we're in a tight spot. _**When experts said re-electing Senators like Sherrod Brown was crucial for saving the Senate, we believed you'd come through.**_
We've asked. We've explained. Yet, despite our efforts, February is off to a slow start!
Trump’s far-right Republican party is plotting an ad blitz this month, and we're scrambling to counter it with our Keep the Senate Blue Fund. Our goal was 7,500 donations to start things strong, but suddenly, donations plummeted, leaving us scrambling to meet our target.

clean_body: = Peter, we hate to be the bearers of bad news, but we're in a tight spot. When experts said re-electing Senators like Sherrod Brown was crucial for saving the Senate, we believed you'd come through. We've asked. We've explained. Yet, despite our efforts, February is off to a slow start! Trump’s far-right Republican party is plotting an ad blitz this month, and we're scrambling to counter it with our Keep the Senate Blue Fund. Our goal was 7,500 donations to start things strong, but suddenly, donations plummeted, leaving us scrambling to meet our target. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Thank you for helping us defend the Senate. — Upset the Setup | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. The system is set up against us — so we're electing leaders who will upset the system. Please, consider making a =. Better yet, I’m honored to say that the speaker of the House, Mike Johnson, will be there to show his support.

The strength of this conservative movement you’ve helped build is alive and well, but as I’ve warned you before, we’ve got some folks nipping at our heels. They’re angry that I stood up to Kevin McCarthy, even though it was the right thing to do, and now they’re coming for my seat. If we work together, we can defend it and continue building momentum to restore what is broken in Washington. Reservations are required for this event, and we expect limited seating, so please take a moment to RSVP today. Thank you for your support, and I look forward to this chance to spend time with my brothers and sisters from East Tennessee. As I always say, thank you for sending me here! Sincerely,

clean_body: Invitation attached 📎| | | | | | | | Friend, As a tried-and-true member of Team Burchett, I want to extend an invitation to an upcoming event you won’t want to miss. I’ll be gathering with folks back home in Knoxville for a lunch that will help us raise money and defeat the Democrats in November. Better yet, I’m honored to say that the speaker of the House, Mike Johnson, will be there to show his support. Friday, February 9, 2024 The Press Room 730 North BroadwayKnoxville, TN 11:30 a.m. Host Reception $1,000 per couple/person 12 p.m. Lunch $250 per person The strength of this conservative movement you’ve helped build is alive and well, but as I’ve warned you before, we’ve got some folks nipping at our heels. They’re angry that I stood up to Kevin McCarthy, even though it was the right thing to do, and now they’re coming for my seat. If we work together, we can defend it and continue building momentum to restore what is broken in Washington. Reservations are required for this event, and we expect limited seating, so please take a moment to RSVP today. Thank you for your support, and I look forward to this chance to spend time with my brothers and sisters from East Tennessee. As I always say, thank you for sending me here! Sincerely, Tim Burchett | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda | | | Stay in Touch 👇 Paid for by Burchett for Congress | | | ---|---|---

name: Congresswoman Jen Kiggans
subject: My mission is to help YOU.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here Hi, Peter, it’s Jen. I just have one quick question for you: Is Social Security important to you? Because it’s really important to me. I’ve always made it my mission to help people. First, as a helicopter pilot in the Navy, as a Mom of four amazing children, as a geriatric Nurse Practitioner, and now as a Member of Congress. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=14e089f08e2e830f7b525ed25e1db8894a100622ff94d3cdc5f261e257751ae9e5acbcff7a357a42fa4f8704309b275b371a6332dd42639d9f0e974a77820dd5 I know the importance of Social Security and Medicare to our seniors and how critical it is that they have the financial security and health care they deserve. I’ve made it my mission on Capitol Hill to proudly support legislation to protect Social Security and Medicare. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=14e089f08e2e830f7b525ed25e1db8894a100622ff94d3cdc5f261e257751ae9e5acbcff7a357a42fa4f8704309b275b371a6332dd42639d9f0e974a77820dd5 I will always stand up for what’s right–even if it’s not popular. No matter how many partisan rumors or claims are thrown around about these programs being cut, my stance will not change: I will always fight to protect and preserve Medicare and Social Security from being dismantled by career politicians in Washington. But now that you know where I stand on Social Security and Medicare, I want to know where you stand on this important issue, Peter. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=14e089f08e2e830f7b525ed25e1db8894a100622ff94d3cdc5f261e257751ae9e5acbcff7a357a42fa4f8704309b275b371a6332dd42639d9f0e974a77820dd5 Do you believe it is important we protect Social Security and Medicare for seniors? https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=14e089f08e2e830f7b525ed25e1db8894a100622ff94d3cdc5f261e257751ae9e5acbcff7a357a42fa4f8704309b275b371a6332dd42639d9f0e974a77820dd5 YES! Protect Social Security & Medicare https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=14e089f08e2e830f7b525ed25e1db8894a100622ff94d3cdc5f261e257751ae9e5acbcff7a357a42fa4f8704309b275b371a6332dd42639d9f0e974a77820dd5 NO, I don’t think it’s important https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=14e089f08e2e830f7b525ed25e1db8894a100622ff94d3cdc5f261e257751ae9e5acbcff7a357a42fa4f8704309b275b371a6332dd42639d9f0e974a77820dd5 TAKE THE SURVEY>>> Please respond to this quick one-question poll, and let me know your thoughts! name: Andy Kim
subject: My opponent’s average itemized campaign donation was $2,252
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey

The FEC reports in New Jersey’s Senate race were just released and I want to share with you something about one of my opponents that I found shocking:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78320457/453058130/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ3ZTc0Mi1hMmMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3pqNasJyuS6dEbaXdcBZtHuDceytpNlgpeUaKoTkwE=&emci=61d0c7ba-09c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=ef47e742-a2c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=26261389)

| | The FEC reports in New Jersey's Senate race were just released, and I want to share with you something about one of my opponents that I found shocking: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78320458/453058131/-1197072038?refcode=2024-02-03-outraised&recurring=&amount=9&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ef47e742-a2c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ3ZTc0Mi1hMmMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3pqNasJyuS6dEbaXdcBZtHuDceytpNlgpeUaKoTkwE=) **Our main opponent outraised us by gathering her wealthiest and best-connected friends. How do we know that? More than 80% of what she raised was from donations of $3,300 or more.** Looking closer at the reports, our opponent's average itemized gift was a mind-boggling **$2,252.** It's really concerning to see this type of campaign fundraising report for a few reasons, but mainly, it shows that our opponent's campaign is funded by her well-connected network – and it shows that those are the people she will answer to if elected to the Senate. I'm running a different kind of campaign because that's what the people of New Jersey want right now. **Our campaign is about bringing in regular New Jerseyans, engaging with them about what's on their minds, and earning their support.** I believe our democracy is strongest when everybody has the right to participate, not just those who are well-off or well-connected. I get it. I'm not what a Senator from New Jersey is supposed to look like. I'm a public school kid and the son of immigrants, but I'm also a three-term member of Congress. I worked to flip a district Trump won twice, a district Democratic leaders in the state told me was impossible to win. I can win this, but I need your help to catch up on fundraising so the big money doesn't drown out our people-powered campaign. [**We're setting a big goal of raising $150,000 online this quarter to fight back and win. We're on the right track, but we can't fall short now. So can I count on you to pitch in whatever you can today to help power our grassroots movement forward?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78320459/453058132/-1197072038?refcode=2024-02-03-outraised&recurring=&amount=9&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ef47e742-a2c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ3ZTc0Mi1hMmMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3pqNasJyuS6dEbaXdcBZtHuDceytpNlgpeUaKoTkwE=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78320460/453058133/-1197072038?refcode=2024-02-03-outraised&recurring=&amount=9&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ef47e742-a2c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjQ3ZTc0Mi1hMmMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g3pqNasJyuS6dEbaXdcBZtHuDceytpNlgpeUaKoTkwE=) More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=300db6acd8b2485aa9d3ca15657b0332&_e=_6hXpeERwntiZZHv1lo2YzLGLbuYka80fvdFwOMKmoAXxGL60UTJ6u7rYXVQp9UUC-XcQU0sLSMbscPAZEsi_RF9rNqSB1P5_wtgYR22l3bbeD1YVYgvbAOIVRMZIevmnm7rn3i6IPiLYHd700WZDyDANf71wt0Sfjl-xUWhTC8LTyZRDA18LnNupQw0nwrDyXkpkgmmCpkpXI4_lQm4T5VsHink9Vs4LjGFpYxX-g4tFnOD6sqC7IM8P5m7P-ZngfbeWjIao91H6JjFCXTPLCVLyikj_d-M87rUhmfLss6DYNRjjiIFpnUl3AvKHfvHuF7jIM1ei_rLbnFG7DxDOat6md1tAVmi_hb6nsGDtQTOqfZ5zScQFJdpK8lG8YWRtHuzzjNHfqKoOoX_1mRUJlL87rnbS5_wJ_4A7-MUJlE%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=300db6acd8b2485aa9d3ca15657b0332&_e=_6hXpeERwntiZZHv1lo2YzLGLbuYka80fvdFwOMKmoAXxGL60UTJ6u7rYXVQp9UUC-XcQU0sLSMbscPAZEsi_RF9rNqSB1P5_wtgYR22l3bbeD1YVYgvbAOIVRMZIevmnm7rn3i6IPiLYHd700WZDyDANf71wt0Sfjl-xUWhTC8LTyZRDA18LnNupQw0nwrDyXkpkgmmCpkpXI4_lQm4T5VsHink9Vs4LjGFpYxX-g4tFnOD6sqC7IM8P5m7P-ZngfbeWjIao91H6JjFCXTPLPiJQZ-Wf9H9xvuk-UXfoCSavgnrPGhwFifmMtBYwgKOLSOjwBvzmpvoO-luniqBJweXzbtzVyHYzjs5RCqUe8gMG9U0GeaoTbDCJCmz-7od7JYH9jV-bLWEo5-LljvvXKbk2NpFsoFl89KDsmoE_N0%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=300db6acd8b2485aa9d3ca15657b0332&_e=_6hXpeERwntiZZHv1lo2YzLGLbuYka80fvdFwOMKmoAXxGL60UTJ6u7rYXVQp9UUC-XcQU0sLSMbscPAZEsi_RF9rNqSB1P5_wtgYR22l3bbeD1YVYgvbAOIVRMZIevmnm7rn3i6IPiLYHd700WZDyDANf71wt0Sfjl-xUWhTC8LTyZRDA18LnNupQw0nwrDyXkpkgmmCpkpXI4_lQm4T5VsHink9Vs4LjGFpYxX-g4tFnOD6sqC7IM8P5m7P-ZngfbeWjIao91H6JjFCXTPLPdfVqEzmreqd-EMwKwYctvvP7vBEEyE80tjdn-qWBSn2CdRUA6-zOx_4U4bgwjrhJDMlaDYwO7gjrZ2wkfFr-BQQagxSMLk84z0-wrZ2BnM-M_0yL___zoEnwxnmAOn2Aj6U6kSJgO1NOykCqPuE60%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=300db6acd8b2485aa9d3ca15657b0332&_e=_6hXpeERwntiZZHv1lo2YzLGLbuYka80fvdFwOMKmoAXxGL60UTJ6u7rYXVQp9UUC-XcQU0sLSMbscPAZEsi_RF9rNqSB1P5_wtgYR22l3bbeD1YVYgvbAOIVRMZIevmnm7rn3i6IPiLYHd700WZDyDANf71wt0Sfjl-xUWhTC8LTyZRDA18LnNupQw0nwrDyXkpkgmmCpkpXI4_lQm4T5VsHink9Vs4LjGFpYxX-g4tFnOD6sqC7IM8P5m7P-ZngfbeWjIao91H6JjFCXTPLC-r-RLBItmah3IoqbbgZ6R2aF_ThXQuenbFerkqrtXFUp9ylfLUjoDDo5X-OLhrvQURG61AM9cNBbAWRVh3etKV91CuP0j881-YyXHu3W1LDHjWvz-Rf2d7hf7rCkJjanDQU5v-VVp3sHqtlOdOK5A%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Sen. Jacky Rosen
subject: the very core of my work in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78324980/453070512/2128632416?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3404-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2M4NDY0ZC1hNmMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V_AIBz3krBx0EtMCT2-65TcmnhlKS_smXw2og5qgpDU=)
---
Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics, friend?

While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that this was my entry point to public service – **because my Judaism is at the very core of my work in the Senate today.**
---
| | **In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it.**
---
| | Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country. And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen.******But I need your help.**
---
| | **Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate has launched his campaign to defeat me, and recent polling shows me neck and neck with my GOP opponent in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control. So please, I'm humbly asking:**

[**If the principle of Tikkun Olam resonates with you – if you're with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities that we love – will you chip in $5 or more today to help me defend my seat in Nevada and our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78324981/453070513/2128632416?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3404-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2M4NDY0ZC1hNmMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V_AIBz3krBx0EtMCT2-65TcmnhlKS_smXw2og5qgpDU=)

Jacky Rosen:** Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. clean_body: | | | | | = Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics, friend? While serving as the president of Nevada's largest synagogue, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that this was my entry point to public service – because my Judaism is at the very core of my work in the Senate today. | | In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it. | | Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country. And as we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on reproductive freedom to threats to tear down our very democracy, I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen.****But I need your help. | | Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate has launched his campaign to defeat me, and recent polling shows me neck and neck with my GOP opponent in the race that experts say will likely decide Senate control. name: Adam Schiff
subject: No Wi-Fi
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5333%2E5257348%2EVQwyqa ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, this
week, I didn’t have Wi-Fi on my Spirit Airlines flight, and I missed an
important message about Sen. Barbara Boxer’s endorsement from my team.

They wanted me to write to you about it immediately, but I was in the air
and had to wait until my flight landed.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20240203_AM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=5333%2E5257348%2EVQwyqa ]Selfie of Adam on a Spirit Air flight

It’s all because I don’t take a single one of your contributions or your
support for granted. Not ever.

We’re going to stretch every grassroots dollar to the absolute extreme to
make the most of your support and win this race.

Even when it means flying ultra-low-cost, budget airlines like Spirit.

My team is putting as many of your generous contributions toward voter
outreach as possible. And to give you a peek behind the curtains — the few
hundred dollars we save with me flying cheap can help us reach another
thousand voters or two. With just 31 days left until our primary, it all
adds up.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2024_abs_em.yNAKTE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20240203_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=5333%2E5257348%2EVQwyqa ]If you can, I’m personally asking you to pitch in a few bucks today —
$3 or
whatever you can spare. I promise you, we’ll make the most of it!
