body:
This is the first presidential election since Roe was overturned, and grassroots donors like you have the power to make or break progress on reproductive health care. | | |
---
| |
---|---
In 2022, Trump’s far-right appointees on the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade._ Here’s what’s happened since: → Millions of people have been left without access to reproductive health care. → Women nationwide are left feeling helpless, scared, and in danger. → Extreme abortion bans, with no exceptions for rape or incest, have passed in Republican-led states. → Republicans are moving forward with even more attacks on birth control, sex education, and family planning. **This is unacceptable. But we _refuse_ to back down.** **** [Elect State Dems →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xuG0DIvBkTCI0Lr6bZYKgp4PY-Uezxt4gU70G4qur8TbU6hvdcKD-9SJRm0d9fCfTc8ANhVU9lfNOFFlxBYbV6VgV2xX1ThFnXFB8LYSIdm-B-uYqGJP_pqnIJ4-0Uupy8wr6fLBcSik_BeHlkzGrBaSeOUCOVucB_Yhy4J2uwUUXUO61e1G69pa8lg3O01xYKyrjZz4sRAx42QDJGB2cUc9HlYsYBOh-IElNJ159am5YnKE_7yz-pyvR1_e0Rqts7y1xhowQHo91aUOLpNKLAZCU-wz-0KlrcnEuDdoFMa47jZr818LerZhMDFzWWKePb6xuzRMP3p3iy7hzw1uR3ZXqKi66PCRDjM7Tg4teYdmBEMt21rfKRyDFznvU28Jbw9phZxrZxqmqDRY_6HHDBJFyyYEaPKgV4dBQDy3IrD6-93cnBCt_0l4VnCRsjJ1ktw8dX7dN1tmlCr79bDfNg/43j/feDSbol0QVq6WDZzMhXhLQ/h0/-UStuhQLkOgIrQfYILAapa9tnUtTnZq1bJrFK8--3KQ) In states like Pennsylvania and Michigan, Democrats have worked to protect abortion rights against the GOP’s far-right agenda. clean_body: This is the first presidential election since Roe was overturned, and grassroots donors like you have the power to make or break progress on reproductive health care. | | | | | ---|--- In 2022, Trump’s far-right appointees on the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. Here’s what’s happened since: → Millions of people have been left without access to reproductive health care. → Women nationwide are left feeling helpless, scared, and in danger. → Extreme abortion bans, with no exceptions for rape or incest, have passed in Republican-led states. → Republicans are moving forward with even more attacks on birth control, sex education, and family planning. This is unacceptable. But we refuse to back down. ** In states like Pennsylvania and Michigan, Democrats have worked to protect abortion rights against the GOP’s far-right agenda. But both the Pennsylvania House and Michigan House are TIED, meaning our majorities are at stake in upcoming special elections. To make matters worse, the RSLC is targeting these chambers, pouring in huge sums of money to break our majorities – and if they win, anti-abortion legislation will be a top priority. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | The fight is happening now. All across the country, state Democrats are fighting tooth and nail to stop Republican attacks on abortion care, protect women and doctors from legal crises, and so much more. But they need our support to keep up the fight. It’s critical that we continue to build our Democratic majorities in state legislatures to fight for abortion rights ahead of this presidential election year – it’s truly a matter of life and death. Peter – many people are arguing that the 14th Amendment would automatically disqualify him from running for president, due to the fact it states that someone who “engaged in insurrection or rebellion” should be barred from holding office.

**And according to a new poll 51% of voters agree with this.** In fact, some have gone as far as petitioning their state to not allow his name on the ballot!

name: Lucas Tyree Kunce
subject: It’s time to take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat for real working people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re going to defeat Josh Hawley and put everyday people in charge of our country. Please let me explain how we got here.
#
I’m so proud of the campaign we’ve built together, Peter.
From launching this campaign last year on January 6 to calling out Josh Hawley on cable news to breaking Missouri fundraising records quarter after quarter, your support has helped us put a national spotlight on this U.S. Senate race.
**And now, multiple polls are showing that we’re in a neck-and-neck race with Josh Hawley — the GOP’s most unpopular U.S. Senator running in 2024.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43288?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4)
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to add your first donation of any amount toward my campaign to defeat Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. **But first, please let me share a little more about how we got here.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43288?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43288?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4)
I grew up in mid-Missouri. And like so many other Americans, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck. So when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher.
But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us. When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes and brought more meals by the house than we could ever hope to eat. **That’s the Missouri I grew up in.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43288?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4)
Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up. Got deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan. Later the Pentagon. I was on the Joint Staff negotiating arms control agreements with NATO and Russia.
When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. **Here’s all that’s left of it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43288?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4)
While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people.
**I saw what was happening — and I was ready to fight back.**
So in my final year of active duty, I worked to upend the corporate defense monopolies that leave our country less safe. I also joined an organization that fights corporate monopolies — we took on defense contractors, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Ag, Wall Street. The people buying off our politicians and leaving the rest of us behind.
**And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country** — so everyday people call the shots, not massive corporations or corrupt politicians. I want to abolish corporate PACs, expose lobbyists writing our laws, criminalize war profiteering, ban insider trading among members of Congress, and enact a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a massive investment and job creation program that will rebuild our forgotten communities and get us off fossil fuels once and for all.
I want to codify Roe v. Wade, secure voting rights, and ban anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams forever. I want to put working people in charge of our country. But I need your help to get it done.
**Without a single cent of corporate PAC money, we’re building the people-powered movement that’s going to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat — and I need you on our team.[Please add a donation of any amount right now so we can continue building this movement and finally give power back to everyday, working people.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43288?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43289?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43289?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43288?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4)
---
I’m not just running to make a point — **this is a race we can win.**
**Josh Hawley is vulnerable.** In 2018, he won his seat with only 51% of the vote — and after he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6th, he became the least popular Republican Senator up for re-election in 2024.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43288?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4)
Since Hawley was elected, Missourians have broken with him and taken back their power at the ballot box by voting to raise the minimum wage, expand Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act, and legalize cannabis.
And if we’re able to communicate to voters early in this race that our campaign is about taking this U.S. Senate seat back for real Missourians, we have a real shot at defeating Josh Hawley.
**But I need you on this team to get it done, Peter.** GOP insiders and even Hawley’s own campaign have already started attacking me — and over the coming months, they’re bound to get even more vicious. That’s why we need to start preparing right now to fight back and deliver our positive message to voters.
**[Will you chip in anything you can right now so we can keep building this record-breaking grassroots movement and stay prepared for the fight ahead? I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say anything makes a big difference to our campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43288?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43289?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=12&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43289?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=13&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43289?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=14&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43289?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=15&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43289?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=16&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43289?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=17&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43288?refcode=em20240203-4739&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=18&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4)
---
Together, we can take back power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally put real, everyday people in charge of our country.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240203-4739-footer&t=19&refcode2=4739_614464_tD1AR4&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4)**
---

Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=20&akid=4739%2E614464%2EtD1AR4). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

That is why I am asking you to make a $5 donation to the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State (DASS). If that's all you need to hear, use this link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-q1-2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78328106/453077481/38783913?refcode=em-2.2.24-all-newsom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTVmNTE1ZS1hYWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FOVc9juQmNQN2TQJmC2PFkSUjqXKsKLRbxRIs6-mxRM=) I want you to think about how you felt watching Donald Trump refuse to accept the results of the 2020 election. Now, I want you to think about how you felt when we saw Secretaries of State refuse to give in to Trump’s calls to crown him the winner in states he lost. A sigh of relief, right? Trump’s not going away, folks. That is why I am asking you to make a $5 donation to the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State (DASS). If that's all you need to hear, use this link to donate: = I want you to think about how you felt watching Donald Trump refuse to accept the results of the 2020 election. Now, I want you to think about how you felt when we saw Secretaries of State refuse to give in to Trump’s calls to crown him the winner in states he lost. A sigh of relief, right? Trump’s not going away, folks. And neither are his and his allies’ attacks on democracy. That’s why we need strong Democratic Secretaries of State in office. So please: $5 because DASS does important work ensuring our election remain free and fair. $5 because DASS is leading the fight to defeat election deniers vying to be the person in charge of counting votes. $5 because the threat to our democracy is real. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. We’re in this race for the long haul. But it’s going to be tough.
With all the chaos in Washington, Montanans deserve someone who will crack down on the special interests and corruption in Washington, not play political games and cut backroom deals. We need to fight to lower costs for hardworking families, create good-paying union jobs, and ensure rural communities have what they need, like reliable internet and hospitals within driving distance.
Folks, I’m not a career politician. I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. **I still farm the same land my grandparents homesteaded 100 years ago, and I try every day to do what’s right for the people of Montana and across the country.**
Because of that, I don’t have much patience for the fancy billionaires and shady super PACs a lot of other politicians rely on. Instead, I depend on grassroots supporters like you.
That’s why I’m so grateful you even opened this email. Emails like this one make up a big part of our budget. $5 here and $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours.
**So, here’s the part where I ask:** **[_Can you make a split contribution of $27.85 (our average online donation) today to Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and my campaign to meet our weekly fundraising goals and hold our Senate majority? Your donations keep me fighting for regular folks in Washington and will help us respond to the onslaught of out-of-state money coming in to attack my record._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78329221/453080642/1318177582?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=27.85&refcode=jtk755-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjIyMWUyMzQtYWJjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=47DkGUB1l7z7AN0cOrNMglEQadqchyXAMhjFMwMrkoI=)**

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. clean_body: My finance team just called: | | | = Folks: I’m stressed. My finance team just called me to let me know we’re still $3,391 short of our weekly fundraising goal — which is especially bad news because national Republican groups are attacking me earlier than ever. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = We’re in this race for the long haul. But it’s going to be tough. With all the chaos in Washington, Montanans deserve someone who will crack down on the special interests and corruption in Washington, not play political games and cut backroom deals. We need to fight to lower costs for hardworking families, create good-paying union jobs, and ensure rural communities have what they need, like reliable internet and hospitals within driving distance. Folks, I’m not a career politician. I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I still farm the same land my grandparents homesteaded 100 years ago, and I try every day to do what’s right for the people of Montana and across the country. Because of that, I don’t have much patience for the fancy billionaires and shady super PACs a lot of other politicians rely on. Instead, I depend on grassroots supporters like you. That’s why I’m so grateful you even opened this email. Emails like this one make up a big part of our budget. $5 here and $10 there goes a long way in a campaign like ours. So, here’s the part where I ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = We’re close to the finish line, and your support right now really helps me out. — Jon | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

body:

| |

---
Peter,

**Coach recently spoke with President Donald Trump, and they both agree that parents’ rights are under attack in our country. **
Whether it’s promoting Critical Race Theory, radical transgenderism, or anti-Israel propaganda, the Left is more interested in indoctrinating their students than teaching them reading, writing, and arithmetic.

Peter, if you think parents – NOT the government – should decide how their children are educated, please take a moment to add your name to our **Parents’ Rights Petition** today! ****

---
This is shaping up to be a significant issue in the 2024 general election, and we hope you’ll _get behind Coach and President Trump’s parents’ rights platform._

We need families all over the country to make their voices heard, so don’t hesitate – [add your name right now!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/927f3ca97223751b3947229f28c3afba/560ece4848801c67c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

name: Stefanie with Team Gillibrand
subject: FWD: just short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Friend, will you make a donation to help defend Kirsten's must-win seat?

---
Hey there, friend. It's Stefanie, Kirsten's Finance Director. I'll keep this brief.
**Unfortunately, last night, we fell just $1,794 short short of our weekly grassroots goal.** Because Kirsten doesn't accept money from corporate PACs, these weekly goals are one of our most important fundraising benchmarks.
If we don't make up the difference ASAP, we'll never have any chance of hitting our mid-February goal in just a couple of weeks. **So please, if you've got a little bit to spare tonight, will you make a donation to help defend Kirsten's must-win seat?**
Here's the best link to give:****[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2024**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78330182/453083540/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4784-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDAzNjM5YS1hY2MyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d2Jrpr94XlRhml3newMuKsGmQ6d-el695z0izbAnI7g=)
Kirsten is relying on Democrats like you to stand with her against the GOP's megadonors, friend. I hope she can count on you today.
Thanks so much,

Stefanie
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Blue Senate Alert**
Subject: this is bad:
| | |
---
Friend, this is bad:**We just checked our latest fundraising numbers, and Kirsten is pacing 29% BEHIND her weekly $20,000 goal! We have to make up the gap before midnight tonight:[_Please, rush an emergency gift now to help her defend her critical seat._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78330185/453083541/-862660935?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4784-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDAzNjM5YS1hY2MyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=d2Jrpr94XlRhml3newMuKsGmQ6d-el695z0izbAnI7g=)**
Kirsten is working tirelessly to win progress on the issues that matter most to families. She's fighting to pass guaranteed paid family leave, certify the Equal Rights Amendment, lower the cost of living for working families and defend Social Security and Medicare.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Kansans are ready to FIRE Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
It's time for an America First fighter in the Oval Office. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c448803219&e=1050d051da)
---
| Patriot,

It's Jake LaTurner here.

I had a great time at the Kansas GOP Convention last weekend, but now I'm back in DC fighting to secure the border and protect our Second Amendment rights from gun-grabbing Biden bureaucrats.

Thank you for having my back during this crucial election year. I'm grateful to have you on Team LaTurner.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **KANSAS MUST STAND WITH TEXAS**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=46bb74dbaf&e=1050d051da)
---
| _CLICK[HERE](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=eca3c59866&e=1050d051da) TO WATCH MY SPEECH AT THE KS GOP CONVENTION!_
---
| The Biden administration is working **OVERTIME** to fuel the invasion at our southern border. Liberal bureaucrats in Washington are now preventing Governor Abbott from protecting his people from the border crisis by forcing them to take down border fencing. Not only is Joe Biden turning his back on the worst border crisis in American history, but he's failing to protect the people of this nation. I STAND WITH TEXAS!
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f3ba570030&e=1050d051da)
---
| Over 25 states have come out in support of Texans’ Constitutional right to defend themselves from the invasion of illegal immigrants and drugs at the southern border caused by Joe Biden. Kansas should be standing with Texas, but unfortunately, we have a governor who supports Biden’s open border and refuses to support commonsense policies like building the wall.
---
|
---
| **IT'S TIME TO FIRE JOE BIDEN**
---
|
---
| It was great spending time with America First patriots at the Kansas GOP Convention this weekend!
**One thing is clear from talking to folks: Joe Biden has failed America. **
Our constitutional rights are under constant attack, the southern border is wide open, rampant crime has taken over major cities, and Biden has weaponized the DOJ to target Americans based on their political beliefs.

We need a proven leader in the White House that will put our nation first and fight for a stronger and more prosperous America. It’s time for Republicans to come together and focus on defeating Joe Biden and the radical left in November.
---
|
---
| **CRACKING DOWN ON ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION**
---
|
---
| I am doing everything I can to push back on the invasion at our southern border caused by Joe Biden's failed policies. This week House Republicans passed three important bills to crack down on illegal immigrants that continue to break the laws of our nation.

✅ **PROTECT OUR COMMUNITIES FROM DUIs ACT:** Ensures that illegal immigrants who receive a DUI are immediately deported.

✅ **CONSEQUENCES FOR SOCIAL SECURITY FRAUD ACT** : Makes certain that illegal immigrants who steal Social Security numbers to collect federal benefits and defraud the United States are immediately deported.

✅ **AGENT RAUL GONZALEZ OFFICER SAFETY ACT:** Strengthens penalties for illegal immigrants who engage in high-speed chases in an effort to evade Border Patrol.

8+ million illegal immigrants, thousands of pounds of fentanyl, and hundreds of terrorists have crossed into our country since Joe Biden took office. This invasion is a national security threat. I refuse to let Democrats put American families and communities at risk.
**WE MUST SHUT THE BORDER DOWN NOW!**
---
|
---
| **DEFENDING THE SECOND AMENDMENT**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=34e0193296&e=1050d051da)
---
| Joe Biden's assault on our Second Amendment rights is taking place in our own backyard. Gun-grabbing liberals at Biden's ATF are targeting Kansas gun dealers and taking away their licenses for minor clerical errors.

I am working to stop this madness and protect small businesses across Kansas from excessive government overreach.

Our constitutional rights are under attack every single day in Washington DC. We must stand up to the radical left and protect our way of life.
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Protect parents' rights
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Protect women's sports
✅ Combat the fentanyl epidemic
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Stop Joe Biden's student loan bailout
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9710472a86&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Kansans for LaTurner, All rights reserved._

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=c94b263cba) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&t=b&e=1050d051da&c=c94b263cba).
---
|
---

| | Friend, Can you believe it? As we head deeper into the election year, Joe Biden is taking credit for his "Bidenomic" failure! I talk with rural Minnesotans every day, and I am confident the people are more than ready to ditch Biden’s big-government socialism, especially because of the record-high inflation he’s unleashed. Unlike our “President,” it is important to me to have a deep understanding of people’s main concerns. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll [**_take 30 seconds to participate in this Biden Inflation Poll._**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/KvVycYDjNmJp/dFh5bEMzbHUzWjBHTEpNRXg2MmRQVDdXSm9sZmJRUGRseVFwZDhXaERYQk9pYWZzNW5HVGU0UWhzYjMvZVN6UXRDOFlnYW9VekcwRlppYjdScnZwUldyMzQ1aUhHOFpsbGR2VlBzU1BWRys1ejVnSjRmc0pIUT09S0/) Tell me – what price increases have hurt you the most? [**_AUTOMOBILES_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/drvmB89b_EcK/dFh5bEMzbHUzWjBHTEpNRXg2MmRQVDdXSm9sZmJRUGRseVFwZDhXaERYQk9pYWZzNW5HVGU0UWhzYjMvZVN6UXRDOFlnYW9VekcwRlppYjdScnZwUldyMzQ1aUhHOFpsbGR2VlBzU1BWRys1ejVnSjRmc0pIUT09S0/)[** _CLOTHING_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/9WLzCm~vryQG/dFh5bEMzbHUzWjBHTEpNRXg2MmRQVDdXSm9sZmJRUGRseVFwZDhXaERYQk9pYWZzNW5HVGU0UWhzYjMvZVN6UXRDOFlnYW9VekcwRlppYjdScnZwUldyMzQ1aUhHOFpsbGR2VlBzU1BWRys1ejVnSjRmc0pIUT09S0/)[** _UTILITIES_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/Ey~ZQYabXjJ3/dFh5bEMzbHUzWjBHTEpNRXg2MmRQVDdXSm9sZmJRUGRseVFwZDhXaERYQk9pYWZzNW5HVGU0UWhzYjMvZVN6UXRDOFlnYW9VekcwRlppYjdScnZwUldyMzQ1aUhHOFpsbGR2VlBzU1BWRys1ejVnSjRmc0pIUT09S0/)[** _FOOD_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/LyV6Qepj4WH4/dFh5bEMzbHUzWjBHTEpNRXg2MmRQVDdXSm9sZmJRUGRseVFwZDhXaERYQk9pYWZzNW5HVGU0UWhzYjMvZVN6UXRDOFlnYW9VekcwRlppYjdScnZwUldyMzQ1aUhHOFpsbGR2VlBzU1BWRys1ejVnSjRmc0pIUT09S0/)[** _FARM UPKEEP_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/gKercepbGLHN/dFh5bEMzbHUzWjBHTEpNRXg2MmRQVDdXSm9sZmJRUGRseVFwZDhXaERYQk9pYWZzNW5HVGU0UWhzYjMvZVN6UXRDOFlnYW9VekcwRlppYjdScnZwUldyMzQ1aUhHOFpsbGR2VlBzU1BWRys1ejVnSjRmc0pIUT09S0/)[** _GASOLINE_**](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/WNRaFP0j3Dh4/dFh5bEMzbHUzWjBHTEpNRXg2MmRQVDdXSm9sZmJRUGRseVFwZDhXaERYQk9pYWZzNW5HVGU0UWhzYjMvZVN6UXRDOFlnYW9VekcwRlppYjdScnZwUldyMzQ1aUhHOFpsbGR2VlBzU1BWRys1ejVnSjRmc0pIUT09S0/)
You’re a standout Republican and a civic leader, so it’s important that I know how Biden’s failures are affecting you and your family, especially if he’s going to be bragging about his economic “success.” We knew he was out of touch, but this is a whole new level of cluelessness. Biden’s socialism is failing the American people. _**If he doesn’t understand that now, I’m sure he’ll figure it out when he’s watching election returns come in this November.**_ Thanks for [**_your input, and as always, for your support_**.](http://links.thelukenscompany.mkt6815.com/els/v2/vZwNBL28YaHR/dFh5bEMzbHUzWjBHTEpNRXg2MmRQVDdXSm9sZmJRUGRseVFwZDhXaERYQk9pYWZzNW5HVGU0UWhzYjMvZVN6UXRDOFlnYW9VekcwRlppYjdScnZwUldyMzQ1aUhHOFpsbGR2VlBzU1BWRys1ejVnSjRmc0pIUT09S0/) Sincerely,

NEW EPISODE!!
[| The Power of Language in Cultural Discourse | Oli LondonThe Kathy Barnette Show58:55
---|---](https://substack.com/redirect/77976909-0d42-4c8e-a544-fcd6e7f69451?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Friends,
I've now said it many times: we are at war. You cannot win a battle if you don't even know you're in one. So... I'll keep doing my part in sharing my learnings of this war and the different aspects that it takes.
This week, I am releasing a conversation with Oli London, who is known for his journey through various identity changes, including transracial (yes, that's a thing) and transgender. Oli is a singer, an activist, and the author of the book _[Gender Madness: One Man's Devastating Struggle with Woke Ideology and His Battle to Protect Children](https://substack.com/redirect/be83e4ee-ff9c-441f-9567-906a656c4510?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[.](https://substack.com/redirect/be83e4ee-ff9c-441f-9567-906a656c4510?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Oli shared his experiences going through the rabbit hole of identity changes, explaining exactly what aspects, words, behaviors got him to pursue what he later realized to be a "crazy" journey.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2735c197-fcf7-48dd-890e-35f195e43cf4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As Oli and many others who went through similar experiences described, the main reason for pursuing all those changes, including surgeries, was a deep discomfort inside. Depressed, distressed... many of the people going through the trans route are people who are silently crying for help, sometimes without even knowing it.

Kathy Barnette x Oli London | | and | Feb 3 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- NEW EPISODE!! Friends, I've now said it many times: we are at war. You cannot win a battle if you don't even know you're in one. So... I'll keep doing my part in sharing my learnings of this war and the different aspects that it takes. This week, I am releasing a conversation with Oli London, who is known for his journey through various identity changes, including transracial (yes, that's a thing) and transgender. Oli is a singer, an activist, and the author of the book Oli shared his experiences going through the rabbit hole of identity changes, explaining exactly what aspects, words, behaviors got him to pursue what he later realized to be a "crazy" journey. As Oli and many others who went through similar experiences described, the main reason for pursuing all those changes, including surgeries, was a deep discomfort inside. Depressed, distressed... many of the people going through the trans route are people who are silently crying for help, sometimes without even knowing it. It’s 2024 now, and we have no time to waste, Friend.

The Radical Left has completely hijacked our nation and, it’s up to us to stop their delusion. Our borders are wide open, crime is rampant, and we’re struggling to keep up with the rising costs of everyday essentials. We must continue to fight to keep our freedom before it’s too late and MAGA is out of reach.

clean_body: | It’s 2024 now, and we have no time to waste, Friend. The Radical Left has completely hijacked our nation and, it’s up to us to stop their delusion. Our borders are wide open, crime is rampant, and we’re struggling to keep up with the rising costs of everyday essentials. We must continue to fight to keep our freedom before it’s too late and MAGA is out of reach. | We only have a few months left until the course of our country will be forever altered. I don’t need to remind you of the consequences of a Democrat win in November. But I will warn that our country will never be the same again if Trump doesn’t prevail. So, Patriot, please take a stand now if you are as excited for a Trump win as I am. I can’t take on the Deep State alone. Thank you for your support, JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. # Update from Senator Hunley
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDYsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaW5kaWFuYXNlbmF0ZWRlbW9jcmF0cy5vcmcvczQ2LyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMDMuODk2MjA3NzEifQ.VrtbOArPv7TKBN8JQySPezzZEknMtxc77dCEd_4mSqM/s/2950175210/br/236510250343-l)
---
Folks, you win some and you lose some. Week Four of the 2024 Session featured both sides of that coin. [SB 52](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDcsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaWdhLmluLmdvdi9sZWdpc2xhdGl2ZS8yMDI0L2JpbGxzL3NlbmF0ZS81Mi9kZXRhaWxzIiwiYnVsbGV0aW5faWQiOiIyMDI0MDIwMy44OTYyMDc3MSJ9.RMK-mnTQjDcIsocQHU_jEnX__-_0K1GuseBD9R0C2H4/s/2950175210/br/236510250343-l), which threatens the future of the soon-to-be-constructed IndyGo Blue Line, was passed from the Senate on Monday despite bipartisan opposition every step of the way. [SB 243](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDgsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaWdhLmluLmdvdi9sZWdpc2xhdGl2ZS8yMDI0L2JpbGxzL3NlbmF0ZS8yNDMvZGV0YWlscyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMDMuODk2MjA3NzEifQ.Gh0mnqp8r0ldGXuDgD18-Hhn7gNDaWnCqnGTwXXDu4I/s/2950175210/br/236510250343-l), my tenant protections legislation, was heard in committee but unfortunately did not pass. Good things are happening too though -- keep reading to hear more about what went down this week at the Statehouse.
| |
* * *
---
## [Senate supports DNA privacy bill](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDksInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaWdhLmluLmdvdi9sZWdpc2xhdGl2ZS8yMDI0L2JpbGxzL3NlbmF0ZS8yODQvZGV0YWlscyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMDMuODk2MjA3NzEifQ.mggwSM83G7WoSDaZVf3AIN054OwHzIczI88neLnoIhk/s/2950175210/br/236510250343-l)
[](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTAsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaWdhLmluLmdvdi9sZWdpc2xhdGl2ZS8yMDI0L2JpbGxzL3NlbmF0ZS8yODQvZGV0YWlscyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMDMuODk2MjA3NzEifQ.HCpkVVgrfcZwkyJp922Er6VHBzi7sp2utOCoasB_wBE/s/2950175210/br/236510250343-l)
Three bills that I either authored or co-authored passed in the Senate this week: [SB 284](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTEsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaWdhLmluLmdvdi9sZWdpc2xhdGl2ZS8yMDI0L2JpbGxzL3NlbmF0ZS8yODQvZGV0YWlscyIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyNDAyMDMuODk2MjA3NzEifQ.0J0E_MxsR45iCmGJNpN818aRUxBsh2Vls2w2sjrJRHo/s/2950175210/br/236510250343-l), [SB 5](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTIsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaWdhLmluLmdvdi9sZWdpc2xhdGl2ZS8yMDI0L2JpbGxzL3NlbmF0ZS81L2RldGFpbHMiLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMjAzLjg5NjIwNzcxIn0.-R_LYW6zJmTQ8Mr_zQww09VqUEf9-y_ZHLGSYFGrhhI/s/2950175210/br/236510250343-l), and [SB 34](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTMsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaWdhLmluLmdvdi9sZWdpc2xhdGl2ZS8yMDI0L2JpbGxzL3NlbmF0ZS8zNC9kZXRhaWxzIiwiYnVsbGV0aW5faWQiOiIyMDI0MDIwMy44OTYyMDc3MSJ9.9to0f2_1HPm8IVpr1bYhCdgZZ-VeEizkveokFPWv8GE/s/2950175210/br/236510250343-l). Thanks to bipartisan support, these commonsense bills will now move to the House. Each piece of legislation is aimed at improving the lives of my friends and neighbors in District 46 and Hoosiers all over the state.
I'm humbled that my colleagues in the Senate passed SB 284 with unanimous support. The bill, which protects Hoosier DNA information from retainment by genetic testing companies, will go on to be sponsored in the House by Representative Kyle Pierce.
* * *
---
## Passage of safe water bill, and others
We also passed SB 5, which focuses on lead removal from water pipes and residencies in the State. Bipartisan support in the senate moves it to the House, where it will also have bipartisan support.
Finally, SB 34 passed out of the Senate on Thursday. SB 34 is a product of our studies between Sessions last year on the Interim Employment and Labor Committee. If passed through the House, it will create enable us to continue studying occupational licensing laws in other states and how we can adapt those systems to potentially boost the Hoosier economy.
* * *
---
## STORIES SHAPING OUR STATE
[Bill aimed at removing dedicated bussing lanes passes to House of Representatives](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTQsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3Lmliai5jb20vYXJ0aWNsZXMvYmx1ZS1saW5lLWJpbGwtcGFzc2VzLXNlbmF0ZS1jaGFtYmVyLXB1dHRpbmctcGxhbm5lZC1idXMtcm91dGUtaW4tamVvcGFyZHkiLCJidWxsZXRpbl9pZCI6IjIwMjQwMjAzLjg5NjIwNzcxIn0.SHrStCWcWBYk82g7ySKe6brszJv5CSPrO7ii4opFXGA/s/2950175210/br/236510250343-l)
The anti-transit, antidemocratic SB 52 passed through the senate on a 35-15 vote. It goes without saying that I am disappointed the Senate has moved forward with this ill-considered legislation. I will continue to fight SB 52 as it moves to the House.
[Renters rally held at statehouse](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..q_PPS_Bp9uLOZoI_0CTK6q6n1rwL7L-Rb2EJ2KwR4b0/s/2950175210/br/236510250343-l)
Thank you to all of the wonderful people from the Tenants' Rights Union who showed up Tuesday afternoon to support SB 243. While unfortunately my bill won't be moving forward this year, I won't stop working alongside you for tenant protections.
[Bill to put religious counselors in public schools passes second reading](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTYsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vZm94NTkuY29tL2luZGlhbmEtbmV3cy9pbmRpYW5hLWxhd21ha2Vycy13YW50LXRvLXB1dC1yZWxpZ2lvdXMtZmlndXJlcy1pbi1wdWJsaWMtc2Nob29scy10by1oZWxwLWFzLWNvdW5zZWxvcnMvIiwiYnVsbGV0aW5faWQiOiIyMDI0MDIwMy44OTYyMDc3MSJ9.pM94gZ00u5soFnOP-aTJhE8jDHxmQ074yodCggk3OZs/s/2950175210/br/236510250343-l)
Indiana has a 694:1 student-to-counselor ratio, one of the worst in the nation. [SB 50](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMTcsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsInVybCI6Imh0dHBzOi8vaWdhLmluLmdvdi9sZWdpc2xhdGl2ZS8yMDI0L2JpbGxzL3NlbmF0ZS81MC9kZXRhaWxzIiwiYnVsbGV0aW5faWQiOiIyMDI0MDIwMy44OTYyMDc3MSJ9.nUqu1Ba7dfk4W9yEfShvlBqHjuhyvAMWYvxRHU5RudA/s/2950175210/br/236510250343-l) is a misguided attempt to quell this imbalance by putting chaplains into schools. We should be giving schools the resources to attract and retain qualified educational professionals and close this gap, not inviting volunteers from religious institutions.
* * *
---
|

name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: 🏆 Announcing the winners of the GIFFORDS Champion Award 🏆
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’re so proud to have these four leaders by our side as we enter the next decade of our movement's lifesaving work
#

Friends,
We’re so excited to share the four inaugural recipients of the [**GIFFORDS Champion Award**](https://go.giffords.org/go/51245?t=1&akid=7596%2E3935704%2EtFoEr8)! The Champion Award was created to bring new voices into the fight for stronger gun laws and celebrate a new wave of gun safety champions.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240203-1-30&t=2&akid=7596%2E3935704%2EtFoEr8)_“I know what it’s like to sit in fear inside of a classroom both as a student and as a substitute teacher. Our children, and all of our communities, deserve to feel safe. Now, the next generation of leaders is here to ensure that our nation moves towards a safer, more inclusive future rather than choosing to stay trapped in a cycle of violence and pain.”_
**—Averie Bishop, Texas House Candidate (HD-112)**
* * *
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240203-1-30&t=3&akid=7596%2E3935704%2EtFoEr8)_“GIFFORDS has been fearless and effective in the fight to end gun violence in America and their work is moving us to a future that is safer and brighter for the next generation. I am honored to have earned this distinction and I am ready to get to work in Congress to champion the critical work of ending gun violence in our communities.”_
**—Lateefah Simon, US House Candidate (CA-12)**
* * *
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240203-1-30&t=4&akid=7596%2E3935704%2EtFoEr8)_“As a veteran and trauma surgeon, I have spent my career dedicated to keeping our communities safe and healthy. I look forward to working alongside GIFFORDS to pass universal background checks, raise the minimum age to purchase a firearm, and reinstate the assault weapons ban as a member of Congress.”_
**—Brian Williams, US House Candidate (TX-32)**
* * *
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240203-1-30&t=5&akid=7596%2E3935704%2EtFoEr8)_”As a Latina, a mom, and a former public school teacher, I know all too well the daily toll that gun violence has taken on our communities. I am running for New York State Senate to move us forward so that our kids don’t have to worry about school shootings. I’m running so that our neighbors are safe in their places of worship, our grocery stores, everywhere.”_
**-- Yvette Valdés Smith, New York Senate Candidate (SD-39)**
* * *
Averie, Lateefah, Brian, and Yvette represent a new wave of leaders who are running up and down the ballot with a dedication to ending gun violence. We’re so proud to have them by our side as we enter the next decade of our movement’s lifesaving work.
[**Will you make a contribution today to help us continue our work uplifting and electing gun safety champions who will put the safety of our communities first?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240203-1-30&t=6&akid=7596%2E3935704%2EtFoEr8)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-feb24.xFye0V&amount=3&refcode=em240203-1-30&t=7&akid=7596%2E3935704%2EtFoEr8)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-feb24.xFye0V&refcode=em240203-1-30&t=8&akid=7596%2E3935704%2EtFoEr8)**
---
****

The team at GIFFORDS

name: Joe Pereles
subject: They’re holding our entire state hostage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pereles for Missouri, Rhonda West, Treasurer
body:
https://www.perelesformissouri.com/ [https://www.perelesformissouri.com/]
Peter,
There is a quote from Maya Angelou that I think fits the state of our politics at the moment: " When someone shows you who they are, believe them—the first time ."
And when it comes to Republicans in Missouri, particularly in the state Senate, it is time for us to believe that these people are showing us exactly who they are and what they actually care about.
As the Chaos Caucus continues to filibuster the Senate, many of their members are being outright childish—yelling and carrying on for hours about their lost parking spots, crying about how they are being “persecuted,” and filing completely unserious joke bills instead of doing the people’s business, which believe it or not was what they were elected to do. One of these bills would allow for senators to engage in a “duel” if they felt that their “honor” had been offended.
Give me a break. As if they even have any honor to be offended.
Peter, flipping State Senate District 15 (a seat currently held by a member of the Chaos Caucus) is a critical first step towards putting an end to the daily embarrassment that we have to endure from the extremists in Jefferson City.
Wouldn’t it be nice to know that the people we elect to represent us are at least trying to work together to actually solve big, long-term issues?
That’s why I am asking for your support for this campaign. If you can, I would be grateful for anything you can give to help us run the best campaign possible and to turn this seat from red to blue: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=chaos_filibuster]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=chaos_filibuster_express_lane_15] DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=chaos_filibuster_express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=chaos_filibuster_express_lane_50] DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=chaos_filibuster_express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=chaos_filibuster_express_lane_250] DONATE $500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=500&refcode=chaos_filibuster_express_lane_500]
DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=chaos_filibuster]
Our campaign relies on donors like you to build the momentum we need to win. Make a lasting impact with a recurring monthly donation. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=chaos_filibuster&recurring=1]
Dangerous extremists are holding Missouri hostage, and we need a new crop of leaders like me who are committed to getting things done, not trying to make headlines and creating endless chaos and dysfunction. We can do better.
Thank you for helping me fight back. I so appreciate your support.
Sincerely,
Joe Pereles

| John McGuire
I'm Running for Congress to "Save America"
Christian Conservative
(Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner)

---
| My Congressional Race Is Picking Up Steam
---
|
---
| We outraised my opponent. Since announcing for Congress with fewer than 30 fundraising days in the 4th quarter 2023 against an incumbent and with the challenge of collecting commitments over the holidays, Team McGuire still received more funds and has clearly built more momentum and excitement for our campaign than Bob Good who had a full quarter. We will take Support wherever we can get it, but unlike my opponent who will say anything to save himself, to date we have received no money from the former speaker.
As your legislator, I work for you and I am committed to protecting your right to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. I'm running to represent the 5th to answer the countless calls from constituents from all over the district who are tired of our current Congressman's betrayal of Trump, bullying divisive behavior, and lack of accomplishments. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zA25LmufAdYvp2pUjZw1vCwjuIvWdkV29EH8JlYE59vqzuksU5x6c3rXnOnC3SAqHO_6wKZMetDKtSFnhye5JncWYkeNacjeZ4iDj-PepgcuOXhMc1GJdWm9o4yqqY1c2TCUS24F4WOMsPBS0v0mEnSe59d_k3yEjsbPEvrxJ2cWOwSFZac0jjWLDaRxKpL4OpjL0KMLvROvwE13D9BpNt0eiSZ9P4ldlT26vvuJoQU=&c=-Ek-buTjTQxHjVRKvN-a-dCjmZgBdUtFwZGJSxA6jNifGBAou7ELRQ==&ch=NvxFXAElyNegqlTBbLemOKqzb2bvtLFnpwZqOsKhls6Cg0HTUGP5dQ==) and contribute to help us continue the momentum. We can do better than Good.
---
| Never Trumper Bob Good

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zA25LmufAdYvp2pUjZw1vCwjuIvWdkV29EH8JlYE59vqzuksU5x6c7b3MMlz3g8ohPy3cWceS4NipXtydnzUpE8PJYET-rQl1eQzKLBqpHXj_wRPNZ7g5KmhmACwKVWQ3pR-R2-IxmrvDqeCPUYpfvA_b4mi3sxa9b5GIwMMar1csTIRkb4fCQBiHdHh-swU-w8tGbPzGLEpwySEak7vH6hk7TwLAWMxA7XYmu8KKOO7z4RzJEVO-_HGL4WQInWNT5J0aokwzIE=&c=-Ek-buTjTQxHjVRKvN-a-dCjmZgBdUtFwZGJSxA6jNifGBAou7ELRQ==&ch=NvxFXAElyNegqlTBbLemOKqzb2bvtLFnpwZqOsKhls6Cg0HTUGP5dQ==)

|
You can't trust him, a prominent Republican said "It's like having an offensive tackle take out his own quarterback." Once again, Bob Good has put his finger in the air to see which way the wind is blowing. From taking 2.5 million dollars from Kevin McCarthy to returning the favor by joining with every House Democrat like Nancy Pelosi to remove the speaker, Good has now flip flopped his "support" to Donald Trump after DeSantis dropped out of the race. Then the next day just one day later he trashed Trump at a[ Lynchburg GOP meeting. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zA25LmufAdYvp2pUjZw1vCwjuIvWdkV29EH8JlYE59vqzuksU5x6c7b3MMlz3g8o8-N7h8VpRikURvPoA58NBbFb5WtkL3n_j6JbZkANdK3oQXAEfe3QK8L6f1UmHDBe9HjXEYPFx72qb1ihiKj2wMZlL7ryDfMbS7GTUZrHiJ5DYMbrEhx3mw==&c=-Ek-buTjTQxHjVRKvN-a-dCjmZgBdUtFwZGJSxA6jNifGBAou7ELRQ==&ch=NvxFXAElyNegqlTBbLemOKqzb2bvtLFnpwZqOsKhls6Cg0HTUGP5dQ==) Then he went on CNN and admitted on live National TV he says one thing about Trump in public and another thing about Trump in private. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zA25LmufAdYvp2pUjZw1vCwjuIvWdkV29EH8JlYE59vqzuksU5x6c9yqFpijP4bCUNrw1TMiBVYbimBPj4cx6hesjGN4FEbwdMcoYjyxIbmLh0Yu9ds3DL5_F2748GRO4Z7hlPCeHAQjw-9cAKqlX1vQHsMciCJemkcuQjC0pEelVXpNR2zp7m0jPy1ZmQ63drUphIxkEUyaq75VsB6mVA==&c=-Ek-buTjTQxHjVRKvN-a-dCjmZgBdUtFwZGJSxA6jNifGBAou7ELRQ==&ch=NvxFXAElyNegqlTBbLemOKqzb2bvtLFnpwZqOsKhls6Cg0HTUGP5dQ==) We can do better than Good.

(CNN [Referenced video](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zA25LmufAdYvp2pUjZw1vCwjuIvWdkV29EH8JlYE59vqzuksU5x6c74CwvT9CrgTRHBn9p7sjZ9UbwqIOvzReCWrGVzyYMIcRAYdT5dx-FigRY4rbRBvlNURzFMZy7qgtm-o-l6Q3mx_RYqlFexJXg4oCMHzxrzOOM59Gw5gOB3iXbywZKgBfP3KePSv2AdU&c=-Ek-buTjTQxHjVRKvN-a-dCjmZgBdUtFwZGJSxA6jNifGBAou7ELRQ==&ch=NvxFXAElyNegqlTBbLemOKqzb2bvtLFnpwZqOsKhls6Cg0HTUGP5dQ==))

Make no mistake, when its convenient, Good will betray Trump again. We can't afford to send Trump back to the White House without a Republican majority that backs him 100%. While Bob is about bullying divisive behavior, I am committed to the Make America Great Again movement!

My WLNI Radio Lynchburg, The Morning Line interview. [Click here to listen.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zA25LmufAdYvp2pUjZw1vCwjuIvWdkV29EH8JlYE59vqzuksU5x6c2lFQjTZfPx_VWdnNeoN_3rZvVROZeSTskusXrFgKWzo2g5l9PG_Rt_zKv89EKU3PCH_t6PeZk2utYBcQAZLQqlRfh1SSLGJ79rbPc0LLIi6NK-hNpN_PntMaEhZlsVI-FmcXAC5U-erRC5SJKvzF9aLwOj-MfYUiaSD1JL9IUwC-G6KU4KQCoUWrzRDEnxwv5HSFEtiiRe62C62UgnsPQI=&c=-Ek-buTjTQxHjVRKvN-a-dCjmZgBdUtFwZGJSxA6jNifGBAou7ELRQ==&ch=NvxFXAElyNegqlTBbLemOKqzb2bvtLFnpwZqOsKhls6Cg0HTUGP5dQ==)

"With Trump, we had money" [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zA25LmufAdYvp2pUjZw1vCwjuIvWdkV29EH8JlYE59vqzuksU5x6c7b3MMlz3g8oXVXYb-hGozowouga1YDRxVsn5MF1YDFRrqDpFxtIyeUv1MyLusXlscoKg1yaaQroZXiQEzrypOrKBBRLxGh8E6eNnd21OcB_oFwYfAixasPju4kFqr4G-ZtmGM8YA6kx5492OSKZ_gUmLwS6opVHyg==&c=-Ek-buTjTQxHjVRKvN-a-dCjmZgBdUtFwZGJSxA6jNifGBAou7ELRQ==&ch=NvxFXAElyNegqlTBbLemOKqzb2bvtLFnpwZqOsKhls6Cg0HTUGP5dQ==)
---
| 2024 Session Update Week 4
---
|
---
| The General Assembly convened on January 10th. Governor Glenn Youngkin, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, and fellow legislators are working hard to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Everything is more expensive. Can we convince Democrats in the House and the Senate to reduce taxes and give fellow Virginians a break?
Here is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to:
---

| "Sage's Law"
---
|
---
| No government entity will ever love a child more than a parent. This is a tragic story out of Appomattox County, where the high school hid Sage's change in sex identification from Sage's mother. Her mother was unable to protect Sage from the evil world of human trafficking. Sage's Mom Michelle Blair told her heartbreaking story to the committee. Unfortunately, my bill "Sage's Law" was killed in the Democrat-controlled Senate. It would have required any school professional, who reasonably suspects a student is at risk of suicide, or "is self-identifying as a different biological sex", to contact at least one of the student's parents, to notify the parent, and to offer counseling. Our kids should be number one!

clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | John McGuire I'm Running for Congress to "Save America" Christian Conservative (Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner) | My Congressional Race Is Picking Up Steam | | We outraised my opponent. Since announcing for Congress with fewer than 30 fundraising days in the 4th quarter 2023 against an incumbent and with the challenge of collecting commitments over the holidays, Team McGuire still received more funds and has clearly built more momentum and excitement for our campaign than Bob Good who had a full quarter. We will take Support wherever we can get it, but unlike my opponent who will say anything to save himself, to date we have received no money from the former speaker. As your legislator, I work for you and I am committed to protecting your right to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. I'm running to represent the 5th to answer the countless calls from constituents from all over the district who are tired of our current Congressman's betrayal of Trump, bullying divisive behavior, and lack of accomplishments. == and contribute to help us continue the momentum. We can do better than Good. | Never Trumper Bob Good | == | | | == ---|--- | You can't trust him, a prominent Republican said "It's like having an offensive tackle take out his own quarterback." Once again, Bob Good has put his finger in the air to see which way the wind is blowing. From taking 2.5 million dollars from Kevin McCarthy to returning the favor by joining with every House Democrat like Nancy Pelosi to remove the speaker, Good has now flip flopped his "support" to Donald Trump after DeSantis dropped out of the race. Then the next day just one day later he trashed Trump at a== Then he went on CNN and admitted on live National TV he says one thing about Trump in public and another thing about Trump in private. == We can do better than Good. (CNN ==) Make no mistake, when its convenient, Good will betray Trump again. We can't afford to send Trump back to the White House without a Republican majority that backs him 100%. While Bob is about bullying divisive behavior, I am committed to the Make America Great Again movement! My WLNI Radio Lynchburg, The Morning Line interview. == Big time Trump ally Marjorie Taylor Greene Endorsed me over Bob Good; == | Trump 2024! | == | MSNBC sent a reporter to a barbershop and one of the guests said "a lot" of his friends are voting for Trump. "With Trump, we had money" == | 2024 Session Update Week 4 | | The General Assembly convened on January 10th. Governor Glenn Youngkin, Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears, and fellow legislators are working hard to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Everything is more expensive. Can we convince Democrats in the House and the Senate to reduce taxes and give fellow Virginians a break? Here is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to: | First Lady Suzanne Youngkin Focuses on Fentanyl | == | Fentanyl is the focus of a statewide drug awareness campaign that Virginia first lady Suzanne Youngkin launched Tuesday in Roanoke. == | "Shall Not Be Infringed" | == | On Wednesday, I defended VA citizens' gun rights on the Senate floor. Senate Democrats have introduced legislation to strip Virginians of their essential right to defend themselves. As conservatives, we must fight to prevent the overturning of our fundamental constitutional right. | Anti BDS BILL | == | I also spoke on my bill SB 604 against the boycott, divestment, and economic sanctions of Israel and to prevent public bodies from allowing contracting businesses and affiliates in doing so. I will always stand with Israel and their sacred right to exist. This bill failed on a party line vote. == | American Soldiers Killed in Jordan | | Freedom isn't free. Thank God we have brave men and women in our armed forces protecting our freedom. Our thoughts and prayers are with the three soldiers killed in a drone attack and their families in this time of loss. | Kurt Russell Destroys Woke Insanity | == | Watch Kurt Russell DESTROY Woke Insanity in EPIC VIDEO - Hollywood Goes CRAZY! == | SB 222 Cybersecurity | | On Tuesday, I met with stakeholders to talk about my SB 222 on Cybersecurity- including Josh Heslinga, Director of Legal & Legislative Services of the Virginia Information Technology Agency (VITA); Joyce Reed, Deputy Secretary of Administration (VITA); Bob Osmond, Chief Information Officer of VITA; and Sam Nixon, Chief Administrative Officer of the State Corporation Commission (SCC). With cybersecurity threats on the rise, it is imperative we take action to secure our Commonwealth's infrastructure. | Many Visitors this Week: | | I was able to meet with some of our youngest constituents from Fork Union Military Academy of Fluvanna County. Thank you Fork Union Academic Dean and Fluvanna Supervisor Mike Goad and Admissions Counselor Michael Head for bringing these young men to the Virginia State Capitol. | | During Virginia Municipal League Day, I had the pleasure of meeting with the Goochland County Administrator Victor Carpenter and Community Affairs Manager Paul Drumwright. | | I had the pleasure of meeting with the Hanover Board of Supervisors including Susan Dibble of South Anna District, == of ==, and ==. Hanover County Administrator John Budesky and the rest of the Hanover Team shared their legislative concerns with me. | "Sage's Law" | | No government entity will ever love a child more than a parent. This is a tragic story out of Appomattox County, where the high school hid Sage's change in sex identification from Sage's mother. Her mother was unable to protect Sage from the evil world of human trafficking. Sage's Mom Michelle Blair told her heartbreaking story to the committee. Unfortunately, my bill "Sage's Law" was killed in the Democrat-controlled Senate. It would have required any school professional, who reasonably suspects a student is at risk of suicide, or "is self-identifying as a different biological sex", to contact at least one of the student's parents, to notify the parent, and to offer counseling. Our kids should be number one! | Richmond Association of Realtors | | | Representatives from the Richmond Association of Realtors stopped by, and we chatted in my office- along with my favorite realtor of all, my wife Tracy. With high interest rates and increased regulation, it is a tough time to buy a house. | Piedmont Virginia Community College (PVCC) | | Piedmont Virginia Community College (PVCC) is a nonresidential two-year institution of higher education that serves Central Virginia - principally residents of the City of Charlottesville and the counties of Albemarle, Buckingham, Fluvanna, Greene, Louisa and Nelson. PVCC is one of 23 community colleges in Virginia that comprise the Virginia Community College System (VCCS). | Texas Has Had Enough | | | We must secure the border now. Fentanyl is now the leading cause of death for Americans age 18 to 45. Human/ sex trafficking of minors is going up every day due to the open borders. I'm glad more and more states, including Virginia, are joining Texas Governor Abbott in stopping the invasion at our southern border. | Senator Richard Stuart | Vicky A. Harte Louisa County Town Council Member | Alpha Kappa Alpha Visit | | I met with constituents from Buckingham County and other localities who are alumni of Alpha Kappa Alpha. Thank you for sharing your concerns. | United Methodist Church Visit | | We appreciate the opportunity to meet with constituents who represent the United Methodist Church. | Black History Month | | February 1st marks the start of Black History Month. I spoke in the General Assembly session to reflect on past and present leaders who have contributed so much to fulfill the promise of America. Frederick Douglass- himself was a slave- is one of the most notable social reformers of our nation's history. ...Shall not be infringed. | Family Loses Custody of Daughter Over Gender Transition | == | A Montana couple, Krista and Todd Kolstad, is facing a heart-wrenching battle after losing custody of their 14-year-old daughter, Jennifer, who expressed a desire to transition her gender. The family's ordeal began when Jennifer's statements about suicidal thoughts prompted Child Protective Services (CPS) to intervene in August 2023. == | Senator Chris Head served with me in the House of Delegates. | President Trump is responsible for two peace treaties in the Middle East. Are people waking up to what we already know? | | On Monday, I was privileged to meet with constituents representing the Virginia Farm Bureau. The Virginia Farm Bureau supports all Virginia agriculture and is especially helpful to the 10th district in its vocal support and education for our state's farmers. Our farmers will always have my full support! | | | Pastor and Dr. David Anderson & his wife Eunjou. Thank you for the prayers. | Senator Bill Desteph | | VHDA | | | | | Kirby Burch, the Chief Operating Officer of VHDA, along with many other local chapters the Virginia Hunting Dog Alliance stopped by my office Monday, and I had the pleasure of introducing them in the gallery during the General Assembly session. The counties that were represented include Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Louisa, Hanover, Amelia, Prince Edward, and Powhatan. | PTA Visit | | We met with constituents who support and advocate for the Parent Teacher Association (PTA). | 2024 McGuire Legislative Agenda | Here is some of the legislation brought to me by constituents and sponsored by me to improve Virginia. Bills: | == == == == == == == == == == == == == == * == == for updates and other legislation we support | Number One Rap Song? | | Congratulations to conservative media host Ben Shapiro of the Daily Wire for his Number One Rap song- "Facts" | | | | Ramona Christian: Volunteer Coordinator Trump Campaign | | If you would like to volunteer, make phone calls, and help with the Trump campaign efforts in Virginia and Nationally please contact Ramona Christian, the Buckingham County GOP Chair, at ramonachristian862@gmail.com or 434-391-4546. | Don't Forget to Vote Trump | | Don't forget early voting for Trump ends soon so GO VOTE! ==. | I'm running for Congress because the enemy isn't at the gate -- the enemy is THROUGH the gate and in our communities. Open borders, fentanyl, lawlessness, out of control spending, and more. Our country is in big trouble. I am running to represent the people of the 5th Congressional District because I am a conservative with a record of building teams to solve problems. We can do better than Good. I've been all over the district and I can tell you the 5th Congressional District loves Trump and the America First Agenda! I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | == | == | | | | | | | For God and Country, Senator John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun (==) Pro-Israel (==) American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | McGuire for Virginia, PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.com powered by

subject: FOREVER WARS DELLICKER SIDES WITH BIDEN AND RINOS
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
Mackenzie For Congress | | | | | [](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=c9839034e3&e=5ccada9200)
---
|
---
**‘Forever Wars Dellicker’ Pushes Ukraine War Funding**
_AN ANALYSIS OF A KEY POLICY DIFFERENCE BETWEEN CONGRESSIONAL CANDIDATES RYAN MACKENZIE AND KEVIN DELLICKER_
Neocon candidate for Congress Kevin Dellicker has stated and restated his support for sending more of our money overseas for war in Ukraine. He shares this globalist position with the likes of Joe Biden, Chuck Schumer, and a bunch of warmongering RINOs.
**Joe Biden’s position on funding war in Ukraine:**
“We need to contribute arms, funding, ammunition, and the economic support,” said _Biden at The White House on 4/28/22._
“Congress needs to pass supplemental funding for Ukraine...It’s as simple as that,” _said Biden again at The White House on 12/6/2023._
**When asked directly about Joe Biden’s position, Kevin Dellicker added his support for continued funding of war in Ukraine:**
“I tell you what, I’m glad we are sending them arms,” _said Dellicker at the Slate Belt Republican Association on 8/8/2023._
“When it comes to funding for Ukraine, we need to be able to support the Ukrainian army,” _Dellicker added at the Lehigh Valley Tea Party candidate forum on 1/4/2024._
JOE BIDEN AND KEVIN DELLICKER BOTH SUPPORT MORE FUNDING FOR WAR IN UKRAINE.
There is a clear difference between me, an America First conservative Republican, and forever war candidates like Kevin Dellicker...
**Ryan Mackenzie’s positions:**
* America first, always.
* Build the wall and secure OUR borders.
* Bring back the border policies of Donald Trump that stopped the flow of illegal immigrants, drugs, and crime into our country.
* Impeach DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas.
* Properly fund our military, so we can achieve peace through strength.
* End the funding of forever wars overseas.

My position, as an America First candidate for Congress, is that Kevin Dellicker should stop siding with Joe Biden, the warmongering RINOs, and the military industrial complex in Washington DC. If Kevin Dellicker was actually in touch with the people he is seeking to represent, he would know that we are sick and tired of funding the uniparty’s forever wars. We also shouldn’t be forced to send even more of our money overseas in exchange for securing our own border. Building the wall and bringing back the policies of Donald Trump that stopped the flow of illegal immigration should be our top priority. Without a border, we don’t have a country.
Kevin Dellicker wants to spend billions more of our tax dollars on securing Ukraine’s border, when we have a border crisis right here at home. Instead of advocating for more of our money for Ukraine, we should be demanding that Joe Biden close our wide open border. This is something that Joe Biden could do - without congressional action - if he really cared about our country.
**Kevin Dellicker has stated and restated his position of spending more of our money on war in Ukraine. He will likely try to explain his position again. But, he is simply wrong on this issue. We need to put America’s key priorities first and stop with the warmongering that has been so devastating to our country.**
IN THE UPCOMING ELECTIONS, WE MUST STOP JOE BIDEN AND NEOCONS LIKE KEVIN DELLICKER.
| [DONATE TODAY TO HELP ME STOP THE NEOCONS](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=8327980755&e=5ccada9200)
---
If you would like to be part of our team, please reach out at [info@mackenzieforcongress.com](mailto:info@mackenzieforcongress.com) or call my campaign at (484) 347-8777.

name: Mike Rogers
subject: Kicking and screaming.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
The last best hope.| | |
---
** We don't want you to leave! But we understand if you don't want to receive these emails anymore. Click [HERE ](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_s=4d7da6ec214a4e3e9469a67ce34fd1ee&_t=o2ki_Lip2DCNeJ0p0Z6vQbcB_BXXBVHJdbMvWWQBYqTsxs3R9Ke8HZanPChsAYS_UUxZft4RkwHRC7iFUZ6fiagI0NoaNk7DP-Dgw3WefNM%3D)[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_s=4d7da6ec214a4e3e9469a67ce34fd1ee&_t=o2ki_Lip2DCNeJ0p0Z6vQbcB_BXXBVHJdbMvWWQBYqTsxs3R9Ke8HZanPChsAYS_UUxZft4RkwHRC7iFUZ6fiagI0NoaNk7DP-Dgw3WefNM%3D)to unsubscribe.**
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=4d7da6ec214a4e3e9469a67ce34fd1ee&_e=IGmdgvykq1fvi0k_tnHmK8bF6dpsX7rVEJ43ckpPmWZYi_wpbdeUpCK7SLsggrrVHrx6mP0gUainPmokn3xr_zB1nvtXnLDYG-SGCWsQwY23QVG39-GbmCDVm32A7gSCtZAReAhBBjcubQFFzK595VPmmO64lkf6p8UL1_NIKsupJokkYZz2TTzlzUDBKX_hn6xmD7MmTrZS-dWS_wcych-KUzdesurQa4OWOIM0NBVUh7MfZScGOSzMdO8zap74Vf9LXUXq1dyPe4xmcGGfXYcF8o3pTzNApx_ABlGPWNtE9NTyPYFxwi11ApdDB7naodIrvGDQ2YLXwdWDNm7lwhRLcSyuccA2IYY8fcqN0gv2TKXYCNj0aJSGst0dnt-PZS-T1YEhdaiID6dMU6fAejymncv-lLsRlxqYMjLcin3S0R3AO0XBq4XEkpLrdupf)
---
Friend, I'm not one to back down from a fight.

During my time as a federal law enforcement officer, I looked some of the most dangerous mobsters, traffickers, and murderers square in the eye. And I didn’t flinch.

Do these partisan hacks in the mainstream media and leftist inner circles seriously think I’m going to shy away from a fight with them? **[Not a chance in hell.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=4d7da6ec214a4e3e9469a67ce34fd1ee&_e=IGmdgvykq1fvi0k_tnHmK8bF6dpsX7rVEJ43ckpPmWZYi_wpbdeUpCK7SLsggrrVHrx6mP0gUainPmokn3xr_zB1nvtXnLDYG-SGCWsQwY23QVG39-GbmCDVm32A7gSCtZAReAhBBjcubQFFzK595VPmmO64lkf6p8UL1_NIKsupJokkYZz2TTzlzUDBKX_hn6xmD7MmTrZS-dWS_wcych-KUzdesurQa4OWOIM0NBVUh7MfZScGOSzMdO8zap74Vf9LXUXq1dyPe4xmcGGfXYcF8o3pTzNApx_ABlGPWNtf1pccH2p9JHMxdiIkpf1ZbQuPkyGoo4rozpVnET_d_KjrVY9gTyuBdo2o5heQz0lOO4UyYlBt7vjC_vD7CzPLXS3lrkBrP9Pwhjs9eVIU2JAil4o3au5P6xfvNOLpXlhg54a8VwmJhs3z8YeoXgPM)** If by some chance they take me down, I’m going to go down kicking and screaming.

Because I believe that some things are worth fighting for — and the soul of our nation is one of them.

If folks like you and I were to just sit back and let them have their way, our flag would be trampled on, our God-given rights would be stripped away, and America as we know it would be a thing of the past.

There is no alternative; there is nowhere else for us to run. To put it simply: The United States of America is the last best hope that this world has to offer. And right now, she is under attack from within.

Radical far-left socialists like AOC, Bernie Sanders, and Chuck Schumer want to remake America in the image of Karl Marx.**
** **[And we can’t let them get away with it.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=4d7da6ec214a4e3e9469a67ce34fd1ee&_e=IGmdgvykq1fvi0k_tnHmK8bF6dpsX7rVEJ43ckpPmWZYi_wpbdeUpCK7SLsggrrVHrx6mP0gUainPmokn3xr_zB1nvtXnLDYG-SGCWsQwY23QVG39-GbmCDVm32A7gSCtZAReAhBBjcubQFFzK595VPmmO64lkf6p8UL1_NIKsupJokkYZz2TTzlzUDBKX_hn6xmD7MmTrZS-dWS_wcych-KUzdesurQa4OWOIM0NBVUh7MfZScGOSzMdO8zap74Vf9LXUXq1dyPe4xmcGGfXYcF8o3pTzNApx_ABlGPWNtwrFqaBbQi3TrvyJbbspuDiyh4cAwlg6xf30WoyzFp6qXaF-WU5R6v8dPhyx03_OYBGlhV4MOaUaX3HAC1F4P1kqv8jTZgMRGtpntvbSVc66AJsHiBI4tZdc00a8mFjOPrekkGnfHXJLQMXo4GBlKs)** That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Friend. Because we have a lot riding on the line this election cycle. And though I am certainly up for the fight, I can’t do it alone.
---
[ **JOIN THE FIGHT**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=4d7da6ec214a4e3e9469a67ce34fd1ee&_e=IGmdgvykq1fvi0k_tnHmK8bF6dpsX7rVEJ43ckpPmWZYi_wpbdeUpCK7SLsggrrVHrx6mP0gUainPmokn3xr_zB1nvtXnLDYG-SGCWsQwY23QVG39-GbmCDVm32A7gSCtZAReAhBBjcubQFFzK595VPmmO64lkf6p8UL1_NIKsupJokkYZz2TTzlzUDBKX_hn6xmD7MmTrZS-dWS_wcych-KUzdesurQa4OWOIM0NBVUh7MfZScGOSzMdO8zap74Vf9LXUXq1dyPe4xmcGGfXYcF8o3pTzNApx_ABlGPWNtwo1U6uvlv3neQG-bNUyXlFu-4ECQGLb-Q4wAZloJMuAlqL-YPhAWLZU47g8P-yv5Q55-yRrcQN9xllKRjcGM8lIHjgN_SxVd9NtKVy6GOesWMcYxP9s1RdEPunQeGgiEZ5ZsrpfqojB9VKaDMBb0o)
---
So to wrap this up, when it comes to the far left and their allies in the media who are throwing nothing but attacks in my direction — [**I say bring it on.**](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=4d7da6ec214a4e3e9469a67ce34fd1ee&_e=IGmdgvykq1fvi0k_tnHmK8bF6dpsX7rVEJ43ckpPmWZYi_wpbdeUpCK7SLsggrrVHrx6mP0gUainPmokn3xr_zB1nvtXnLDYG-SGCWsQwY23QVG39-GbmCDVm32A7gSCtZAReAhBBjcubQFFzK595VPmmO64lkf6p8UL1_NIKsupJokkYZz2TTzlzUDBKX_hn6xmD7MmTrZS-dWS_wcych-KUzdesurQa4OWOIM0NBVUh7MfZScGOSzMdO8zap74Vf9LXUXq1dyPe4xmcGGfXYcF8o3pTzNApx_ABlGPWNuw-cr2LToSvWFfykGaGKI4RaCxNPx5IBOXqdyVXg-LQWndtmYlJ6Pn6AHdEU7NPaMs5OYdHn78WK8NeTSnzYyqeTGheRVBsg3-k6H6Xi8ItlgfJoSgtNCXrj1xhKwOeiLP5rQbIo9tgCPcqk1Knx1N) Because if there’s one thing that I can’t stand, it’s a bully. My dad was a military veteran and a school teacher, so needless to say I was always taught to stand up to bullies.

So they can throw their little jabs all they want. But once we retake the White House and Senate in November, **[we’ll deliver one hell of a knockout blow and send Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer packing. ](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=4d7da6ec214a4e3e9469a67ce34fd1ee&_e=IGmdgvykq1fvi0k_tnHmK8bF6dpsX7rVEJ43ckpPmWZYi_wpbdeUpCK7SLsggrrVHrx6mP0gUainPmokn3xr_zB1nvtXnLDYG-SGCWsQwY23QVG39-GbmCDVm32A7gSCtZAReAhBBjcubQFFzK595VPmmO64lkf6p8UL1_NIKsupJokkYZz2TTzlzUDBKX_hn6xmD7MmTrZS-dWS_wcych-KUzdesurQa4OWOIM0NBVUh7MfZScGOSzMdO8zap74Vf9LXUXq1dyPe4xmcGGfXYcF8o3pTzNApx_ABlGPWNvOqya2R4mp1umEW7omcFLynu1I7MswhQ1Js0piCYXisvJ4qNISNNj6tFJ131PEy6BDFFVViWWoRt4uZ3NvrCYgJpYjwhZIDurY6Ib7KKtLsh676kQU3eDi7GN-T3o2zXctDI_LnfN90ZXdfYhuUcOt)**

Thanks for your time and continued support, **

clean_body: The last best hope.| | | We don't want you to leave! But we understand if you don't want to receive these emails anymore. Click unsubscribe. Friend, I'm not one to back down from a fight. During my time as a federal law enforcement officer, I looked some of the most dangerous mobsters, traffickers, and murderers square in the eye. And I didn’t flinch. Do these partisan hacks in the mainstream media and leftist inner circles seriously think I’m going to shy away from a fight with them? If by some chance they take me down, I’m going to go down kicking and screaming. Because I believe that some things are worth fighting for — and the soul of our nation is one of them. If folks like you and I were to just sit back and let them have their way, our flag would be trampled on, our God-given rights would be stripped away, and America as we know it would be a thing of the past. There is no alternative; there is nowhere else for us to run. To put it simply: The United States of America is the last best hope that this world has to offer. And right now, she is under attack from within. Radical far-left socialists like AOC, Bernie Sanders, and Chuck Schumer want to remake America in the image of Karl Marx. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Friend. Because we have a lot riding on the line this election cycle. And though I am certainly up for the fight, I can’t do it alone. So to wrap this up, when it comes to the far left and their allies in the media who are throwing nothing but attacks in my direction — Because if there’s one thing that I can’t stand, it’s a bully. My dad was a military veteran and a school teacher, so needless to say I was always taught to stand up to bullies. So they can throw their little jabs all they want. But once we retake the White House and Senate in November, Thanks for your time and continued support, Mike Rogers Paid for by Rogers for Senate.
