name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: We have more work ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friends, This month, as we recognize Black History Month, we must recommit ourselves to ensuring every American is treated fairly and equally. That includes making sure every citizen has access to clean air, clean water, and a healthy environment, but for many, that is not the case. Residents right here in Cahokia Heights have experienced issues with their drinking water and sewage systems for over _two decades._ Since 2019, residents have cited over 90 documented instances of sewage coming out of government-owned pipes and into their homes. This is not just the result of climate change — but also of our federal government’s failure to improve the city’s crumbling infrastructure in a predominantly Black city. Residents in this community are paying the price. For decades, they have been exposed to unsafe living conditions and undrinkable water — leading to health issues like bacterial infections and stomach parasites. **It’s infuriating and shameful that this is happening in the wealthiest country in the world. But sadly, it’s not surprising that we’ve allowed this to happen in poor communities of color**. **Clean water shouldn’t be a luxury.** Our communities are suffering, and it’s time to take meaningful action to ensure everyone — no matter their zip code — can live in a safe, healthy environment. That’s why I recently secured the appointment of an EPA Coordinator to lead our response to this crisis. I also joined Illinois Senators Dick Durbin and Tammy Duckworth in requesting a public health assessment by the Department of Health and Human Services, Agency for Toxic Substances and Disease Registry (ATSDR) on the impact of decades of flooding in Cahokia Heights. This will allow us to work toward making critical upgrades to improve our district's infrastructure and address the persistent flooding, sewage, and drinking water crisis facing our residents. Working to remedy the disproportionate impacts climate change has had on communities of color is critical to moving our communities forward. **[Will you stand with me by adding your name today and joining me in committing to the fight for environmental justice?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78334747/453094827/-474450222?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240203_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFiOTA3OS1iMWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zE4GbiDl7ODfqL-c28rVGRukqlzxZjZiBDV2zHlex6M=&emci=60c89e80-f1c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=15ab9079-b1c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=13891387)** | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78334748/453094834/-474450222?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240203_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWFiOTA3OS1iMWMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zE4GbiDl7ODfqL-c28rVGRukqlzxZjZiBDV2zHlex6M=&emci=60c89e80-f1c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=15ab9079-b1c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=13891387)

| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cb1c13b6b453481e8fc66c891794ad89&_e=4wxAhbxn3OY0TPDHYtpGHD2osruWqopD7GGW8wlciI5_cd0cF4uDjrdqXzengYoQFa8cPhSbZvfcOXDdwsE-C4Qa3DP4ZqL1FCCEuSGpdaxoUtavJ9rnNGmE9k-B13W94OOI-E98t1BkWJYkTRMkMNNEL6wJ7AS_GUULQ72PdnkkVPFFV3O8BqMUURAA7XJY4C3SqQwLGmNKWoZMdaujL19krQwyT90EJIEBW5Xkz6NGSnT_OKGRXMzwP2l4ImQo2wbJ4wmcoIoysmIQvArH8PDsoh4ELyE3Quak2wghqX_bg1I2EkF1QvQGhlQdoH1z)

My opponent is a Far-Left activist who worked for the Hillary Clinton campaign, and she's already raising tons of money on ActBlue from liberal online donors around the country. She is determined to defeat me and end my investigation once and for all. **You and I both know we can 't let that happen.** But it's not only that. She's hired Amy McGrath's campaign manager. You may not remember Amy McGrath, but I sure do. McGrath raised $88 Million dollars in her 2020 campaign for Kentucky Senate. **$88,000,000!**
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=cb1c13b6b453481e8fc66c891794ad89&_e=4wxAhbxn3OY0TPDHYtpGHD2osruWqopD7GGW8wlciI5_cd0cF4uDjrdqXzengYoQFa8cPhSbZvfcOXDdwsE-C4Qa3DP4ZqL1FCCEuSGpdaxoUtavJ9rnNGmE9k-B13W94OOI-E98t1BkWJYkTRMkMNNEL6wJ7AS_GUULQ72PdnnDX3nCeEwJi3E5yWXCgSu9ArTE_3IWs6Pj3Pf2fBh5Jusd1YN5xlRStAHooKjlUwlp6SlC8yQBexQPe2s6kbLBxJ3zsBj_TUpluS5tMAkQ66GePymRi7YsAKr3xA2614I0pvUlnl5YSxG_fQVbc8Q-)

That's an astounding amount of money, and her campaign manager's rolodex is stuffed to the brim with democrat mega-donors chomping at the bit to take me down. They know their investment in the Biden administration is at serious risk due to the findings of my investigation, and they will do whatever it takes to defeat me in November and end my inquiry into the Biden Family's corruption racket and cover-up. I'm asking everyone who reads this memo to stand with me today as my 2024 campaign kicks off in earnest. We must show national Democrats that our campaign is strong enough to weather anything... _or this campaign could get really rough for me in the fall._ If you're able, I'd love to have your renewed support. clean_body: They want to shut it down in the blink of an eye | | Fellow American, I received some concerning news, and I'm asking you to read this entire memo about the state of my re-election campaign. My Democrat opponent just filed to run against me in Kentucky's first congressional district and it is alarming. | My opponent is a Far-Left activist who worked for the Hillary Clinton campaign, and she's already raising tons of money on ActBlue from liberal online donors around the country. She is determined to defeat me and end my investigation once and for all. You and I both know we can 't let that happen. But it's not only that. She's hired Amy McGrath's campaign manager. You may not remember Amy McGrath, but I sure do. McGrath raised $88 Million dollars in her 2020 campaign for Kentucky Senate. $88,000,000! | - That's an astounding amount of money, and her campaign manager's rolodex is stuffed to the brim with democrat mega-donors chomping at the bit to take me down. They know their investment in the Biden administration is at serious risk due to the findings of my investigation, and they will do whatever it takes to defeat me in November and end my inquiry into the Biden Family's corruption racket and cover-up. I'm asking everyone who reads this memo to stand with me today as my 2024 campaign kicks off in earnest. We must show national Democrats that our campaign is strong enough to weather anything... or this campaign could get really rough for me in the fall. If you're able, I'd love to have your renewed support. Thank you for everything, James Comer | | | | | | | | Paid for by Comer for Congress

body:
Help us stop misinformation like this in its tracks.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78335038/453095084/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkxNzRmOTUtYjFjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cWHW53DYCg4QGGu3q7iIPZl5uqxchRpSDjCszpgO07k=&emci=57174f95-b1c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=59174f95-b1c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=14016711)
**Remember Joe Rogan, Peter? **He attacked COURIER during his podcast last year, making fun of our mission of stopping people like him from spreading far-right misinformation:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78335039/453095085/-593472309?refcode=20240203_EM_RoganWhitmer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkxNzRmOTUtYjFjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cWHW53DYCg4QGGu3q7iIPZl5uqxchRpSDjCszpgO07k=)
Guys like Joe Rogan are terrified of COURIER, because we’re not afraid to call them out.
**In a moment we’re going to tell you about Rogan’s crazy conspiracy theory on the failed kidnapping of Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer.**
**[Before we do, you should know that COURIER and our local newsrooms in ten battleground states are working 24/7 to hold bad actors like Rogan accountable. Can you pitch in ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78335040/453095086/-593472309?refcode=20240203_EM_RoganWhitmer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDAwMDAwMDAtMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAtMDAwMDAwMDAwMDAwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJtZGRycGhAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IQoGK_6GRfUJuh9rP_L3bLjLnG9GclRLHaXv_O--cWs=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkxNzRmOTUtYjFjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cWHW53DYCg4QGGu3q7iIPZl5uqxchRpSDjCszpgO07k=)**[**$10 now to support our work?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78335041/453095087/2081106790?refcode=20240203_EM_RoganWhitmer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkxNzRmOTUtYjFjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cWHW53DYCg4QGGu3q7iIPZl5uqxchRpSDjCszpgO07k=)
Now let’s fill you in on his latest nonsense.
In a recent episode of his podcast, Rogan claimed that 12 of the 14 men involved in the plan to kidnap Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer were FBI agents.
**Wrong. **
The truth is that, 13 of the 14 men involved in Whitmer’s kidnapping plot were far-right radicals, motivated in part by the same kind of extreme conspiracy theories that guys like Rogan casually spout off to their millions of listeners.
How do we know the truth? **Well, our Michigan newsroom, The ‘Gander, provided critical coverage to the plot and the subsequent trial:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78335042/453095088/-593472309?refcode=20240203_EM_RoganWhitmer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkxNzRmOTUtYjFjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cWHW53DYCg4QGGu3q7iIPZl5uqxchRpSDjCszpgO07k=)
_The 'Gander, December 8, 2023_
**The scariest part of all this is just how influential Rogan has become in recent years. In fact, his podcast is the #1 podcast on Spotify – the platform that has the exclusive rights to the show.**
Unfortunately, rather than taking a firm stand against Rogan’s BS, Spotify continues providing a platform for this type of profit-driven misinformation that will benefit both Spotify and Rogan.
**That’s why COURIER exists.** Our journalists operate in newsrooms across ten battleground states, and they are dedicated to calling misinformation out and holding those who spread it accountable.
**[But it takes a lot of resources to support our newsrooms, and we’re counting on supporters like you to help us keep it up. So if you can, please pitch in ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78335043/453095089/-593472309?refcode=20240203_EM_RoganWhitmer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkxNzRmOTUtYjFjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cWHW53DYCg4QGGu3q7iIPZl5uqxchRpSDjCszpgO07k=)**[**$10 or any amount today to help us continue fighting back against misinformation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78335044/453095090/-593472309?refcode=20240203_EM_RoganWhitmer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkxNzRmOTUtYjFjMi1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cWHW53DYCg4QGGu3q7iIPZl5uqxchRpSDjCszpgO07k=)

body:
Palestinians deserve to live. Palestinian children deserve to grow old. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvfYClG5tS7aR5R_0JzpSDlEc-s6zw_BXG3bTr_NXhiSttiizh50zaA5aVFxJAc3yVxQTRbkSoISzIaQ60ykppnJ69LdjCcdcffn1vUW0709YhOttcxmnJ0V3gmjJeA5ecSkBQI0fQTIwgeIjJ-H92Rg/43j/3EQHzUMMSGm-4BARJckenw/h0/kSgqhqcPWd2c6nm0yYAh8k1E5u6aFcQOAV6r099xzq4)

Friend, In response to the case brought by South Africa against Israel, the International Court of Justice just ruled that Israel’s government is plausibly committing genocide. The Court ordered Israel’s government to act immediately to prevent further harm to the Palestinian people—and to stop “acts of genocide” such as killing Palestinians and “causing serious bodily or mental harm” to Palestinians. This ruling also puts the U.S. government on notice for enabling violations of the Genocide Convention. As a signer of the Genocide Convention, the U.S. government is legally obligated to prevent genocide. [**Sign to tell President Biden: To comply with the International Court of Justice’s ruling to prevent genocide, you must suspend all weapons transfers and military funding to Israel’s government. clean_body: Palestinians deserve to live. Palestinian children deserve to grow old. | | | Friend, In response to the case brought by South Africa against Israel, the International Court of Justice just ruled that Israel’s government is plausibly committing genocide. The Court ordered Israel’s government to act immediately to prevent further harm to the Palestinian people—and to stop “acts of genocide” such as killing Palestinians and “causing serious bodily or mental harm” to Palestinians. This ruling also puts the U.S. government on notice for enabling violations of the Genocide Convention. As a signer of the Genocide Convention, the U.S. government is legally obligated to prevent genocide. | With U.S. support, the Israeli government has killed more than 27,000 Palestinians in Gaza, forcibly displacing 2 million people within the already-densely-packed Gaza strip. President Biden has sent thousands of bombs to Israel’s military, while blocking international efforts to stop the violence and watering down attempts to secure sufficient humanitarian aid. Meanwhile, Israel’s government is still starving Palestinians in Gaza and depriving the trapped population of other basic needs for survival such as water, shelter, and medical assistance. As the biggest funder of Israel’s military, U.S. government leaders have the power and the obligation to stop this unfolding genocide. In addition to the order to prevent genocide, the International Court of Justice (ICJ) also ordered Israel to prevent and punish incitement to genocide, to immediately ensure “urgently needed basic services and humanitarian assistance” to Gaza, and to report back within a month to the court. The only way to implement the Court’s orders is by facilitating a lasting ceasefire. Let’s keep up the momentum and the pressure to end not only this genocide, but also the apartheid system that’s rooted in the racist dehumanization of Palestinians. Together, we’re demanding a world with equality and dignity for all people. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Another example of why we need a constitutional amendment on guns
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Earlier this week, a federal judge overturned California's law requiring people to pass a background check to buy ammunition.

Friends —
Earlier this week, a federal judge overturned California's law requiring people to pass a background check to buy ammunition.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-feb24?refcode=em240203&refcode2=1814_4767699_mX-F9X&akid=1814%2E4767699%2EmX-F9X)
Now let me be clear: guns — with bullets — are the number one killer of kids in America.
And the main reason California's firearm death rate is so much lower than states like Florida and Texas is because we have strong gun laws.
But time after time federal judges put those laws at risk.
This is the same judge, Judge Benitez, who overturned our three-decade-old assault weapons ban, comparing military-style weapons to Swiss Army knives.
It's absurd.
But the truth is, it once again highlights why we need a constitutional amendment to make our communities safer from gun violence in this country.
Because if Congress won't act, and if right-wing fanatical judges overturn strong gun laws, then we need to amend the Constitution.
Gavin Newsom
* * *
**☀️ Wait wait wait! Don't go just yet. 🔥**
Far-right Republicans and the NRA will attack us and do whatever they can to stop our progress in the fight to amend the Constitution on guns.
But the good news is that the people are on our side, the facts are on our side, and if we stick together we are going to get this done and save lives. It may not happen soon, but you have to believe it will happen.
Gavin Newsom’s pledge to you is every donation made today will go right toward our fight to pass a Constitutional amendment on guns. If that sounds worth it to you, please contribute $20 today.
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Katie Porter
subject: $200k on private flights ✈️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Each Member of Congress is allotted an office budget, which we normally use to pay for staff who serve constituents, events like town halls, and commercial flights to get ourselves from our homestates to DC.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37255%2E3422442%2ENe7HTN)
Derek, **new reporting shows that Kyrsten Sinema spent more than $200,000 of taxpayer money on private flights.**
It isn’t standard practice for lawmakers to take private jets using government funds. Each Member of Congress is allotted an office budget, which we normally use to pay for staff who serve constituents, events like town halls, and commercial flights to get ourselves from our homestates to DC.
This type of taxpayer dollar abuse is unacceptable.
**I’ve introduced legislation to boost accountability and inform the public about when, where, and how Members of Congress travel on the taxpayers’ dime.[Can you sign my petition to show your support for this bill?](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-transparency/?source==em20240203-37255&t=2&akid=37255%2E3422442%2ENe7HTN)**
[Sign on: Transparency in Taxpayer-Funded Travel Act](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-transparency/?source==em20240203-37255&t=3&akid=37255%2E3422442%2ENe7HTN)
Stories like this fuel Americans' distrust in our government, and people are right to be concerned. Too many politicians allocate money to pet projects, take marching orders from corporations, and slip loopholes into bills on behalf of their biggest donors.
I was _shocked_ by the amount of legalized corruption I saw when I first got to Congress in 2019, and since then, I’ve made cleaning this place up one of my top priorities. **Now, I’m the only person in this race who supports banning corporate PAC and federal lobbyist money, and doing away with earmarks—which lead to waste and fraud.**
I’m proud to run a people-powered campaign as we fight to clean up corruption and shake up the status quo. Anything you can give today will help me hold power to account.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240203-2?refcode=em20240203-37255&refcode2=37255_3422442_Ne7HTN&akid=37255%2E3422442%2ENe7HTN)
Thanks for reading,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240203-37255&amounts=&t=4&refcode2=37255_3422442_Ne7HTN&akid=37255%2E3422442%2ENe7HTN)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=5&akid=37255%2E3422442%2ENe7HTN)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=37255%2E3422442%2ENe7HTN)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: Black History Month is a time for celebration, reflection and action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS Chris Deluzio is a United States veteran
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Hi Derek,

Thursday marked the start of Black History Month – an opportunity to celebrate and reflect on the contributions that Black Americans have made to our country's history and communities.

We reflect on centuries of dark history and injustices that Black people have faced in America. We also celebrate progress and the incredible impact that Black Americans have had on culture, science, education, politics and activism, and much more.

But we would not be truly honoring Black History Month unless we focus on the work that we still need to do – we must turn toward action.

I am fortunate to serve in the same chamber that former Rep. Elijah Cummings made an incredible mark on. A few years before I was sworn into office, he said: "When we're dancing with the angels, the question we'll be asked: In 2019, what did we do to make sure we kept our democracy intact? Did we stand on the sidelines and say nothing?"

The fight for justice and equality is far from over, and we can't sit it out on the sidelines.

We have to make sure that everyone can vote in our democracy. We have to fight for equal access to affordable education, quality healthcare, and good jobs. We have to reject the idea of extremist, dangerous culture wars and embrace the fact that our country succeeds when our systems are set up for everyone.

I'm in the fight for justice and equality for all, and I hope you'll join me. Happy Black History Month, Derek.

In celebration and solidarity,
Chris Deluzio
Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country.
Will you join Chris' team and help keep PA-17 blue?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del_email?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=defc7e67-b5c2-ee11-b660-002248223197]

clean_body: [] Hi Derek, Thursday marked the start of Black History Month – an opportunity to celebrate and reflect on the contributions that Black Americans have made to our country's history and communities. We reflect on centuries of dark history and injustices that Black people have faced in America. We also celebrate progress and the incredible impact that Black Americans have had on culture, science, education, politics and activism, and much more. But we would not be truly honoring Black History Month unless we focus on the work that we still need to do – we must turn toward action. I am fortunate to serve in the same chamber that former Rep. Elijah Cummings made an incredible mark on. A few years before I was sworn into office, he said: "When we're dancing with the angels, the question we'll be asked: In 2019, what did we do to make sure we kept our democracy intact? Did we stand on the sidelines and say nothing?" The fight for justice and equality is far from over, and we can't sit it out on the sidelines. We have to make sure that everyone can vote in our democracy. We have to fight for equal access to affordable education, quality healthcare, and good jobs. We have to reject the idea of extremist, dangerous culture wars and embrace the fact that our country succeeds when our systems are set up for everyone. I'm in the fight for justice and equality for all, and I hope you'll join me. Happy Black History Month, Derek. In celebration and solidarity, Chris Deluzio Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country. Will you join Chris' team and help keep PA-17 blue? Contribute Now [] GIVE Monthly [] PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS Chris Deluzio is a United States veteran. Use of rank, title, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, Department of the Navy or the Department of the Army. I spent a lot of my career around kids, Peter.
As a special education teacher, I worked tirelessly for my students. I wanted them to have the best possible future. The kind of future every kid deserves.
_But so much of that future was out of my hands._
As an educator, I couldn’t ensure that my kids would grow up in a state where they’d be free to marry the person they love, to be safe in their classrooms or at church, to live on a planet that can sustain them, or to have their voice heard in our government. And right now, it seems that our state’s leaders — _especially_ Marsha Blackburn — are dead set on making that future impossible.
**_[I’m standing up to Marsha Blackburn for the sake of all our kids, but I can’t defeat her alone. Corporate PACs and far-right groups are bankrolling her reelection bid. Meanwhile, I rely on grassroots support. Please: Donate ANY amount you can to kick Marsha out of Washington once and for all >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78338606/453101910/209297649?refcode=ea.047dc560-b6c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.047dc560-b6c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdkYzU2MC1iNmMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GDci1GAFMFfy1ln1Hlwxuv92utfSE4Ugzdn5_JKgu5M=)_**

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

clean_body: Marsha doesn’t care about it. | Peter, I’m running for Senate to build a better future for this state. That’s something my opponent doesn’t give a damn about. All Marsha Blackburn cares about is keeping hold of her own power. And Tennesseans deserve better. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I spent a lot of my career around kids, Peter. As a special education teacher, I worked tirelessly for my students. I wanted them to have the best possible future. The kind of future every kid deserves. But so much of that future was out of my hands. As an educator, I couldn’t ensure that my kids would grow up in a state where they’d be free to marry the person they love, to be safe in their classrooms or at church, to live on a planet that can sustain them, or to have their voice heard in our government. And right now, it seems that our state’s leaders — especially Marsha Blackburn — are dead set on making that future impossible. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I appreciate all your support, Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Byron Donalds [Chairman]
subject: RE: Republican Ballot Harvesting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here's the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://links.theusapatriots.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a6454d700977477490a6fcb5c073e641&_e=eAaoHHZL-8BJXx4PunlpLOqx8X-XZOSefwjQQY6RHa4hO7GA7Y3lA0ali00-VYvh8fWpAQcM0FfUVz566KoFnqMUxN0Atbg5DGElMBTkrIPxNRxjCpptfNbABiVQrfdLJV81M0Pji3W7Vet41ZeIeodYyFvuWPFi3cgCdz8v_Yj04CkpLo9T1hHHrX47vF0LQLhUeh4hxMuJ39-tUmzVmLBsk2rDGBVE9dhnw_SnJ0_cFz8Aeupf3xImtSk6sNem3GheYKImd2rmhXk2-02hz1iXSSams7EVI8iNi3KY93CxCzyvi6BnxHOR-A69o-h_zvPvmjjV-iec8polPAbzudCERmx20jpNsq9Ui85lae6lV7idau28uUUQa4GgK1uyAYo3GG3vIANK-ye2c19B3ZsHnGKekItom__qfT78yIw%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm at my wits' end

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---

clean_body: I'm at my wits' end | | | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend. Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again. Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6. I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation. But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can. | ~~ "STAND WITH RYAN" So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. ~~ "If you chip in just $5 right now," I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? | | | ~~ "DONATE TODAY" You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress. I am honored to be endorsed by the California Federation of Teachers!
Just like me, they believe every child in America, regardless of their background, deserves an excellent education, and just like me, they fight for a strong public education system, workers’ rights, and social justice.
In Congress I will advocate for equitable funding for all students from Pre-K through post-secondary education, a minimum annual salary of $60,000 for teachers, free school lunches, tuition free access to higher education, and universal child care.
**Contributions and solidarity from grassroots supporters like you boost my campaign’s mission to create a more equitable education for our nation’s students and better resources for our nation’s educators.**

clean_body: | | | I am honored to be endorsed by the California Federation of Teachers! Just like me, they believe every child in America, regardless of their background, deserves an excellent education, and just like me, they fight for a strong public education system, workers’ rights, and social justice. In Congress I will advocate for equitable funding for all students from Pre-K through post-secondary education, a minimum annual salary of $60,000 for teachers, free school lunches, tuition free access to higher education, and universal child care. Contributions and solidarity from grassroots supporters like you boost my campaign’s mission to create a more equitable education for our nation’s students and better resources for our nation’s educators. ** you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. I am running for California’s 23rd District to champion a better future for California and the country. That means we need to support our educators and our schools so they can provide our youth with a top notch education. Teachers and students deserve elected leaders who will ensure that they have the tools to teach, learn, lead productive lives and support a thriving democracy. **** for your support, Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. name: VoteVets
subject: a pattern of behavior
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Remember Trump’s attacks on Ghazala and Khizr Khan back in 2016.
#
While Trump and his campaign attack VoteVets and Gold Star Parents for telling the truth about what he thinks of our honored dead... remember these two brave people:
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-feb24-red.vFIzUD&refcode=em240203-1-30&t=1&akid=24871%2E3013755%2EXJq6n0)
Remember Trump’s attacks on Ghazala and Khizr Khan back in 2016.
They sacrificed the most important thing in the world for this country, and Trump attacked them relentlessly.
This is who he has always been.
We can’t let the American public forget that.
**[Donate $5 to VoteVets today and help us keep the pressure on Trump. He can attack us all he wants, but we will never tolerate attacks on Gold Star Parents.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-feb24-red.vFIzUD&refcode=em240203-1-30&t=2&akid=24871%2E3013755%2EXJq6n0)

name: Bob Casey
subject: I’m going to be up against a wall of Republican money in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there, this is Senator Bob Casey. I’m going to be up against a wall of Republican money in Pennsylvania. My opponent is the wealthiest self-funder running for Senate anywhere in the country. He already put $1 million of his personal fortune into the race, and a super PAC supporting his campaign just announced raising nearly $18 million — that’s an astonishing amount. On top of that, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are all in on flipping this seat. When you’ve got this kind of money coming in against you, you need to build a team of supporters to help you fight back. I know for a fact that folks like you who chip in $5, $10, or $15 will make the difference in this Senate race. **[Pennsylvania could decide our Senate majority. Can you split $5, $10, or $15 between my campaign and Tina Smith to help fight back against the millions that are going to come my way?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78344785/453111486/-2111347600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240203_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2YyMTZhNS1iZGMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bwi3kTiHVDXhgS2t6gjsFMPFAFsSnCMeMgsBKlhKg9Y=)** | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78344786/453111487/-2111347600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240203_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwY2YyMTZhNS1iZGMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bwi3kTiHVDXhgS2t6gjsFMPFAFsSnCMeMgsBKlhKg9Y=)

clean_body: Join us and take ACTION. | | Dear friend, **🌹 Roses are red, violets are blue, 🌹 Grace and Frankie miss you too! This Galentine's Day you’re invited, To the Grace and Frankie reunion, get excited! With scripts in hand, we'll read aloud, Two classic episodes to the virtual crowd. And as we laugh, smile, and reminisce, We'll champion a cause that we can't dismiss. Jane and Lily are leading the fight, Defeating Big Oil will take all of our might. Climate progress is what we demand This Galentine's Day, we’re taking a stand. — JanePac♥️ = Hey friend — our Galentine's Day reunion and live table read is coming up fast! We can’t wait to get the Grace and Frankie cast back together to celebrate Galentine’s Day and come together to support the most important cause of our lifetimes. If you haven't bought your tickets for our special Grace & Frankie Galentine’s Day Virtual Cast Reunion, we warmly invite you to do so. Your presence means more than you know, and every ticket helps propel our mission at the Jane Fonda Climate PAC forward. = We hope to see you there! The Jane Fonda Climate PAC Team P.S. Did you buy your ticket already? Thank you! It may take a few days for our system to update, but we have your contribution recorded. See you on the 13th! | = | = Follow the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: Demand the DOJ investigates Gov. Abbot’s human rights abuses today!
body:
Take action today to hold him accountable. | | | Picture this, Peter: Immigrants without coats and wearing flip flops on their feet arrive in freezing downtown Chicago in a snowstorm. That’s exactly what happened this winter when Texas Governor Abbot performed another dangerous political stunt while risking human lives. Not only did Governor Abbot send asylum seekers to Chicago in a snowstorm, but he also sent them to Los Angeles as the city prepared for incoming Tropical Storm Hillary. He exploits immigrants to gain far-right political points, traumatizing them and violating human rights in the process. Governor Abbot’s actions are inexcusable and must be investigated. clean_body: Take action today to hold him accountable. | | | Picture this, Peter: Immigrants without coats and wearing flip flops on their feet arrive in freezing downtown Chicago in a snowstorm. That’s exactly what happened this winter when Texas Governor Abbot performed another dangerous political stunt while risking human lives. Not only did Governor Abbot send asylum seekers to Chicago in a snowstorm, but he also sent them to Los Angeles as the city prepared for incoming Tropical Storm Hillary. He exploits immigrants to gain far-right political points, traumatizing them and violating human rights in the process. Governor Abbot’s actions are inexcusable and must be investigated. is a human right, Peter. Each day that Governor Abbott goes unchecked, he will continue his abuse of migrants and worsen conditions for immigrants across the state of Texas. He’s proudly admitted to sending over 95,000 migrants out of Texas and into sanctuary cities across the country and shows no signs of stopping. Thanks for taking action, Juanjo and the rest of the UWD Action Team

name: DC Daily Journal
subject: white rice vs brown rice (90% get this wrong)
body:
Untitled Document

Please read the
following message from our sponsor.

One of the questions I get most
as a Nutritionist is whether rice is good for you or not, and if
you should choose brown rice or white rice.

Over 90% of people get this
answer wrong, and they've been told by misinformed dieticians and
doctors that brown rice is healthier because it has more "fiber".

However, this is harmful advice,
and brown rice is NOT healthier than white rice!

Let me explain why...

Brown rice contains the hull of
the rice plant, and that hull does contain some fiber, but it
also contains some significant toxins such as lectins that can
harm your gut lining, cause brain fog, and trigger autoimmune
reactions in some people.

I've had dozens of my friends and
clients that saw dramatically improved digestion, more energy and
clarity of mind, and autoimmune skin conditions that went away
once they switched from brown rice to white rice.

Brown rice also contains
significant amounts of toxic arsenic since the arsenic is in the
hull, and not the white starch part of the rice. This is yet
another reason that white rice is a lot better choice in my
opinion.

A word of warning on white rice:
While white rice is mostly just starch, and therefore can be used
as a great source of muscle glycogen by healthy people that
exercise frequently and intensely, I would urge caution for
people with Diabetes to be careful with the quantity of white
rice they are consuming and monitor their blood sugar carefully.

Now that we've talked about why
we should avoid brown rice if we want to avoid many of these
health issues, let's look below at a unique way to HEAL your gut,
get rid of gas and bloating, increase energy, and lose fat
easier...

Broccoli vs Kale vs Green
Beans... (the #1 WORST veggie for your gut & energy)
According to the best-selling
author and world-renowned heart surgeon, Dr. Steven Gundry,
there's one veggie people over 40 should never eat.

This veggie can damage your gut
and disrupt your hormones... It contains a toxin that damages the
lining of your intestines, causes bloating, embarrassing gas, and
a bulging belly.

Do you know the veggie I'm
talking about? Make sure you do by clicking the one below you
think it is, and get the answer from Dr. Gundry himself on the
next page:

>> Green Beans

>> Broccoli

>> Kale

>> Cauliflower

525-K East Market Street # 114

City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

Reserved.

Since the beginning of 2024, there have been over 25 mass shootings, almost one every single day.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78348165/453117624/444630146?refcode=2-3-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxMTBhMWZhLWMxYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-rgiTjW64jQR_gDghh7YwJoID7STbKSMDCmuMFGgUn4=)

| | Friend, Last week there were 8 more mass shootings in our country. Since the beginning of 2024, there have been over 25 mass shootings, almost one every single day. Mass shootings like these are an almost daily occurrence in America, and one that we all know all too well.But it doesn’t have to be this way. Republican politicians across the country continue to put the NRA’s Dark Money above the lives and safety of the American people.**[**The NRA will always have Republican politicians to do their bidding until we get Dark Money out of politics. And until we do, the American people will continue to pay the price. Can you chip in $10 so we can continue to work together to get Dark Money out of politics and give power back to the people?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78348166/453117625/444630146?refcode=2-3-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxMTBhMWZhLWMxYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-rgiTjW64jQR_gDghh7YwJoID7STbKSMDCmuMFGgUn4=)****** Listen, we know that with the amount of gun violence in our country, it’s easy to become desensitized to it. But we can’t let that happen. We’re working tirelessly for a solution- removing the grasp that the NRA has on Republican politicians throughout the country.**[We need everyone’s help if we’re to keep up our work toward getting the NRA’s Dark Money out of politics. By contributing $10 today, we’ll be working together to prevent avoidable tragedies by minimizing Dark Money’s grip on our politics.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78348167/453117626/444630146?refcode=2-3-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxMTBhMWZhLWMxYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-rgiTjW64jQR_gDghh7YwJoID7STbKSMDCmuMFGgUn4=)**** It’s because of the NRA’s control of Republican politicians that we can’t pass common sense gun reform measures like an assault weapons ban. Their “thoughts and prayers” following every mass shooting is craven and cowardly.It must change. Our lives depend on it.**[We know that you care about saving lives, and finally passing gun reform. It starts with breaking the NRA’s grip on the Republican Party. And that starts with shutting off their spigot of Dark Money. Join us by chipping in $10 to do just that. Your contribution will help us get the NRA’s blood money out of politics once and for all.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78348168/453117627/444630146?refcode=2-3-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYxMTBhMWZhLWMxYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-rgiTjW64jQR_gDghh7YwJoID7STbKSMDCmuMFGgUn4=)** **Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

name: The Office of Delegate Briana D. Sewell
subject: Del. Sewell's Week 4 Session Newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/New%20Sewell%20Delegate%20Logo%20.png]
Session Week 4 Newsletter
Hello neighbors,
I had a very busy and exciting week accomplishing the business of the Commonwealth on behalf of you, my constituents. This week ushered in the month of February and the celebration of Black History Month which recognizes the many contributions and accomplishments of black people in the United States. In 1976, then President, Gerald Ford, extended the one week celebration of Black History to a month-long celebration to “seize the opportunity to honor the too-often neglected accomplishments of Black Americans in every
area of endeavor throughout our history.”
We here in the General Assembly have many history makers to include most recently, speaker Don Scott, the first African American speaker of the Virginia House of
Delegates in its history, and Yvonne Miller, the first African American woman to serve in both the Virginia House of Delegates and the Virginia Senate. On February 1st, both the senate and the House of Delegates recognized Senator Miller’s time of service in the Virginia General Assembly.
As you move through the month of February, I encourage each of you to take time to explore the inspiring, challenging, and evolving history and contributions of Black Americans, in particular those within the Commonwealth.
Another important event takes place in February, crossover. This year crossover takes place on Tuesday, February 13th. Crossover is when all the bills that have passed the House go to the Senate for consideration, and all the bills that passed the Senate go to the House for consideration. This is an important part of each General Assembly session, and I look forward to keeping you informed as critical pieces of legislation move forward during crossover.
In the News
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/Screenshot%202024-02-02%20at%207.30.30%20AM.png]
Senator Jennifer Boysko; Delegate Briana Sewell; Rhena Hicks, Freedom Virginia; Jewel Gatling, Care in Action; Shirley Mae Modlin, business owner and member of Small Business Majority’s Virginia Small Business Council; and Chrischa Ives, a Virginia Beach resident
In a previous newsletter, I shared my bill HB737 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HB737] , Paid Family and Medical Leave. This week, I joined Sen. Jennifer Boysko, who is carrying the same bill in the State Senate, as well as advocates for a press conference to explain why we’re pursuing this important policy that benefits our working families.
Paid Family and Medical Leave gives families paid time off to care for a new child, themselves, or a family member when they are facing a serious health condition – without sacrificing economic security. This critical policy will ensure covered employees can take up to 12 weeks of paid time away from work to care for themselves or a family member. Here’s what I shared in the press release:
“Paid family and medical leave means that people can finally take time to recover when they are seriously ill without also jeopardizing their economic security,” said Delegate Briana Sewell (D-Prince William). “We should not be forcing employees to work while they’re in chemo or with a two-week-old baby because they can’t afford to miss a paycheck. The legislation has advanced in the House and I am hoping to see it advance in the Senate today so we can take a first step toward the reality of Paid Family and Medical Leave for all Virginians.”
You can watch the video of the event here [https://freedomva.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=773aee6e8c517526f3d13be6d&id=4ee386cb02&e=ae235f8564] .
Our work to establish a critical program that will serve families all across the Commonwealth has also been featured in several news articles this week, including:
Virginia Democrats again push for paid family and medical leave [https://www.virginiamercury.com/2024/01/29/virginia-democrats-again-push-for-paid-family-and-medical-leave/] ( Virginia Mercury)
Lawmakers consider paid family medical leave program [https://www.vpm.org/news/2024-01-31/general-assembly-bill-paid-fmla-virginia-government-employees] ( VPM)
Virginia inches closer to paid family medical leave [https://www.wvtf.org/news/2024-01-29/virginia-inches-closer-to-paid-family-medical-leave] (Radio IQ)
Welcome to Richmond! Constituent Engagement & More
While our work progresses in Richmond, each week has provided the opportunity to meet with individuals, organizations, and advocates doing great work, pushing for change, and doing their part to improve life for every resident of the Commonwealth. Thank you for taking the time to visit my office and providing your policy proposals!
This week, my staff and I met with some truly dedicated folks, including those below.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/Screenshot%202024-02-02%20at%204.28.07%20PM.png] What a pleasure to welcome members of Alpha Kappa Alpha Sorority Incorporated®, Mid-Atlantic Region, to the Virginia General Assembly to share their 2024 legislative agenda. I am one of five members of this illustrious sorority currently serving in the General Assembly, and I was so honored to welcome members and leadership to Richmond and take part in their lobby day. Thank you, AKAs, for continuing to be of #ServicetoAllMankind!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_0246.jpg] I also had the opportunity to meet with President William G. Kelly of Christopher Newport University. We discussed Virginia’s higher education landscape and ways to increase both access and affordability. In my capacity as the Chair of the House Higher Education Subcommittee, this discussion was both informative and timely.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_9490.jpg] I was happy to meet with some members of the Prince William Board of County Supervisors and to attend the Prince William County Chamber of Commerce legislative reception! It was great seeing so many familiar faces, engaging with business leaders, and looking for additional opportunities to work together to further improve our community’s economic health and competitiveness.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_0210.jpg] I participated in the ARC of NOVA’s Autism Advocacy Day. I would like to thank the organizers for their ongoing advocacy on behalf of residents of Northern Virginia with intellectual and developmental disabilities.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_0228.jpg] My staff met with representatives from the Prince William Conservation Alliance and I met with the Virginia Conservation Network, which allowed my office to have important conversations about what efforts are needed to improve our shared environment, both on a local and statewide level.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_0206.jpg] My staff met with the School Nutrition Association of Virginia to discuss how we can best ensure all kids in Virginia have access to healthy meals in school.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_0194.jpg] Thank you to the Prince William and Fairfax County Farm Bureau for meeting with my staff to discuss challenges facing farmers in Northern Virginia and across the Commonwealth.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_0213.jpg] My staff was glad to meet with a student ambassador to discuss the importance of broad access to rigorous coursework as part of AP student advocacy day.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_1069.jpg] My staff discussed issues facing immigrants in our community with Dreamer Mothers in Action.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/IMG_0225.jpg] My staff met with members of the Virginia Community Healthcare Association to talk about ways to improve healthcare across the Commonwealth and increase the health of all of our residents.
My Bills
This week, I’m happy to report that one of my bills has officially passed the house of delegates and three other bills have moved forward. I will continue to speak on their behalf in the coming days and work with my colleagues and advocates to explain how each bill will benefit our fellow Virginians and urge their passage.
HB738 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+sum+HB738] : my bill to ensure all members of the armed forces have access to the same earned benefits no matter their service branch passed through all three constitutional readings on the house floor and passed the House of Delegates unanimously 99 to 0.
HB736 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=HB1526] : my bill to protect veterans from predatory Veterans Affairs benefits claim sharks was was heard today on the floor for the second reading and engrossed to third reading.
HB1526 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=HB1526] : my bill requiring the DMV to issue overweight permits for an electric utility's operation of vehicles was heard in the House Transportation DMV Subcommittee (which I’m proud to chair) and passed unanimously with a substitute [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+vot+H1901V0019+HB1526] .
HB739 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=HB739] : my bill that would exempt childcare and early education programs that specifically serve military families from duplicative licensure was heard by the House Education Subcommittee on Early Childhood on Wednesday and was passed unanimously with a substitute [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+vot+H0903V0013+HB0739] .
HJ36 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=HJ36] : my bill requiring a study on barriers to clean energy was continued to 2025 this week in the House Rules Committee [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?241+com+H20] . The Jewish Community Relations Council of Greater Washington also included my bill in a letter [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1_xbdsfzNA0VA4DS11NRjOpcPJuzSCuVn/view] outlining a full list of bills from the General Assembly’s Northern Virginia Delegation that they have endorsed.
This Week’s Mailbag
My office continues to receive your correspondence, and we appreciate how passionate you are about the different issues you are writing about. Staying involved is the only way to have a functioning democracy, and your voice is a central part of driving change and influencing policy.
This week, we received a lot of emails about concealed carry of firearms, end-of-life decisions, and access to reproductive healthcare.
If you would like to share your feedback, support or concerns about any of the legislation being considered by the House of Delegates, please reach out to me and my staff using either of the methods provided below. As always, your input is critical and your opinions are essential. Thank you for staying engaged!
Prince William County Updates
Elm Farm Road Closing
Between February 9th and 19th, there is a planned pipe replacement on Elm Farm Road in Prince William County. This construction will require that the road be closed for about two weeks. The county will be placing informational signage in the area soon, including the planned detour route. For questions or to report hazardous road conditions, contact VDOT’s 24-hour Customer Service Center by visiting my.vdot.virginia.gov [https://my.vdot.virginia.gov/] or calling 800-FOR-ROAD (367-7623)
Dominion Energy’s Offshore Wind Program Receives Final Approval
I want to share an important update regarding Virginia’s ongoing efforts to establish sustainable, renewable energy opportunities. The Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind project is moving along on schedule, having just received the necessary federal regulatory approvals. This represents great news for Virginia and for the development of this important industry.
Offshore wind's economic development and jobs benefits are transformative for Hampton Roads and the Commonwealth. In fact, more than 1,000 local jobs will eventually be needed to support ongoing operations and maintenance.
While this doesn’t directly involve Prince William County, I feel that these job opportunities and the impact this program will have on the environmental and economic future of the entire Commonwealth is important for all residents to be aware of and follow.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP13/1/87444/images/headingcommunitybill%20%281%29.png]
Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell.
Friends of Briana Sewell
PO Box 1849
Woodbridge, VA 22195
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/BDPKPY_4S0izjMklQV7G1w2?unsubscribedata=YE8S2CbwU7eH34Uyqu%2FDI5hLTOy1OtFet6ncQDTykkXw65Qt%2B0%2F2vZDa58QWXpYq5yjrJedACJ6tTTsR%2BhMnvRK9y6srUq7h1k2N7C%2B3yGbsCr0kTp2mxuwIRDS%2FdsFIcmYTjbRO7auLgy0oKsqOVrcfqTYVAosTHF0BhvnVilwxxli4aYjDmAMHNUHBBvUsO3SMLwbe%2BLpMofTVp6zwAVMqK1b0FYyILJPtCgx7u70mR1WTrigy2FcSIww46uHlRT7pX08XOe336efnfVZ3ZeO1RJ5rZPyFOT5MA7cDhNCUM8zwr5C44TFpDhdmpxb3Jpysvelr0f9OsX4%2FKK6PofHRk2%2Fuw%2B7DRupqU%2F3J7DMeJ58ienPWvrpmHwSH1XEJbJWTgjI1m3MDHiEGLE2vt3g2IPMcM7emkdL%2BMhJkoddl3vPs14k59tq%2FLkxrAuOr .

I will continue to speak on their behalf in the coming days and work with my colleagues and advocates to explain how each bill will benefit our fellow Virginians and urge their passage. HB738 [] : my bill to ensure all members of the armed forces have access to the same earned benefits no matter their service branch passed through all three constitutional readings on the house floor and passed the House of Delegates unanimously 99 to 0. HB736 [] : my bill to protect veterans from predatory Veterans Affairs benefits claim sharks was was heard today on the floor for the second reading and engrossed to third reading. HB1526 [] : my bill requiring the DMV to issue overweight permits for an electric utility's operation of vehicles was heard in the House Transportation DMV Subcommittee (which I’m proud to chair) and passed unanimously with a substitute [] . HB739 [] : my bill that would exempt childcare and early education programs that specifically serve military families from duplicative licensure was heard by the House Education Subcommittee on Early Childhood on Wednesday and was passed unanimously with a substitute [] . HJ36 [] : my bill requiring a study on barriers to clean energy was continued to 2025 this week in the House Rules Committee [] . The Jewish Community Relations Council of Greater Washington also included my bill in a letter [] outlining a full list of bills from the General Assembly’s Northern Virginia Delegation that they have endorsed. This Week’s Mailbag My office continues to receive your correspondence, and we appreciate how passionate you are about the different issues you are writing about. Staying involved is the only way to have a functioning democracy, and your voice is a central part of driving change and influencing policy. This week, we received a lot of emails about concealed carry of firearms, end-of-life decisions, and access to reproductive healthcare. If you would like to share your feedback, support or concerns about any of the legislation being considered by the House of Delegates, please reach out to me and my staff using either of the methods provided below. As always, your input is critical and your opinions are essential. Thank you for staying engaged! Prince William County Updates Elm Farm Road Closing Between February 9th and 19th, there is a planned pipe replacement on Elm Farm Road in Prince William County. This construction will require that the road be closed for about two weeks. The county will be placing informational signage in the area soon, including the planned detour route. For questions or to report hazardous road conditions, contact VDOT’s 24-hour Customer Service Center by visiting my.vdot.virginia.gov [] or calling 800-FOR-ROAD (367-7623) Dominion Energy’s Offshore Wind Program Receives Final Approval I want to share an important update regarding Virginia’s ongoing efforts to establish sustainable, renewable energy opportunities. The Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind project is moving along on schedule, having just received the necessary federal regulatory approvals. This represents great news for Virginia and for the development of this important industry. Offshore wind's economic development and jobs benefits are transformative for Hampton Roads and the Commonwealth. In fact, more than 1,000 local jobs will eventually be needed to support ongoing operations and maintenance. While this doesn’t directly involve Prince William County, I feel that these job opportunities and the impact this program will have on the environmental and economic future of the entire Commonwealth is important for all residents to be aware of and follow. [] Paid for by Friends of Briana Sewell. Friends of Briana Sewell PO Box 1849 Woodbridge, VA 22195 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

clean_body: The Senate Majority is Up to You | Friend, We're at a difficult spot in this primary fundraising push... The Senate Majority hangs in the balance this November, and we need all hands on deck to be prepared. At the same time, I have a lifelong Democrat voter running against me in this primary. A candidate who is backed by George Soros in his run against me. Indiana deserves better. Indiana deserves honesty. Indiana deserves an America First Fighter in the Senate. So, my team just told me that we have been authorized to that come in the door A Senate Majority controlled by the Far Left could lead to the further desecration of conservative ideals and America First leadership we have fought so hard for. So, needless to say, we have a lot of work to do, and we need all your support to get it done. The most important part of all of this is | We need you today! | ---|--- - Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2024 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: EXCITING Updates At Sheridan.Church Tulsa & OKC | From Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
body:
Updates At Sheridan.Church BIG THINGS are happening at Sheridan.Church Tulsa + OKC in 2024 and I would love to share with you what is ahead. Every
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2177.1.a3e9ee5a37bb5641a110964186febd23) |
---
## Updates At Sheridan.Church
---
**BIG THINGS** are happening at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2178.1.7adead0c63dd856c509ff2ce656cb147) Tulsa + OKC in 2024 and I would love to share with you what is ahead. Every year, we host a **Vision Night Banquet** that I want to encourage you to be apart of and catch the vision. You can RSVP with the links for Tulsa + OKC below. **Upcoming Services/Events:** **-Sunday, February 4 @10am | Tulsa:** The Book Of Acts Pt. 34- From Saul To Paul w/Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer **-Sunday, February 4 @6pm | OKC:** The Book Of Acts Pt. 34- From Saul To Paul w/Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer **-Wednesday, February 7 @7pm | Tulsa:** LIVE Q&A w/Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer **-Friday, February 9 @6:30pm** : Vision Night Banquet Tulsa - RSVP: [https://clr.cm/jWeS](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2179.1.9b27254dfb924f5d2177cbf53ce0bad4) **-Sunday, February 11 @4:30pm** : Vision Night Banquet OKC - RSVP: [https://clr.cm/IxJC](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2180.1.931dadf43dc621bb8ddfcae64edcb0c8) **-Sunday, February 11 @5pm | Tulsa:** Super Bowl Party **Darryl Strawberry** , **Perry Stone** , **Bishop Darrell Hines** & **Dr. Randy Caldwell** are coming back to [Sheridan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2181.1.b4eac290c3617405d2b94d433c0d98ea) in September for **IGNITE 2024**! View schedule here: [https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2182.1.2ba28333508f74e917e6c239aa275a5c) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2183.1.4a74b54da68b8006e31fda44fa304990)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2184.1.52b483886af12ad9e5f38d227c2afd2e)
---
---
## A Journey...
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2185.1.5a0e657e93def9c0ea8049f032efc0c9)
---
It has now been 6 months since [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2186.1.15edafaece8f70994896ec323ebb3b65) purchased the **Caravan Nightclub** in Tulsa, OK. **Phase 1** of turning a _club_ into a _church_ is **COMPLETE**! The auditorium is fully operational. We are now in **Phase 2** of turning a _tavern_ into a _tabernacle_.
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2187.1.e41b495cb6bdf1ec2a0f98b6fe74bf82) Children/Youth Wing
---
**Phase 2** includes:
-Full Remodel of the **Children/Youth Wing**
-Full Remodel of the **Women's Bathroom**
-Addition of a **Family Bathroom**
-**Lobby/Entry** Remodel
-**Parking Lot** Striping
Thank you for your generosity that has allowed for the progress up to this point but please consider giving towards the completion of Phase 2.
I need **YOUR** help to finish this project!
You can help by visiting: [https://www.sheridan.church/give ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2188.1.51810531f6ce88a5d3783cbff23e4426)
---
## What To Do To Be Ready For 2024
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2189.1.bd247debac06bccfd1103334388b902d)
---
I am _not a prophet neither the son of the prophet_ but I am willing to bet the farm that 2024 will be **WILD**! The **Deep State Globalists** will pull out all the stops in this upcoming election year just like in 2020. The question then becomes: **what should we do to be ready for 2024?** I preached about this subject on Sunday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2190.1.5ddd0eea50f880756c64da3c2422d94b) and I encourage you to check it out because it will help prepare you for what is coming. Watch the [sermon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2191.1.6c96fa46850af41a044d3ae812b569a5) here: [https://youtube.com/live/YG782xgZ_y8?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2192.1.574b43c5fa91fb4b5392ec858ee9c84d) If you are looking for a church in 2024 know that you are invited to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2193.1.5798776a15f267d971543e874b9b6a59) Tulsa & OKC **Sundays @10am | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK** **Sundays @6pm | 3100 N Meridian OKC, OK** Let's start 2024 _STRONG_! You can also partner with [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2194.1.c2cc707a64d229ef96465934c2233531) by making a donation at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2195.1.7e69af6f6ff4ba9ed8e590d000b25876)
---
| | [ Read Through The Bible In 2024 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2196.1.bb70ef32992aaf7fa7fcae5381dd0419)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2197.1.a992d46a452131d71938d94b0060165b)
---
Join the [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2198.1.31c35f0209347581fa2d467f4959d54d) family in reading through the **ENTIRE** Bible in 2024.
Click the QR code or visit: [Sheridan's Bible Reading Plan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6157355.2199.1.694bfa9688f4c90d3f507b6ca3532690)

name: John Padora
subject: we need to keep pace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Hey there, folks. I know we just wrapped up a pretty intense end-of-month fundraising push, but when you’re running against someone like Carpetbagger Lauren Boebert, you can’t slow down.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=be06bc9c339e4326b3e5fe2909aae0d8&_e=to688FlKihkMnb_nZ7ylB-Rfy9-1LabvZW1YgvbWgrIOSuAzOcmGBug-iamA2uyRMb2i8UlREmVRAHwdJA-av0NM4NDc2kS8flBN-Y7GNuvUEBvOrFoBd8YfDpdAzd2wVugQRd-VbONKLza5sn-tkFiA9WktHay0sFxviOVMUongHVIkgkfayMjDK14mhDZt90ZtJCHgG8vEolxfJPZ6VCPrXY72YRaG9z4apbheKYLRrRGozTnAB-lk7BNqwrjWteC16WU-8VuNrHT-xkEqCGXykUtk-vYZI_1bJ4ZuD1a4NXAxg_yUZnPysikUSQls4I3VGRGwsv_FpIVInVqoedVcwZkRNVZ2TiscPI20Yk-zA_P3yPWEyN_Mv2iqm_tjsaDSF0yhnGymdS6ozF8ysg%3D%3D) Hey there, folks. I know we just wrapped up a pretty intense end-of-month fundraising push, but when you’re running against someone like Carpetbagger Lauren Boebert, _you can’t slow down._ See, Boebert’s been in Washington for four years. And in that time she’s become very friendly with wealthy GOP donors and those close to Donald Trump. **Her warchest is going to be massive this year.** So we can’t afford to fall behind. I’ve set a goal with my team to raise $5,000 by the end of the day tomorrow to help keep us on track. **President Biden and President Obama know that electing Democratic leaders to statehouses is critical to building a better future, but state legislatures are consistently underfunded and overlooked.**
**If we want to catapult Democrats across the finish line in states like Michigan, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania, we’re going to need all hands on deck. We’re relying on this grassroots team to help our party stay on track to elect Democrats through reliable, dedicated support.**
With your contribution, you’ll fuel the fight to defeat extreme Republicans, expand Democratic power at the state level, and elect Democrats in states like yours. But with five special elections this month, we’re losing time, so we’re asking you:

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Heartened
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I joined state Democratic leaders for a roundtable discussion on abortion rights and reproductive health care.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1952%2E35263%2E2fTVfQ)
Hi Peter, Tammy here with an update from the campaign trail! Last month, I joined state Democratic leaders for a roundtable discussion on abortion rights and reproductive health care ahead of this year’s pivotal elections. [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240203_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1952%2E35263%2E2fTVfQ) We met just before what would have been the 51st anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ — had the Supreme Court’s right-wing majority not overturned the landmark decision guaranteeing abortion access over a year ago. Since that decision, I've been heartened by seeing how many people are getting involved around this issue and other freedoms and rights that have been taken away. Wisconsinites have made it clear how they feel about restoring and protecting reproductive rights — we proved it by electing Justice Janet Protasiewicz to the state Supreme Court last year and with your help, **we can prove it again this year.** My likely Republican opponent, Eric Hovde, is an anti-abortion extremist who wants to drag our country backwards by passing a national abortion ban. We simply can’t let that happen. **[Peter, I’m hoping you’ll support my fight to protect and expand our rights and freedoms by making a donation to my reelection campaign. Will you pitch in any amount you’re able to today to help me defeat anti-abortion Republicans?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-feb24.S4bXxm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240203_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1952%2E35263%2E2fTVfQ)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-feb24.LnIHXA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240203_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1952%2E35263%2E2fTVfQ)

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: A quick thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAPTUR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78350465/453125176/1037629634?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240203_mk_EOM_thanks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGZhNTlmNi1jOGMyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vrxnt6308jg3WZw1wIQ4Lc8wq9zFP5v4w909Cut60fU=)
---
Hey there — it's Marcy. I just wanted to take a minute to sincerely thank you for your support. We're in an extremely tight race to defend our frontline district in November, and we know that the national GOP and their dark-money allies are pouring millions of dollars into our race. For our grassroots movement to have a shot at beating them, we need to meet our monthly fundraising deadlines from here on out. Your support is critical in that fight — it enables us to hire organizers, reach voters in person and online, and win when it counts. Together, I know we can continue delivering big victories for Northern Ohio — lower healthcare and prescription drug costs, stronger environmental protections, and an economy that finally works for workers. I'm so proud to do this work for you and for our community, friend. — Marcy
| Marcy Kaptur is the longest-serving woman in Congress. But right now Republicans are trying everything to steal this seat from her. Winning seats like this will be key for Democrats to hold onto our slim majority in Congress.
