body:
Please don't delay
Hey team -- It’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

With the 2024 elections heating up and the battle for Senate control at a fever pitch, we need to stay on top of our strategy. That’s why James Carville reached out and requested your input for an exclusive strategy interview.

**But he didn’t get an answer from you -- and now he's 17 responses short of what he needed in Pennsylvania!**

[**We NEED enough top Democrats like you to participate in this strategy interview to drive us to victory, but the deadline to respond is midnight tonight. Please, will you take 3 minutes and help us WIN? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13417%2E9716520%2EJOWn71)

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13417%2E9716520%2EJOWn71)
---

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a crucial part of our team,

Diana, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: James Carville
Date: Feb 2, 2024
Subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania... ->
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13417%2E9716520%2EJOWn71)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13417%2E9716520%2EJOWn71)
---

I’ve been in politics a LONG time, and I’ll be honest, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we’ll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman’s right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don’t get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate this year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewFebruary/](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13417%2E9716520%2EJOWn71)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13417%2E9716520%2EJOWn71)
---

Thank you

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17119?ask=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240203-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=13417%2E9716520%2EJOWn71)

We need your help on these critical questions, Fellow Conservative.

**Your personally-assigned National Security Survey is available at this link.[[LINK]](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8a2c3841f97249d9bf0062d3958d4b31&_e=flB2D30V6my8gZYfYfI0IqsQdZ0rBUZOsqx2LNmUIPWM5eLTTQriSK9iG0Xl8q9FqCDDzoBr9tLLkC2GG58WX3XkTxAylQwzl_3Oe5Ys6vHiQL4-sQns5wUJ2LpeOPSNub2sgTy9DPPqTRqeAHpIlykl7j1QFCPvOYJEodF0EKUHoFXRlgA3F6X-NJlHdCQxDe9TI1KRNTwJZ8W5rzACKEzOFfOdy6iCVKVcN7pqb51sWERf1zUXh5zs0nF-TiguPjwL1_uz6G7gdJlCFc7-pCsFXwamAwywE3cU7TUxo8UreRZ9LtJ7pSszPVoJn8mACK7ixuxuL8ao_BrpK0LkXCRiuQ7NLz_t5vtioYxcKoplZvbP4M4RNZnHRzPB0yeROGfGj4lZj9cwRLEbnn_5hdDMDp_GXzzrgdOou8YMbhExbTcJd2am7xM4lHJkA0P78UmPzmgq7m-p5amHNW7Wsp1Ulywy57VSRJuLOOtFdIXvT7b2XFnp4xGPfl1oDFj7Y2Wrmo7KIrfoKBOzEdyd_A%3D%3D) **

Please complete your **National Security Survey** today so we have time to tabulate your answers and act on the critical information we gain.

We will fail without your guidance, Fellow Conservative. Former Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running for Senate in Montana, and **I am committed to doing anything to help him win**. Ask yourself: Do you want MORE of Joe Biden’s failed America? If your answer is no, then I need you to _**[act on this national security request IMMEDIATELY.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=8a2c3841f97249d9bf0062d3958d4b31&_e=flB2D30V6my8gZYfYfI0IqsQdZ0rBUZOsqx2LNmUIPWM5eLTTQriSK9iG0Xl8q9FqCDDzoBr9tLLkC2GG58WX3XkTxAylQwzl_3Oe5Ys6vHiQL4-sQns5wUJ2LpeOPSNub2sgTy9DPPqTRqeAHpIlykl7j1QFCPvOYJEodF0EKUHoFXRlgA3F6X-NJlHdCQxDe9TI1KRNTwJZ8W5rzACKEzOFfOdy6iCVKVcN7pqb51sWERf1zUXh5zs0nF-TiguPjwL1_uz6G7gdJlCFc7-pCsFXwamAwywE3cU7TUxo8UreRZ9LtJ7pSszPVoJn8mACK7ixuxuL8ao_BrpK0LkXCRiuQ7NLz_t5vtioYxcKopyXD7PkMyV9HifSEZI15EMpinUcU7B6NoVQkFhZxBbj7Zc1YUxCoMCQUzSd3-0kORVSqDCLoz3BWJhtAOQmH1e5_frizqQMB_MfGtc72PeXr81qE8e6xbB8yeLMsSkUo064M7cY5cJtMng5fjz-SeH_lr0C3vAwSlbXAScttErtQ%3D%3D) **_

Tim needs your help to know where you stand on these critical issues.

name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: Three years ago, I defended the U.S. Capitol from violent insurrectionists. Now, I'm the Democrat running for Congress in MD-03 and I hope you’ll become a Founding Donor of my campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Hey team , it's Harry Dunn here, one of the Capitol police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists just three years ago and testified in front of the January 6th Committee.
I've got an important announcement: I'm hoping to make my return to DC – but not as a Capitol police officer. I'm officially running to serve Maryland's 3rd Congressional district in the U.S. House.
I’m counting on your support to get there. Can you rush $10 or more to me and Seth Moulton become a Founding Donor of my campaign? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Here’s the thing team, I never thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. (I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn’t hurt!)
But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself.
So when I put on my Capitol police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation’s Capitol, it felt right.
But I never thought I’d see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol.
I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists.
I fought for our democracy and our Capitol once as Officer Dunn, and I'll do it again as Congressman Dunn.
Please, can you chip in $10 or $25 to my team and Seth Moulton to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? I seriously appreciate any help you can give today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Let's do it,
Harry Dunn
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]

name: Brian Williams
subject: A plantation in South Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

Today is the 154th anniversary of the passage of the 15th Amendment which enfranchised Black men in this country (but notably not Black women). February is also the month we celebrate Black History. **Right now, I am reflecting on my own family’s history and our place in the narrative of our nation.**

I trace my history back to a plantation in South Carolina, where my ancestors were once enslaved — when the Constitution of the United States only recognized Black men and women as three-fifths of a person. My great-great-great grandfather fought for his freedom in the Civil War as part of the South Carolina Regiment. For generations, my family has answered the call to create justice. Both my grandfather and father also proudly served our nation in the military.

The Emancipation Proclamation, the 14th Amendment, and the 15th Amendment all directly affected the lives of my ancestors and shaped my future.

But these milestones were never the end of the fight — there is still much work to do for racial justice. **Each generation must answer the call to serve to continue that work, and I am answering the call.**

Our majority-minority district is a living testament to the power of diversity. The stories I’ve heard within our community echo the journey of my own family. TX-32 needs leadership that will recognize and represent our community’s values, experiences, and needs.

[**I will be the leader our district deserves — I will fight for you as fiercely as I would for my own family. Will you make a donation of $5 to help me go to Washington and represent you? Every contribution matters clean_body: | | Peter, Today is the 154th anniversary of the passage of the 15th Amendment which enfranchised Black men in this country (but notably not Black women). February is also the month we celebrate Black History. Right now, I am reflecting on my own family’s history and our place in the narrative of our nation. I trace my history back to a plantation in South Carolina, where my ancestors were once enslaved — when the Constitution of the United States only recognized Black men and women as three-fifths of a person. My great-great-great grandfather fought for his freedom in the Civil War as part of the South Carolina Regiment. For generations, my family has answered the call to create justice. Both my grandfather and father also proudly served our nation in the military. The Emancipation Proclamation, the 14th Amendment, and the 15th Amendment all directly affected the lives of my ancestors and shaped my future. But these milestones were never the end of the fight — there is still much work to do for racial justice. Each generation must answer the call to serve to continue that work, and I am answering the call. Our majority-minority district is a living testament to the power of diversity. The stories I’ve heard within our community echo the journey of my own family. TX-32 needs leadership that will recognize and represent our community’s values, experiences, and needs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Onward, Dr. Brian Williams = = | | Click to unsubscribe from our email list. # [Beyond the 60 second debate answer: Earmarks](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=141327977&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxMzI3OTc3LCJpYXQiOjE3MDY5OTEyOTgsImV4cCI6MTcwOTU4MzI5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lE5qiBBuEDFuh4mDamCXda3VMy8HXtrxF5XzB-Pr3bQ)
### I'm the only House Democrat to oppose them, here's why:
| | [Katie Porter](https://substack.com/redirect/61403165-b5b0-4fb5-ab99-dc2d975d972a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| Feb 3

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/61403165-b5b0-4fb5-ab99-dc2d975d972a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=141327977&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxMzI3OTc3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcwNjk5MTI5OCwiZXhwIjoxNzA5NTgzMjk4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjA1MjU2OCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vxgjphPUZpq5Kx0Fj2tRym4qy90j9Hy9mXLc2V-H-Z0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=141327977&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxMzI3OTc3LCJpYXQiOjE3MDY5OTEyOTgsImV4cCI6MTcwOTU4MzI5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lE5qiBBuEDFuh4mDamCXda3VMy8HXtrxF5XzB-Pr3bQ&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=141327977&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxMzI3OTc3LCJpYXQiOjE3MDY5OTEyOTgsImV4cCI6MTcwOTU4MzI5OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.lE5qiBBuEDFuh4mDamCXda3VMy8HXtrxF5XzB-Pr3bQ)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/katieporteroc/p/beyond-the-60-second-debate-answer-e83?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Today I want to once again go beyond my 60 second debate answer and talk about an issue that is animating this race: earmarks.
I'm the only person in this race who opposes "earmarks." In last week's debate, I explained why:
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3a2f9b85-5c6c-4dd3-8021-a90436950689?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Earmarks are specific buckets of money set aside in much larger pieces of legislation to fund certain, very specific projects. Earmarked spending accounts for less than 1% of the money Congress appropriates.
We've all lived in a world without earmarks. **President Obama was a fierce advocate against them, and they were banned in 2011, and only brought back in 2021. **
When Congress, under Democratic leadership, brought them back in 2021, I was the only House Democrat to oppose them. Here's why:
* **Earmarks invite corruption, waste, and fraud.** The result of our broken campaign finance system is that most of my colleagues are beholden to corporate cash and multi-millionaire donors. One way we've seen those donors be thanked is through--you guessed it--earmarks. Through earmarks, politicians can direct funding to a donors' business--think: building a bridge to nowhere using a donors company, or building a new park for a Mayor who endorsed you, but not for the Mayor who didn't.
* **Earmarks don 't go to the neediest communities: **Data shows that earmarked funds end up in whiter, wealthier, more affluent communities--in fact, **Members who represent majority Black and Hispanic districts get** _**half as much money**_**as those who represent majority white districts.** Neutral experts are the best qualified to determine where taxpayer dollars are most needed.
* **Earmarks don 't give Californians their fair share: **Senators from much smaller states like Alabama and South Carolina have taken home more money than California. California's next Senator should be a fierce advocate for changing the system so that Californians do get their fair share.

Earmarks are not about addressing your biggest challenges. **They 're about diverting taxpayer dollars from where they're needed most to where Washington politicians want them to go, with very little transparency or accountability. **It's not good enough to just keep doing things the way we have been, and I'm proud to be standing up against them.
Katie Porter

Now, voters in Florida will have the chance to overturn DeSantis' far-right ban when they cast their votes this November. But far-right extremists could be about to BLOCK this ballot question before November, undermining the will of Florida voters! And that's only just the beginning: If Democrats like Debbie Mucarsel-Powell lose this year, Republicans will destroy abortion access NATIONWIDE — Rick Scott has already voted for a national abortion ban once. Abortion rights matter to voters. That's exactly why Debbie is tied with Rick Scott in a recent poll. And now, Rick Scott is panicking: He's throwing temper tantrums left and right, back-tracking his extremist positions and lying about where he and Debbie stand on abortion. Listen, Rick Scott's record of anti-choice extremism speaks for itself. But he's a mega-millionaire who can spend MILLIONS spreading lies about Debbie and himself! = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Kunce, Lucas

body:
|
---
Peter,

From overturning _Roe_ to banning abortion drugs, Josh Hawley turned his mission to criminalize abortion nationwide into a family business — and he’s abused his power to do it. **Please let me explain:**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78352483/453132014/-1119996129?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240203_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMDE4NWJhLWQyYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3P_NTwKV3xHDI0YY401tQhqCfrx3DQPIcy_IL7l0L8=) | ****[DEFEAT JOSH HAWLEY »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78352485/453132018/-1119996129?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240203_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMDE4NWJhLWQyYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3P_NTwKV3xHDI0YY401tQhqCfrx3DQPIcy_IL7l0L8=)****
---

**IN 2017:** Matt Kacsmaryk was nominated to be a federal judge for the north Texas district court.

His confirmation stalled for years. We learned he even lied to hide just how bizarre his obsession with controlling people’s bodies really is:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78352486/453132027/-1119996129?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240203_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMDE4NWJhLWQyYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3P_NTwKV3xHDI0YY401tQhqCfrx3DQPIcy_IL7l0L8=)
**IN 2018:** While his nomination languished in the Senate, Kacsmaryk made an investment in his future.

So he became a campaign donor to Josh Hawley, a fellow member of the Federalist Society — a group of corporate activist lawyers with funders including Chevron, Google, and the Kochs.

**IN 2019:** Now a U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley decided to make Kacsmaryk, his campaign donor, a federal judge.

Hawley confirmed Kacsmaryk to the northern Texas district court — despite bipartisan opposition over Kacsmaryk’s Big Brother views on contraceptives and personal freedoms.

**IN 2022:** A lawsuit was filed in the northern Texas district court by activist lawyers seeking to ban an abortion pill that millions have used safely. Abortion medication accounts for over half of all abortions.

**Josh Hawley’s wife led the suit. His donor was the judge.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78352488/453132035/-1119996129?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240203_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMDE4NWJhLWQyYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3P_NTwKV3xHDI0YY401tQhqCfrx3DQPIcy_IL7l0L8=)
**APRIL 2023:** Hawley’s donor judge ruled in favor of the suit led by Hawley’s wife, calling for a near-immediate ban on the abortion pill mifepristone in all 50 states.

**This was the first time a judge has ever unilaterally tried to take a drug off the market against FDA objections.**

Then, in his official capacity as U.S. Senator, Josh Hawley submitted an amicus brief demanding that the Supreme Court end a temporary injunction blocking the ruling (in his wife's lawsuit) by a judge (his campaign donor) to ban America's most commonly-used abortion medication.

**AND NOW: We’ve learned that the mifepristone case (led by Hawley’s wife) is being reviewed by the Supreme Court.**

But this is hardly the first time that the Hawley family business has made it all the way to the Supreme Court:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78352490/453132046/-1119996129?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240203_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMDE4NWJhLWQyYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3P_NTwKV3xHDI0YY401tQhqCfrx3DQPIcy_IL7l0L8=)
**This is what corruption looks like — and in 2024, we’re going to make Hawley own it.** [So if you’re ready to end these Big Brother attacks on abortion and send a real warrior for working people to represent Missouri in the U.S. Senate, please split a donation of $15 or whatever you can afford between my grassroots campaign and Defeat Republicans right now. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78352492/453132050/-1119996129?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240203_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMDE4NWJhLWQyYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3P_NTwKV3xHDI0YY401tQhqCfrx3DQPIcy_IL7l0L8=)

**[SPLIT $25 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78352497/453132055/-1119996129?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240203_2_2&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMDE4NWJhLWQyYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3P_NTwKV3xHDI0YY401tQhqCfrx3DQPIcy_IL7l0L8=)**
**[SPLIT $50 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78352499/453132057/-1119996129?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240203_2_2&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMDE4NWJhLWQyYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3P_NTwKV3xHDI0YY401tQhqCfrx3DQPIcy_IL7l0L8=)**
**[Other Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78352503/453132059/-1119996129?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240203_2_2&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMDE4NWJhLWQyYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3P_NTwKV3xHDI0YY401tQhqCfrx3DQPIcy_IL7l0L8=)**

Senators shouldn’t be in the business of using their position to benefit their family’s legal careers and activism — especially if there’s financial incentive to do so. And there shouldn’t even be a _hint_ of campaign donations impacting who, when, and how a judge gets on a court.

When I’m in the U.S. Senate, I’ll vote to restore _Roe v. Wade._ But I’ll also fight to end corruption like this by:

1\. Barring Senators from voting on judicial nominees who’ve given to their campaigns.

2\. Barring Senators from lobbying any court to benefit an immediate relative.

**Everyday Missourians deserve a Senator who will stand up and fight for their personal freedoms — not another corrupt politician obsessed with controlling our bodies, families, and lives — and I’m ready to serve.**

[If you’re with me, please split a donation of $15 or whatever you can afford between our grassroots campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and Defeat Republicans today. Real people like you are the only folks I ever want to be accountable to in the U.S. Senate, so your support means the world to me. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78352508/453132068/-1119996129?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240203_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlMDE4NWJhLWQyYzItZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3P_NTwKV3xHDI0YY401tQhqCfrx3DQPIcy_IL7l0L8=)

| Adam is the GOP’s favorite villain and punching bag
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5339%2E5257348%2ES-koyR)
Derek – With just **_two days_** until early voting begins in California, **[we’re asking you to pitch in just $2 to support Adam’s Senate campaign.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2764?c0=feb2024_abs_em.bKYPW9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240203_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5339%2E5257348%2ES-koyR)

Steve Garvey, Adam’s Republican opponent, went on _Fox News_ last week and used his airtime to attack Adam.

name: Biden HQ
subject: You deserve an explanation…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Here's the truth: | | |
---
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make your first contribution to President Biden's reelection campaign. Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially right now -- is so important. Here's the truth: Today is the South Carolina Democratic Primary. February is an FEC fundraising deadline month. This means that at the end of the month we will be required to report how much money we've raised and how many donations we've received. Everyone will be watching -- especially to see what the grassroots response to tonight is. The press, our opponents, and even supporters will be waiting to see the strength of our campaign. We've received a huge number of individual donations so far -- people of all backgrounds and from all communities. It's a big part of how we've been able to withstand the millions and millions of dollars Republicans are spending on attack ads. But today, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need you. Because this is the first time President Biden’s name has been on the ballot in 2024, and this is the most important fundraising deadline of the presidential election yet. [Can President Biden count on you to contribute $5, $10, or whatever you can afford today? Do it before South Carolina’s results come in. clean_body: Here's the truth: | | | In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make your first contribution to President Biden's reelection campaign. Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially right now -- is so important. Here's the truth: Today is the South Carolina Democratic Primary. February is an FEC fundraising deadline month. This means that at the end of the month we will be required to report how much money we've raised and how many donations we've received. Everyone will be watching -- especially to see what the grassroots response to tonight is. The press, our opponents, and even supporters will be waiting to see the strength of our campaign. We've received a huge number of individual donations so far -- people of all backgrounds and from all communities. It's a big part of how we've been able to withstand the millions and millions of dollars Republicans are spending on attack ads. But today, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris need you. Because this is the first time President Biden’s name has been on the ballot in 2024, and this is the most important fundraising deadline of the presidential election yet. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in. It means a lot to our chances. Biden HQ

name: Team Schrier
subject: Laying the 🧱 for a more inclusive democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Kim is fighting back against voter suppression to protect every American's right to vote. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78352933/453133593/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTBkNzIzNC1kN2MyLWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9-ILw47i_UQEW2VDxdpICHLECfgrwa6DM5-Rz_NKn9E=&emci=17451cd0-37c1-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=1e0d7234-d7c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter, 154 years ago today, our nation ratified the 15th Amendment granting African American males the right to vote for the first time in history.

While this legislation wasn't perfect, it paved the way for progress in our country.

Unfortunately, today, that forward progress has stalled. Republicans are actively using their powers to erode voting rights wherever they can. And instead of defending the voting rights of all Americans, our highly conservative Supreme Court has stood in lockstep with Republicans, continuously validating their egregious efforts and making it easier than ever for lawmakers to restrict millions of Americans' access to the ballot box.

**[We need Congress to protect the right to vote before it's too late. Add your name to join Kim in the fight to make the John R. clean_body: Kim is fighting back against voter suppression to protect every American's right to vote. Peter, 154 years ago today, our nation ratified the 15th Amendment granting African American males the right to vote for the first time in history. While this legislation wasn't perfect, it paved the way for progress in our country. Unfortunately, today, that forward progress has stalled. Republicans are actively using their powers to erode voting rights wherever they can. And instead of defending the voting rights of all Americans, our highly conservative Supreme Court has stood in lockstep with Republicans, continuously validating their egregious efforts and making it easier than ever for lawmakers to restrict millions of Americans' access to the ballot box. | Kim is fighting back against voter suppression to protect every American's right to vote. name: Team Mazie
subject: Will you pledge to vote, Peter?
body:
|
#
Peter — Mazie is committed to using her vote to make a difference by electing leaders who will stand with her to defend reproductive freedom, protect our democracy, and lower costs for working families. All of these urgent priorities and more are on the ballot in November’s elections, and we’re not just talking about re-electing Mazie — it’s on all of us to reject MAGA extremism and support candidates who will fight for our shared progressive values. So we have an important question for you, Peter: **[Will you join Mazie in making the important pledge to vote by signing on to her petition today? name: American Update
subject: Full-Time Work Is Being Replaced By Part-Time Jobs As Americans And Businesses Struggle
body:
And Fani Willis Still Hasn’t Responded To Commissioner’s Request For Information Relating To Alleged Misuse Of Funds

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683545%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8aPEIfDxRjJA1t5yHQnTIw&sysid=1 Full-Time Work Is Being Replaced By Part-Time Jobs As Americans And Businesses Struggle

Since June 2023, Americans have been increasingly employed in part-time positions, with a subsequent decline in full-time work, according to data from the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS). The number of Americans working part-time in January grew by 96,000 compared to the previous month, while full-time employment sank by 63,000, according to the BLS.

Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis did not respond to a request for information from a Fulton County commissioner relating to allegations she misused county funds as of late Friday night. Fulton County Commissioner Bob Ellis said Willis had not responded to his Jan. 19 request for information about whether or not county funds were “misused” by []

Bank of America appears to be backtracking on its late 2021 pledge to cease financing new coal and Arctic initiatives, based on company documents. Bank of America had committed to terminate its direct funding of coal mines, coal-fired power plants and arctic drilling, according to its December 2021 “Environmental and Social Risk Policy Framework.”

Fulton County Commissioner Bob Ellis said Willis had not responded to his Jan. 19 request for information about whether or not county funds were “misused” by [] Read more Bank Of America Walks Back Much-Touted Pledge To Not Finance Coal, Arctic Drilling Bank of America appears to be backtracking on its late 2021 pledge to cease financing new coal and Arctic initiatives, based on company documents. Bank of America had committed to terminate its direct funding of coal mines, coal-fired power plants and arctic drilling, according to its December 2021 “Environmental and Social Risk Policy Framework.” Read more You Might Like American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 style="" Opt Out PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: Pennie for Congress
subject: The Rise of Violent Crime: Secure America For Everyone (S.A.F.E)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Pennie for Congress*
body:
*The Rise of Violent Crime: Secure America For Everyone (S.A.F.E)*

By Pennie for Congress Staff

As violent crime in America continues to increase, policies continue to
become more lenient which has made our communities less safe. Political
agendas like Defund the Police and No Bail laws have demoralized law
enforcement and have weakened the criminal justice system's ability to
maintain public safety.

[image: pennie_video.jpg] <https://list2.trepennie.com/c/30/2/12/8>

This week marked the release of Dr. Tre Pennie's official video unveiling
his "SECURE AMERICA FOR EVERYONE" initiative. In this concise 30-second
clip, Dr. Pennie shares a personal narrative, recounting the profound
impact of violent crime on his own family. Drawing attention to notable
incidents of shooting violence in Texas, including the Uvalde School
Shooting, he argues that the nation requires qualified leadership in
Congress to effectively tackle these complex challenges.

Central to Dr. Pennie's plan is a commitment to Secure America for
Everyone. This involves implementing policies that specifically target
violence by addressing the shortcomings in the probation and parole system,
with the aim of keeping violent offenders off the streets. Additionally, he
advocates for the closure of legal loopholes that, in his view, have
allowed state and local officials to infringe upon citizens' Constitutional
rights under the 14th Amendment (Equal Protection Clause), thereby
subjecting communities to crime in the name of social justice agendas that
seemingly prioritize criminals over victims.

A key aspect of the initiative is Dr. Pennie's pledge to collaborate with
Congress on bi-partisan legislation to protect every community. This
legislative effort seeks to ensure a robust federal response to
pre-meditated attacks on law enforcement, particularly those perpetrated by
illegal aliens. Dr. Pennie points to a recent incident in New York City
where illegal immigrants violently assaulted police officers, emphasizing
that such behavior cannot and will not be tolerated in this country. His
proposed remedy involves the immediate arrest, imprisonment, and
deportation of individuals engaging in such acts.

[image: pennie_video2.jpg]
<https://list2.trepennie.com/c/30/2/12/9>

Dr. Pennie positions his plan as a "public safety-first" agenda,
underscoring its primary focus on the well-being of children, families, and
communities. By addressing violent crime at the federal level, he aims to
create a safer and more secure environment for all citizens.

With the stakes higher than ever, we cannot endure another two years of
ineffective public safety policies. The urgency to take decisive action is
upon us. It's time to cast your vote for change and select a candidate who
is committed to fighting for your interests.

Support Dr. Tre Pennie for U.S. House in Texas Congressional District 3 and
make your voice count in shaping a safer and more secure future for our
communities!

*Donate to Tre Pennie for Congress*
<https://list2.trepennie.com/c/30/2/12/1>

*Paid for and authorized by Pennie for Congress*

##################################################
Unsubscribe / Manage Email Preferences:
https://list2.trepennie.com/r/2/dpwillis67%40gmail.com
##################################################

name: Mazi Pilip
subject: Breaking News: New York special election declared!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress
body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=18f3941855764e4a918de6a35e0cca36&_e=dSrY1rx8Jt8jNsv63A41NYQV3X86yfRWU9ZHxmTiC4Mkyif3yelsfXRydson3GJmCWldNNJTNKeBphIBoxzA9KAkp3-BdpDUIoD9KF4cgmBhlRprklp_ZnPkg0cUJA1NxRmHUW37OM5GuyIIqBfUZvpv_Vz01p3WFy7C2GFUvtGpbXQpjwSb--jl55Mmao6vaqWVYruDWZjePlWwpD_1kfrZlLOeFaBWC-UpPfkjknr5CUlrSWd_IrwIyBRRpVbaZImZd26mGhgz0DsS1fiGH7Fybaso8vd-KM8epIztLKnhuFsvYjiFI_4-pu8pGoOZyQXkMZHQYVh3kLs_0a1aqSMy8pHeWurblq1A-rHbVtU4WH5iOK6aZAX1jCcAuvQv3gypNiNTWaZgEJvt9e-uqDuaDaUg0BDWQH9ej3oLl1ePfSPZhj2-FjLlOUcqrUI9M88aGp_99UdKeclOgFxY2c9PB7u3xkNADBYUlSVj4w8%3D)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

clean_body: My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election | | | | | | Friend, I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress. My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short! I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared. If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority. I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family. Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed. They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things. And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials. They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative. And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them. The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me. | I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line. | | Early voting begins in just a few days. That makes this the most important race in the nation right now. I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority. | | And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word. All the best, Mazi Melesa Pilip GOP Nominee Special Election NY-03 | | | Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress 228 S Washington St STE 115 Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: | | | Friend, we're taking action to fight MAGA Republicans and win this November. Can you sign one - or all - of the petitions below? Texas Gov. Greg Abbott is defying the federal government as his campaign of razor wire and drownings continues along the border with Mexico. Led by states across the South, over 20 states have banned or restricted abortion since the fall of Roe v. Wade. It's time for Congress to take significant steps toward healing and delivering justice for generations of people of color who have endured institutionalized inequality and injustice. Don't want to sign a petition? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support! name: Team Casey
subject: Short month, short message
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1888%2E552475%2Esx8WLq)
It’s the shortest month of the year — so we’ll keep this brief, Peter.
We need grassroots support if we’re ever going to stand up to the millions upon millions of dollars our self-funding opponent and the national GOP are going to pour into Pennsylvania to try to flip the Senate.
[**Your contribution — yes, yours! — matters in our race to re-elect Bob Casey. So to start February strong, can you chip in $5 right away?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240203-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240203-2&refcode2=1888_552475_sx8WLq&akid=1888%2E552475%2Esx8WLq)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240203-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240203-2-el&refcode2=1888_552475_sx8WLq&akid=1888%2E552475%2Esx8WLq) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240203-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240203-2-el&refcode2=1888_552475_sx8WLq&akid=1888%2E552475%2Esx8WLq) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240203-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240203-2-el&refcode2=1888_552475_sx8WLq&akid=1888%2E552475%2Esx8WLq) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240203-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240203-2-el&refcode2=1888_552475_sx8WLq&akid=1888%2E552475%2Esx8WLq) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240203-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240203-2-el&refcode2=1888_552475_sx8WLq&akid=1888%2E552475%2Esx8WLq) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240203-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240203-2&refcode2=1888_552475_sx8WLq&akid=1888%2E552475%2Esx8WLq)
---
We’re glad to have you on Bob Casey’s side as we work to defend the Senate — and that wraps up our short message!
— Team Casey

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Bob Casey for Senate

Philadelphia, PA 19102

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Torrey=20C.=20Harris=20=28TN=29?=
subject: Rep. Torrey Harris has filed his 2024 bills!
body:
24 bills were filed this week with your help. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d4cc3c0ee357/harris-2024-legislative-agenda?e=2f743a7b99)
---
# Our 2024 Bills Have Been Filed!
_**Hi Friend -**_
Wow! Time really does fly by. For the last 6 months, I have been meeting with community leaders, neighbors, constituents, and organizations looking at the many ways we can make positive change in Tennessee, especially for Shelby County & House District 91.
Now let me say this, we reviewed over 230 legislative ideas that came in directly from constituents like you and we only get a limited amount of bill slots each year. While I agree with many of the ideas that were submitted I had to narrow it down to a focus amount and will review some of the other ideas for next year if possible.
This session we filed legislation that touched subjects from crime to childcare, marijuana to transportation and everything in between. I am so proud of the work we do and give an especially important recognition to my team both in the field and in the legislative office. Together, we can make like better.
Below you will find the 24 legislative bills that I have filed, let me know if any are especially important to you.
| | | | | | | | |

---
Each week, I will present between 3 to 4 of these bills in Committee.I will update you on the legislation and ways you will be able to support.
_Enjoy your weekend,_
**REPRESENTATIVE TORREY C. HARRIS** _Tennessee House of Representatives_ _House District 91 | Memphis-Shelby_ _Email:_[_rep.torrey.harris@capitol.tn.gov_](mailto:REP.TORREY.HARRIS@CAPITOL.TN.GOV?subject=&body=) _Phone:_[_(615) 741-2239_](tel:6157412239)

Friend,

It's Matt Dolan -- I'm here to say **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.**

The Biden administration has made it clear that they will ALWAYS put politics before the people. Rather than use common sense to fix the problems plaguing this nation, the White House is desperate to focus on its divisive agenda above all else.

[**I 'm running for the U.S. Senate because we desperately need new leadership in Washington; America DESPERATELY needs solutions. **](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=ab99aa4fd79f4ff58eeeaa948469ecdb&_e=z2L8b_v6CPk1vevqJ6USYV4tk4Wmvv8poO0nyJoq3AdTIFzSW9-prtlHjKrym1iFWPhlp_GeY-E6QuDSQDE6igVzYXikPlLzxnbsUni-C7UUiJC89_qD08bWdF4yQpt6isqd3qJ-dR07OkYhTipJd_E4EyPpSjMEafs1f5h66Hk_UwSRBwCYnal395MF7IXT6P6aYX6vhIekGTjTBJvlDEFx4M5t8cDWr_5PTnsIZWPqSARBGw0bxk2FT53gNlpRmEO8ILuovq57WbwvTNEnWOv91pfThjQgLy0baRJrGuLGsVfHBFswZtGpHKtT_q3xNUgV2r9OhyVspcRKlVIBVfziMvyytzG7nTguIwuAWNU6JxSAvqc6I-j7jdL4w8cc2F0Fz8OfoKlOdH5ah2SMP6xHVOagg9VO2xCQPYt8l1PrtO9AYjgnl8q7jCZhYZXini1HxifMW0vtvcp1hfL3_9HjWeFwYEVUC24-CXidPEkvHyzxC7H0g-c4DIHUyhg9)

subject: John’s going up against an Open Borders Democrat in NV-04.
body:
Help the Mayor WIN. → | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1a82a45619d/john-lee-mayor-who-rescued-north-las-vegas-announces-for-congress-12679956?e=91a702298f)
---
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=5da349ab38&e=91a702298f)
|
---
Friend,
Leaving our Southern Border wide open and exposing our communities to crime and fentanyl isn’t leadership.
But it’s exactly what Joe Biden and Steven Horsford have done while in power. Under their watch, over 6 MILLION illegal immigrant encounters have been reported since January 2021 – almost DOUBLE the population of Nevada!
**They don’t care about keeping our country or our communities safe. Full stop.**
And we urgently need more leaders in charge who do. John Lee is a fighter who will say no to Open Border policies – [**will you help him RETIRE Steven Horsford and get the critical battleground district of NV-04 back in Republican hands by pitching in to John’s campaign?**](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=efc33a46fc&e=91a702298f)
This strong conservative will take action to end the border surge. Steven Horsford will only keep enabling it.
_After all, just look at what he’s already done..._
–Voted AGAINST securing our Southern Border –Voted AGAINST blocking the use of the immigration app that’s being exploited by drug cartels–Voted FOR letting illegal immigrants camp out on national park sites
Enough is enough. Only by beating extreme Democrats like Horsford in swing districts like NV-04 will we take back power in Washington and finally secure our borders.
**John Lee is up for the challenge. He has the grit, the dedication, and the experience. All he needs now are the resources to compete with the MILLIONS that Horsford receives from his D.C. Democrat cronies.**
[**If this is a mission you can support – will you help John secure those resources by pitching in to his campaign?**](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=529ef768df&e=91a702298f)

| [PITCH IN ANY AMOUNT](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=5cb365eaa0&e=91a702298f)
---
Thank you for your support,_Team Lee_

name: Jim
subject: Last words for this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
Friend...

|
---
[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=d589a425d17c4058912e39569ff2f661&_e=eolBcihaZZt_3ajrL2wAZ77fA_1rnbBM-WpJ-xjzA_CIgnMApZ8K2wTRWel98PhOtS4aOjJWca4H3FL9mu-caK-vlvT2kRo9WLX_6SW_QaXiayoXwZb0oa6LFAFJ1NtGMrZL1XNasIPuCfUt_jFfKSwm1VOkex81PT_GmWvmt14yidIKDRhPXTsRoacnool0O3s60EGEFAixPCdwc5S_gxe37olNB1h9meIJ8OYKatPIbPv_iSvNjNzV6G2TXqArcr7KTC7iINSJQINuHMRiu3kCtQ51r5rqeg4KZWug0UO9_8qnPSOzpUQlyRuMBfO2cYIrKVD0Mt9hRFcJlwy28kOEZ892YGAcyn3EXVYRgOfMay83ptLY5zNjJ92TSo-MFK61GW2FgCmNdoUA8Jn7lQ%3D%3D)
Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=d589a425d17c4058912e39569ff2f661&_e=eolBcihaZZt_3ajrL2wAZ77fA_1rnbBM-WpJ-xjzA_CIgnMApZ8K2wTRWel98PhOtS4aOjJWca4H3FL9mu-caK-vlvT2kRo9WLX_6SW_QaXiayoXwZb0oa6LFAFJ1NtGMrZL1XNasIPuCfUt_jFfKSwm1VOkex81PT_GmWvmt14yidIKDRhPXTsRoacnool0O3s60EGEFAixPCdwc5S_gxe37olNB1h9meIJ8OYKatPIbPv_iSvNjNzV6G2TXqArHA3YLrtlAquZtvLYTbS4RVzyS4d9rR0KwamJtLitcx_F4efuIPiDoydSTeqF0qr2m2OQJDAYonKBLx74K8akX6xqlTHwODXlt6saeqhEmBxYuA8pKvYdMkBk-HD9Oe3L87DSy9imP5mWdk-zMf0u9Q%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend:**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=d589a425d17c4058912e39569ff2f661&_e=eolBcihaZZt_3ajrL2wAZ77fA_1rnbBM-WpJ-xjzA_CIgnMApZ8K2wTRWel98PhOtS4aOjJWca4H3FL9mu-caK-vlvT2kRo9WLX_6SW_QaXiayoXwZb0oa6LFAFJ1NtGMrZL1XNasIPuCfUt_jFfKSwm1VOkex81PT_GmWvmt14yidIKDRhPXTsRoacnool0O3s60EGEFAixPCdwc5S_gxe37olNB1h9meIJ8OYKatPIbPv_iSvNjNzV6G2TXqArUN2eCDMQQL6c7MW4x37pR3ULZKTCXP5dJTUDquMd7boKx4qirmVUWCVXa85hGC-0xE0Dztuk8J23EvGq3Vv2OA1kfEvCHXQQaD-KKlZXMFU9F4ErO9FEVbg1pdYSss3gwnHJOisMQN3wNip7kRPjFg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Friend... | Hello... This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend. But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up. Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it on my own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today. I’m not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Dr. Cornel West
subject: Dr. Cornel West Announces the Formation of the Justice for All Party as Part of His 2024 Presidential Campaign and Beyond
body:
We're on the move with a fifty-state strategy, establishing the Justice for All party as a platform to gain access to the ballot in those states where it's easier to gain access as a party, as opposed to independent.

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=psQUkJGc26u6Wi0imicX-00jZnUVaZYVu06OFU-xtOc&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=1)
---
### A Party for the People: Announcing the Formation of the Justice for All Party
**Independent Presidential Candidate Dr. Cornel West invites you to join him today in confronting the suppression of voter choice by corporate-owned legacy political parties that put profits before people.** On January 31st, 2024, Dr. Cornel West announced the establishment of the Justice For All Party (JFA)—a grassroots, people-powered vehicle established to secure ballot access in specific states for galvanizing communities toward transformational change well beyond the 2024 election cycle. **Watch his video announcement here:**
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k9rPq_gDFIPBau2lJoeJKkwugY4BfCT7SNvo5ICKVliv&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=2)
---
| [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/justice_for_all?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=3)
---
| _“This party is both a celebration of the power of grassroots organizing, as well as a proclamation to the derelict duopoly that the era of corporate political parties is coming to a precipitous and welcomed end . . . we’re establishing a new political and organizing home for candidates running for office at all levels of government, as well as everyday folk ready to take on myriad systems of oppression that prey on the poor and working class nationwide.”_ _—Dr. Cornel West_
---
JFA builds off the foundation and tradition of grassroots political parties like the Lowndes County Freedom Organization, founded under the leadership of Ella Baker, Kwame Ture, and John Hulett, and the Mississippi Freedom Democratic Party under the leadership of Civil Rights titans like Fannie Lou Hamer and the legendary Student Nonviolent Coordinating Committee. Both were formed, in part, to confront racism, classism, and voter suppression of corporate political parties that ignored the immediate needs of poor and working class people and their calls for mutual justice.
> “We stand on the shoulders of freedom fighters like Martin Luther King, Joshua Abraham Heshcel, Dorothy Day, and so many others who dared to bear witness to an iniquitous political system and directly confront it,” West emphasized. “JFA takes inspiration from these amazing souls and the sage words of Sister Ella Baker who reminded us we are not just fighting for the freedom of Black folk alone, but for the freedom of the human spirit that encompasses all of us; that is the essence of this new political formation that strives to deliver truth, love, and justice for all.”
The party provides a mechanism for Dr. West's grassroots campaign to travel a path of least resistance to obtain the fewest number of signatures required to attain ballot access in states like North Carolina, Florida, and Washington. Unique political climates within each state demand new routes to support people-driven decision-making and greater choice. **The Cornel West 2024 campaign invites you to[stay connected](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/join?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=4) in order to receive upcoming voter information guides and stay informed on how to get involved in your state. ** View the official press release [here](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/justice_for_all?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=5). A video announcing the launch of JFA can be found [here](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvCTCvBf35Ezg7k-Yeg5xVDzNcZvj77ekfhMfCA3PfwsJYXyPcuB687l1nSlPxNGbg&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=6).
---
* * *
---
**About Cornel West For President 2024:** Dr. Cornel West, affectionately known to many as "Brother West," is the Dietrich Bonhoeffer Professor of Philosophy and Christian Practice at Union Theological Seminary. He is the former University Professor at Harvard University, Professor Emeritus at Princeton University and the first Black person to receive a Ph.D. In Philosophy from Princeton University. He has written 20 books and will deliver the historic Gifford lectures at the University of Edinburgh in Scotland in Spring 2024. **_Dr. West enters the 2024 Presidential contest at a time in which he describes a national crisis of moral bankruptcy and spiritual obscenity driven by a derelict duopoly of both major parties that equally places profits over people and the planet._** West asserts that running as an Independent candidate affords him the opportunity and duty to deliver policy prescriptions incorporated by and for the people, instead of political parties beholden to corporations and special interest groups who feel no solidarity with poor and working-class people of all races, gender identities, and age groups. The Cornel West Campaign to empower poor and working people everywhere stands at a pivotal moment in history, committed to being a true campaign for people around the globe. Our aim is and will always be to unite in solidarity with movements of truth and justice, who seek a choice beyond empire, white supremacy, capitalism, patriarchy, and the confines of the corporate-dominated two-party system. Learn more about Cornel West at [CornelWest2024.com](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=xbOruBcx8X6cQKKqH8FxRs4QKlmm0iFhc6CRwfpB9v8&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=7).
Learn more about Dr. West’s Policy Pillars at [CornelWest2024.com/Platform](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=xbOruBcx8X6cQKKqH8FxRuOdJuHXQfZcTcAjkuruLY4tpNFU_Ofnn6Qx1g16Idtb&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=8).
For more details and press inquiries, please contact [press@cornelwest2024.com](mailto:press@cornelwest2024.com). For those eager to contribute to this transformative endeavor, a dedicated platform for organizing and petitioning has been established. Visit [https://www.cornelwest2024.com/petitioning_launch](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/petitioning_launch?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=9) to learn how you can participate in petitioning efforts and help establish the Justice for All Party in your state.
---
* * *
---
Peter - [**will you contribute $10 today to help Dr. West get on the ballot in all 50 states? We do not accept corporate funding, and every dollar counts! Help keep this momentum going!**](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?amount=10&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=10)
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?amount=27&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=11 "DONATE NOW >>") [DONATE NOW >>](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?amount=27&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=11)

---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?amount=50&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=14 "DONATE $50 >>") [DONATE $50 >>](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?amount=50&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=justice_for_all_party_suppor&n=14)

name: Team Kennedy
subject: What Do They Know:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has promised to disclose what the government knows

|
---
| | | **Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has promised to disclose what the government knows
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ufo_2_03_24_email_1_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Non-human aircrafts.
Non-human life forms.
Reverse engineering by the Department of Defense and federal contractors.
Roswell.
In light of recent Congressional testimony from government whistleblowers, these topics, once reserved for late night sci-fi TV, are freely discussed publicly today.
The testimony of various Defense Department personnel was shocking. They went on the record saying that they are aware of and have knowledge of the existence of non-human life and non-human aircrafts—as well as of the government’s attempts to reverse-engineer the aircrafts they’ve recovered.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/ufo-video?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ufo_2_03_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2)
Whatever your views are on “unidentified aerial phenomenon” (formerly UFOs, or Unidentified Flying Objects), we believe the United States government should come clean with the American people about what they know, and what, if anything, they have been hiding.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has promised to disclose what the government knows, what they aren’t sharing, and most importantly, if we do have knowledge and possession of beings and aircrafts of non-human origin.
This is just one of the many issues that RFK Jr. has promised to handle with full transparency to the public. But we will never have the answers if he doesn’t [win the battle for the White House](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ufo_2_03_24_email_1_1_nd&n=3) in November.
Any amount you can give will help us sustain the incredible momentum we’ve built together!

clean_body: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has promised to disclose what the government knows | | | | Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has promised to disclose what the government knows | Dear Peter, Non-human aircrafts. Non-human life forms. Reverse engineering by the Department of Defense and federal contractors. Roswell. In light of recent Congressional testimony from government whistleblowers, these topics, once reserved for late night sci-fi TV, are freely discussed publicly today. The testimony of various Defense Department personnel was shocking. They went on the record saying that they are aware of and have knowledge of the existence of non-human life and non-human aircrafts—as well as of the government’s attempts to reverse-engineer the aircrafts they’ve recovered. Whatever your views are on “unidentified aerial phenomenon” (formerly UFOs, or Unidentified Flying Objects), we believe the United States government should come clean with the American people about what they know, and what, if anything, they have been hiding. Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has promised to disclose what the government knows, what they aren’t sharing, and most importantly, if we do have knowledge and possession of beings and aircrafts of non-human origin. This is just one of the many issues that RFK Jr. has promised to handle with full transparency to the public. But we will never have the answers if he doesn’t in November. Any amount you can give will help us sustain the incredible momentum we’ve built together! Together, we can win in the White House in November and restore common sense and freedom to America. Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

body:
| | | **You’ve been selected!**

We’ve reserved a handful of spots on our Exclusive Advisory Board for the most active Democrats in Pennsylvania -- and you made the cut! **[Claim your reserved spot and join the Advisory Board right away by taking a quick survey >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/17293?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240203-ActionNeeded-AdvisoryBoardCountdownClock-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240203-ActionNeeded-AdvisoryBoardCountdownClock-Pros-sl1&akid=13420%2E9716520%2ElZ43mx)**

The stakes of this year’s elections couldn’t be higher. Our Senate majority hinges on just TWO seats, and we're defending TWICE as many seats as Republicans. With _millions_ already pouring in from Donald Trump’s allies, we have to perfect our strategy NOW to defeat Republicans and win in November.

That’s why we selected YOU to join the Advisory Board that will lead us to victory. **But the invitation will close at midnight, and right now, your spot is unfilled!**

**Please, don’t let this offer expire:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17293?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240203-ActionNeeded-AdvisoryBoardCountdownClock-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240203-ActionNeeded-AdvisoryBoardCountdownClock-Pros-sl1&akid=13420%2E9716520%2ElZ43mx)

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: It’s crunch time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37266%2E3422442%2ETECTGS)
Derek, there are less than five weeks until our critical primary election on March 5.
→ California’s unique jungle primary system means the top two vote getters, regardless of party, advance to the general.
→ Adam Schiff is running TV ads to boost Republican Steve Garvey and keep Katie from advancing to the general election.
We can’t afford to lose Katie’s voice in Congress. She’s the only candidate in this race who has never taken corporate PAC contributions – because she’s fighting to stand up to corruption and take on big corporations.
**The stakes in this race are high****, Derek.**
**Will you join a small percentage of the most committed Porter Supporters by making a weekly contribution until the primary on March 5? Knowing we can count on your weekly support allows us to better plan out our ad buys.[This link will allow you to set up a weekly donation which will automatically end on March 5th.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240203-1?refcode=em20240203-37266&recurring=true&refcode2=37266_3422442_TECTGS&akid=37266%2E3422442%2ETECTGS)**

Katie is being outspent heavily on TV ads and we need the resources to reach the voters who will decide this election in these final weeks.
Team Porter has never let us down before, and we know we can count on you this time, too.
Onward,
KPHQ
